announce_vault_teleporter_does_nothing.en: Curses! Why can I not simply march there?
announce_vault_teleporter_does_nothing.trans: 该死！为何我不能直接迈向那里？

1.en: A gift, that you may not devour us.
1.trans: 一份礼物，让你不会吞噬我们的礼物。

2.en: A tribute for thee, great lion!
2.trans: 给你的贡品，伟大的狮子！

3.en: O great lion, we pay tribute this day!
3.trans: 噢，伟大的狮子，我们今天是来朝贡的！

announce_accomplishment.en: May I return to battle now?
announce_accomplishment.trans: 我现在能回去战斗了吗？

announce_lunar_rift_max.en: Something doth shine like a beacon in the distance.
announce_lunar_rift_max.trans: 有东西像灯塔一样在远处闪耀。

describe_plantstressorhappiness.en: The feeble thing needs conversation to grow? Vikings thrive in stoic silence!
describe_plantstressorhappiness.trans: 这弱小的东西需要对话才能成长？维京人在隐忍的沉默中最能茁壮成长!

announce_yotb_learn_new_pattern.en: Aha! A new plan has revealed itself before mine eyes!
announce_yotb_learn_new_pattern.trans: 啊哈！一个新的计划展现在了我的眼前！

1.en: My head hath been filled with useless knowledge about non-meat!
1.trans: 我的脑袋里装满了关于非肉的无用知识!

announce_cavein.en: Rocks shall rain from on high!
announce_cavein.trans: 岩石从高处滚落下来了！

announce_eyeofterror_arrive.trans: 受死吧，窥探的恶魔。拿起武器！

announce_plant_randomseed.en: I care not what shall emerge.

announce_hot.trans: 炎炎烈日晒得我疲惫不堪。

announce_research.en: The power of knowledge is great.

1.en: Heavy is the head that weareth the crown.

2.en: Fate hath set the crown upon thy head.
2.trans: 命运已将王冠置于汝首。

announce_lightsout_shadowhand.en: Curses! I shall hew off thy dark meddling hand!
announce_lightsout_shadowhand.trans: 该死！看吾斩断汝暗影干涉的爪子！

announce_rabbitkinghorn_badspawnpoint.en: Are you not satisfied with the place?!
announce_rabbitkinghorn_badspawnpoint.trans: 你对这个地方不满意吗？！

announce_is_feasting.en: My friends, let us celebrate this great bounty!
announce_is_feasting.trans: 朋友们，让我们来共襄盛举！

announce_ticoon_near_kitcoon.en: I sense there's a little beastie afoot...
announce_ticoon_near_kitcoon.trans: 我感到有一只小野兽在附近……

targetincombat.en: I'll only ride it if it's the victor.

notallowed.en: Alas! It doth not go there!

inuse.en: 'Tis in use, and not by me.
inuse.trans: 有人在用，而且还不是我。

empty.en: It requireth materials.

hermitcrab_relocate.en: 'Tis dry. I shall see to it later.
hermitcrab_relocate.trans: 是干的。我晚些再来处理。

toofar.en: Alas, it hath escaped my fury.
toofar.trans: 可惜，它逃过了我的怒火。

inmood.en: The beast is in a foul temper.
inmood.trans: 这个野兽的脾气坏着呢。

beef_hitched.en: The beast hath already been secured to its post.
beef_hitched.trans: 已经把野兽安全栓到了桩子上。

needbeef.en: I have a hitching post, but no beast.
needbeef.trans: 我有一个拴牛桩，但没有野兽。

needbeef_closer.en: I shall have to coax the beast closer.
needbeef_closer.trans: 我得把这野兽哄得更近些。

busy.en: I'll try once more when they're free.
busy.trans: 等它们可用时我再试一次。

dead.en: They'll have better things in Valhalla.

sleeping.en: Such sweet slumber graces thy face... Maybe later.
sleeping.trans: 他们睡得真香...晚点再说吧。

full.en: They're not strong enough to carry more!
full.trans: 他们不够强壮，背不了那么多！

unsuitable_for_plants.en: The plants will like this about as much as I like them.
unsuitable_for_plants.trans: 我不喜欢它，这些植物也不喜欢。

notamerm.en: T'would not be wise to anger the fish beasts.
notamerm.trans: 激怒鱼类猛兽可不是明智之举。

inuse.trans: 真正的战士会耐心等待轮到他们。

notmasterchef.en: T'would not do to meddle with my ally's effects.
notmasterchef.trans: 不能搅黄我盟友的效果。

notsouljarhandler.en: I shall not meddle with that.

generic.en: That is not a job for a warrior!
generic.trans: 那不是适合战士的工作！

oversizedveggies_too_small.en: This non-meat isn't even worthy of competing!
oversizedveggies_too_small.trans: 这种非肉根本就不值竞争!

fish_too_small.en: This wee beastie will not bring me glory.
fish_too_small.trans: 这个小猛兽不会给我带来荣耀。

inuse.en: I shall valiantly wait my turn.

generic.en: I fear I cannot!

no_racers.en: The veggie beasts must take their places for the race to commence!
no_racers.trans: 小菜兽们必须就位，比赛才能开始！

notdish.en: That's not worthy to grace the mouth of the gods!

mushroomfarm_needsshroom.en: Forest sprites have no need of that.
mushroomfarm_needsshroom.trans: 森林小精灵不需要那个。

nomoon.en: Needs the gaze of Mani to work.

dead.en: They'll have better things in Valhalla.

wrongshadowform.en: We must rearrange the bones of the beast.
wrongshadowform.trans: 我们必须重新整理怪兽的骨头。

notamonkey.en: Speak plainly! I understand not thine chittering.
notamonkey.trans: 说人话！我听不懂你在嘟囔什么。

mushroomfarm_needslog.en: The sprite home requires sprucing up. With magical spruce!
mushroomfarm_needslog.trans: 精灵之家需要装修。多么魔幻的打扮啊！

busy.en: I'll try once more when it's done.

wronggem.en: This gem was not chosen for this purpose.
wronggem.trans: 选择这个宝石不是为了这个目的。

pigkinggame_danger.en: Danger is near! 'Tis no time for games.
pigkinggame_danger.trans: 危险就在眼前！现在可不是玩游戏的时间。

notgem.en: This object is not blessed with the power of the gods.
notgem.trans: 这个物体没有受到诸神力量的庇佑。

terrarium_refuse.en: Perhaps it shall accept a different offering.
terrarium_refuse.trans: 也许换个供品它会接受。

terrarium_cooldown.en: I shall await the small tree's return before presenting it with another offering.
terrarium_cooldown.trans: 待小树归来，吾将向它献上另一份礼物。

mushroomfarm_nomoonallowed.en: It longs for its homeland. It will not grow here.
mushroomfarm_nomoonallowed.trans: 它怀念自己的家乡。不愿在这里扎根。

queenbusy.en: Something else hath caught her attention.
queenbusy.trans: 有别的事引起了她的注意。

cantshadowrevive.en: T'will not raise from death, it seems.

duplicate.en: We have already conquered this knowledge.
duplicate.trans: 我们已经攻克了这一知识。

pigkinggame_messy.en: I must clear the battlefield first!
pigkinggame_messy.trans: 我必须先清理一下战场！

generic.en: T'will not work.

spidernohat.en: It hath no use for such things while it's in my pocket.
spidernohat.trans: 它在我的口袋里用不到这种东西。

abigailheart.en: The girl's spirit cannot be returned.

notsculptable.en: That material is not befitting a work of art.
notsculptable.trans: 那个材料不适用于艺术品中。

notstaff.en: The gods may frown were I to do that.
notstaff.trans: 我那么干怕是会惹怒诸神。

hashat.en: I will not crush that hat!

melting.en: No further. 'Tis is returning to the earth.
melting.trans: 不能再继续了。它正在回归大地。

targetincombat.en: I'll only ride it if it's the victor.
targetincombat.trans: 只有它是优胜者，我才会骑。

inuse.en: I'll need to be faster than that in battle!
inuse.trans: 战斗中必须比那更快一点！

sleeping.trans: 苏醒吧，小野兽！让我们一起驰骋吧！

charge_full.trans: 充满雷神之锤般的力量！

generic.en: only_used_by_walter

nooccupant.en: I cannot groom without a beast.
nooccupant.trans: 需要有个动物在这里我才能开始打扮。

inuse.en: I shall let them select their garments first.
inuse.trans: 我应该先让他们挑选自己的服装。

notenoughhair.en: First the beast must grow back its mane.
notenoughhair.trans: 首先，必须等这野兽的鬃毛长回来。

generic.en: That's where I keep all my favorite furs and pelts.
generic.trans: 那是我存放所有我最喜欢的皮草的地方。

too_late.en: I must move with greater haste!

nocarnival.en: It seems the ravens hath returned to Odin.
nocarnival.trans: 渡鸦似乎回到了奥丁身边。

mannequin_equipswapfailed.en: It is not trained to carry such things.
mannequin_equipswapfailed.trans: 它没有接受过携带这些物品的训练。

pillowfight_no_handpillow.en: Thou wouldst send me into the fray unarmed?
pillowfight_no_handpillow.trans: 你会让我手无寸铁地参加战斗吗？

notmybernie.en: This beautiful beast only obeys its master.
notmybernie.trans: 这头美丽的野兽只服从它的主人。

notmerm.en: The little beastie must gather her own legions.
notmerm.trans: 小野兽必须召唤自己的军团。

locked_gate.en: Thou shalt not keep me out!

kitcoon_hideandseek_not_enough_hiding_sp.en: This is not a worthy stage for our players!
kitcoon_hideandseek_not_enough_hiding_sp.trans: 这个舞台配不上我们的选手！

kitcoon_hideandseek_not_enough_hiders.en: This hunt will require more players.
kitcoon_hideandseek_not_enough_hiders.trans: 这次狩猎需要更多的选手。

carnival_host_here.en: Where art thou, raven? Do show yourself!

alreadyactive.en: Mayhaps there is another competition elsewhere.
alreadyactive.trans: 也许其他地方还有别的比赛。

rightthere.en: He is full set upon his duties.

professionalchef.en: T'would not do to meddle with my ally's effects.
professionalchef.trans: 不能搅黄我盟友的效果。

shadowmagic.en: A tragic tale of woe and misery!
shadowmagic.trans: 充满悲哀和痛苦的悲剧故事！

toodeep.en: Come closer, ye wee fishy cowards!

wrongpiece.en: It will not stay in place!

wronggear.en: Tis not the rod I require.

quagmire_wrongkey.en: By Odin's beard, I shall find the right key!
quagmire_wrongkey.trans: 以奥丁的胡须之名，我一定会找到正确的钥匙！

klaus.en: Not when there is battle to be won!
klaus.trans: 当需要赢得一场战争时就不是！

wrongkey.en: The true key must be out there somewhere.
wrongkey.trans: 真正的钥匙肯定在外面的某个地方。

empty.en: I cannot wrap that which does not exist!
empty.trans: 我没办法打包根本不存在的东西！

generic.en: Its ways are already known to me.
generic.trans: 我已经知道是怎么回事了。

duplicate.en: We have already conquered this knowledge.
duplicate.trans: 我们已经攻克了这一知识。

busy.en: I'll try once more when they're free.
busy.trans: 等它们可用时我再试一次。

dead.en: They'll have better things in Valhalla.

sleeping.en: Such sweet slumber graces thy face... Maybe later.
sleeping.trans: 他们睡得真香...晚点再说吧。

full.en: They're not strong enough to carry more!
full.trans: 他们不够强壮，背不了那么多！

someoneelsesbeefalo.en: This beast doth not belong to me.

awakebeefalo.en: Let him sleep. Then I'll prune him.
awakebeefalo.trans: 等他睡着我再给他剃毛。

generic.en: Unshaveworthy.

webberonly.en: The spiderchild is the only one who can tame those little beasts!
webberonly.trans: 那个蛛孩是唯一可以驯服这些小野兽的人！

doer_isnt_module_owner.en: I respect thine loyalty to our metal warrior, scout.
doer_isnt_module_owner.trans: 我尊重你对金属战士的忠诚，侦察兵。

toofar.en: I must close the gap between us!
toofar.trans: 我必须缩短我们之间的距离！

inuse.en: I shall wait whilst my allies plan their feast.
inuse.trans: 我的盟友们准备大餐时，我应该耐心等待。

generic.en: Alas! Bested by cookware!

messagebottlemanager_not_found.en: This is nary the time nor place.

wrongworld.en: This map is for some distant land...
wrongworld.trans: 这个地图上画的是块遥远的土地...

known.trans: 我已经掌握了那些知识。

stash_map_not_found.trans: 这是一张没有方向的地图。

cantlearn.en: That knowledge is forbidden by the gods.
cantlearn.trans: 那些知识是被诸神所禁止的。

1.en: By Aegir, you will bend to my will!
1.trans: 以海神埃吉尔之名，你终有一天会屈服于我的意志！

2.en: Oh-ho! Feisty, are we?

3.en: I will not be defeated by my own vessel!
3.trans: 我绝不会败给自己的船！

1.en: Thou art not the one I seek.

2.en: Where is your master, veggie beast?
2.trans: 你的主人去哪了，小菜兽？

full_of_curses.trans: 这不是一个值得夺取的宝物。

restriction.en: There is no glory in that weapon!
restriction.trans: 那个武器毫无荣誉感可言！

inuse.en: Someone hath beat me to it!

noimage.en: The muses will not visit me if I do not place an item first.
noimage.trans: 如果我不先放一个道具，缪斯就不会来找我。

notallowed.en: I fear that does not go there.
notallowed.trans: 恐怕这个不能放进那里。

inuse.en: My stalwart companion currently has use of that.
inuse.trans: 我那健壮的同伴现在有那个用处。

notsouljarhandler.en: I shall not meddle with that.

notmasterchef.en: T'would not do to meddle with my ally's effects.
notmasterchef.trans: 不能搅黄我盟友的效果。

generic.en: It is already brimming with goods.

inuse.en: I shall valiantly wait my turn.

cooking.en: I will let it finish its work.
cooking.trans: 我应该先让它完成自己的工作。

haspet.en: I can only command one beastie!

busy_station.en: It is not my time yet.

ticoon.en: I hath already found a guide.

mounted.en: I must first dismount from my mighty steed.

notnow.en: Finish thine business with haste! I have glory to attain!
notnow.trans: 赶紧干完你手上的活！我的荣耀还在等着我呢！

bad_timing0.en: I must take heed of the ocean's rhythm.
bad_timing0.trans: 我必须留意海洋的节奏。

samesong.en: Again, from the top? Nay! The show must go on!
samesong.trans: 再一次，从头开始？不！演出必须继续！

beef_bell_has_beef_already.trans: 我已经选好了我的野兽。

already_marked.en: I must stand by my choice, even in the heat of competition!
already_marked.trans: 即使是在激烈的竞争中，我也必须坚持我的选择!

not_participant.en: I cannot join in the competition without a beastie of my own.
not_participant.trans: 没有自己的野兽，我是不会参加比赛的。

samedish.en: I hath used a dish already.
samedish.trans: 我已经使用了一个餐具。

mismatch.en: This food doth need a different dish.
mismatch.trans: 这道菜需要装在不同的餐具中。

announce_nohungersleep.trans: 一晚上会饿死我的！要先吃东西。

announce_nonightsiesta_cave.en: This doesn't feel like the time for a nap.
announce_nonightsiesta_cave.trans: 感觉这不是该打盹的时候。

announce_carrat_error_fell_asleep.trans: 我以奥丁的名义命你立刻醒来！

describe_plantstressorkilljoys.en: It seems to harbor resentment for its weed brethren.
describe_plantstressorkilljoys.trans: 它似乎对它的杂草兄弟们怀有怨恨。

announce_worms_boss.trans: 一个庞然大物正在逼近。

announce_dusk.en: The sun is setting, darkness waits nearby.
announce_dusk.trans: 太阳正在落下，黑夜快来了。

announce_snared_ivy.en: You would defend your vegetable kin against me? Have at thee!
announce_snared_ivy.trans: 你要保护你的植物人亲戚来对付我？来吧！

announce_fertilizer_researched.en: What need hath a warrior of this knowledge?
announce_fertilizer_researched.trans: 我这样的勇士学这种知识有什么用？

2.en: I'm tempted to simply wade in with my spear...
2.trans: 我干脆拿出长矛叉鱼吧……

3.en: Come to me, delicious sea meats!

4.en: It's not befitting of a warrior to just stand around waiting!
4.trans: 一个勇士怎么能站着干等！

announce_hunt_successful_fork.en: My quarry will not suspect my presence...
announce_hunt_successful_fork.trans: 我的猎物就不会怀疑我的存在……

announce_detach_buff_workeffectiveness.en: I think I've done my share.
announce_detach_buff_workeffectiveness.trans: 我想我已经完成了我的工作。

announce_cozy_sleep.trans: 本战士已经得到了充分的休息！

announce_mega_flare_seen.en: That light in the sky... 'tis a challenge to all who see it!
announce_mega_flare_seen.trans: 天空中的那道光……对所有看到的人都发出了挑战！

quagmire_announce_win.en: We shall live to fight another day!
quagmire_announce_win.trans: 我们要继续活着，继续战斗！

announce_rabbitking_aggressive.en: Which denizen of the underworld draws near?
announce_rabbitking_aggressive.trans: 哪个地下世界的居民正在逼近？

announce_weak_rat.en: The wee beast is on death's door.
announce_weak_rat.trans: 小野兽已经一只脚踏进死神之门了。

announce_nosleeponfire.en: I'll not sleep in the flames.

announce_battlesong_instant_taunt_buff.en: "You scullion! You rampallian! You fustilarian! I'll tickle your catastrophe!"
announce_battlesong_instant_taunt_buff.trans: “你这个卑鄙小人！无赖！我会让你痛尝惨败！”

describe_plantstressorovercrowding.en: This small patch of dirt cannot sustain all these non-meats.
describe_plantstressorovercrowding.trans: 这一小块泥土地养活不了这么多非肉。

quagmire_announce_notrecipe.en: T'were not meant to be a meal.

yotb_post.en: Now to present my beast for all to see!
yotb_post.trans: 现在让所有人都见识一下我的野兽吧!

deerclopseyeball_sentryward_kit.en: Fear not the heat, I shall build this posthaste.
deerclopseyeball_sentryward_kit.trans: 不要畏惧酷热，我将马上完成它。

generic.en: Why must we coddle the plants thus?
generic.trans: 为什么我们一定要这样溺爱植物呢？

empty.en: There is no water to be found within.

generic.en: Jump into my mouth!

unimplemented.en: A mysterious relic, sure to contain great power.
unimplemented.trans: 神秘的遗迹，肯定蕴含着伟大的力量。

cozy_bunnyman.en: I am not fooled by their cozy exterior.
cozy_bunnyman.trans: 我不会被他们令人舒适的表象所迷惑。

leif_idol.en: Tribute to an ancient woodland being.
leif_idol.trans: 向古老的林地生物致敬。

beetletaur.en: You shall be chained again, foe!
beetletaur.trans: 敌人，你会再次被锁起来！

twinofterror2.en: Do thine worst, foul metal fiend!
twinofterror2.trans: 做你最坏的打算吧，肮脏的金属恶魔!

twinofterror1.en: Do thine worst, foul metal fiend!
twinofterror1.trans: 做你最坏的打算吧，肮脏的金属恶魔!

chesspiece_anchor.en: 'Twas made in honor of our stalwart vessel!
chesspiece_anchor.trans: 做出来是为了纪念我们忠实的长船！

trunk_summer.en: A powerful trunk of a fallen not-so-hairy beast.
trunk_summer.trans: 一根结实有力的象鼻，来自被杀死的毛不多的大象。

chessjunk1.en: It's only a pile of fallen warriors.

slurtle.en: You are an angel. Of nasty.

oceanfishinglure_spoon_green.trans: 应该会引起它们的注意！

chessjunk3.en: Someone should really clean this place up.
chessjunk3.trans: 应该找人好好打扫一下。

moose.en: I wish I could ride it into battle.
moose.trans: 我希望我能骑着它去战斗。

trinket_9.en: No decent armor could be made with these.
trinket_9.trans: 用这些可做不出好的盔甲。

boat_magnet_kit.en: I am a warrior, not a tinkerer of machines!
boat_magnet_kit.trans: 我是战士，不是机器修补匠！

trinket_8.en: It would make an okay weapon in a pinch.
trinket_8.trans: 必要时可以充当不错的武器。

trinket_7.en: No time for games! I must train my new allies!
trinket_7.trans: 没时间玩耍！我必须训练我的新盟友们！

ghost.en: A heart shall wrench %s back from the jaws of death!
ghost.trans: 一颗心应该能把%s从鬼门关拉出来！

firestarter.en: %s has more fire in her eyes than usual.
firestarter.trans: 较之平常，%s的眼里带着更多火光。

murderer.en: My spear was forged in passionate fires, %s!
murderer.trans: %s，我的长矛是在熊熊大火中锻造的！

attacker.en: Should it come to blows, may the best maiden triumph.
attacker.trans: 如果开始互殴，只有最强的少女能赢。

generic.en: Greetings, %s, the Inflammable!

trinket_5.en: Will it take me to Asgard?

honeycomb.en: Wouldn't make much of a comb.
honeycomb.trans: 看起来可不怎么像蜂窝。

trinket_3.en: Even my spear cannot undo this knot.
trinket_3.trans: 就算用我的长矛也打不开这个结。

teleportato_box.en: Perhaps it holds the secret to this land's Bifrost.
teleportato_box.trans: 也许它隐藏着彩虹桥的秘密。

eating_corpse.en: Curses! The dead devoureth the dead!

generic.en: Thou art blasphemy made flesh!

trinket_2.en: Accompaniment for my ballad of triumphs.
trinket_2.trans: 为我的凯旋之歌伴奏吧。

trinket_1.en: Toys do not interest a great warrior such as I.
trinket_1.trans: 玩具吸引不了像我这样的伟大战士。

nomagic.en: The magic slumbers far from here.

minisign_item.en: A surface on which to inscribe ancient runes.
minisign_item.trans: 用来雕刻古老的符文的表面。

asparagus.en: Vegetable! I will not consume you!

generic.en: I've had enough of Sol's shining face for one day.
generic.trans: 我一天就受够太阳神那油亮的嘴脸。

full.en: There are too many people up there.

tree_rock_seed.en: 'Tis said this humble seed holds mighty potential.
tree_rock_seed.trans: 据说这小小的种子蕴藏着巨大的潜力。

livinglog.en: Burning such magic would seem a waste.
livinglog.trans: 烧了这样的魔法生物似乎是一种浪费。

rabbitkinghorn_chest.en: The rabbits pledge to safeguard my loot within their lair.
rabbitkinghorn_chest.trans: 兔子们发誓会在它们的巢穴里保护我的战利品。

froglegs.trans: 充满了有弹性的蛋白质！

mandrake_active.en: She just wants to go on a rutabaga saga.
mandrake_active.trans: 它只是想开始属于芜菁的无尽冒险。

ipecacsyrup.trans: 这是味道最难闻的糖浆。

generic.en: I could smell it from back there!
generic.trans: 这么远我都能闻到它的臭味！

rat.en: Feel the warrior's spirit within you!
rat.trans: 感受你体内的勇士精神吧！

generic.en: This odd training ground will suffice.
generic.trans: 这个古怪的训练场够用了。

boatrace_start_throwable_deploykit.en: The location is unimportant. Only know that I will arrive first.
boatrace_start_throwable_deploykit.trans: 放哪不重要。只需知道我会是第一。

yotc_carrat_race_checkpoint_item.en: A waypoint to guide our vegetable beasts.
yotc_carrat_race_checkpoint_item.trans: 指引我们小菜兽的一个路径点。

quagmire_spotspice_sprig.trans: 这个小枝可以用来调味。

leif.en: That is an ancient woodland being.
leif.trans: 那是一个古老的林地生物。

boatrace_primemate.en: You just don't know it yet, but I have won already.
boatrace_primemate.trans: 我已经赢了，你还全然不知。

book_research_station.en: A tome filled with great wisdom.
book_research_station.trans: 一部充满大智慧的巨著。

beef_bell.en: This bell commands loyalty from the woolen beasts.
beef_bell.trans: 毛绒野兽会为这只铃铛献出忠诚。

mask_ancient_handmaidhat.en: This mask did belong to one of valorous spirit!
mask_ancient_handmaidhat.trans: 此面具曾属于一位英勇的魂灵！

level1.en: My warrior's sense tells me it's not to be trifled with.
level1.trans: 我的武士本能告诉我不能轻视它。

haunted_pocket.en: Perhaps it's best we part ways...

generic.en: For me?

kitcoon_desert.en: A wee beastie with not-so-wee ears.

ghost.en: Return with Sleipnir's swiftness, many-legged one.
ghost.trans: 像斯雷普尼尔那样迅速归来。

firestarter.en: His flames are as open as his heart.
firestarter.trans: 他的火焰如同他的心灵一样开放。

murderer.en: I've felled greater monsters than you, %s!
murderer.trans: 我打败了比你更强大的怪兽，%s！

attacker.en: There's a new hunger in %s's eyes.

reviver.trans: %s的精神燃烧之火比太阳神明亮。

generic.en: Blessings upon you, spiderchild %s!

chesspiece_catcoon.en: You have my respect, fellow hunter.
chesspiece_catcoon.trans: 向你献上我的敬意，猎人朋友。

yotd_steeringwheel_item.en: A vital piece of a glorious vessel.
yotd_steeringwheel_item.trans: 光荣的舰艇上的重要组件。

slingshotammo_gold.en: What fun is a battle without hand to hand combat?
slingshotammo_gold.trans: 没有肉搏的战斗，何来乐趣？

active.en: I shall desert this foul place!
active.trans: 我应该放弃这个污秽的地方！

generic.en: A present from the mighty lion!

ratatouille.en: A pile of vegetables. No thanks.

has_item.en: Not the most impressive piece of loot.
has_item.trans: 不是最令人印象深刻的战利品。

generic.en: No sorrier sight than a bare table. Let us plunder!
generic.trans: 没有比光秃秃的桌子更悲伤的景象了。让我们掠夺吧！

flowerhat.en: Flimsy for the fight, enchanting on one's head.
flowerhat.trans: 没有战斗价值，但戴我头上很好看。

standing.en: Keep thy hand from out mine fires!
standing.trans: 把你的手从我的火焰上拿开！

oceanfishingbobber_oval.en: My keen hunter's eyes can detect the smallest nibble!
oceanfishingbobber_oval.trans: 我锐利的猎手之眼能察觉最轻微的咬钩！

carnivalcannon_kit.en: It will be built with utmost speed.
carnivalcannon_kit.trans: 它将以最快的速度建成。

chesspiece_hornucopia.en: Feasts, feasts, everywhere, and not a ham to eat.
chesspiece_hornucopia.trans: 盛宴，到处都是盛宴，但是连一根火腿都没得吃。

hermitcrab.en: Be ye a sea witch? Or just an old crone?
hermitcrab.trans: 你是海巫婆还是丑老太婆呢？

shroomcake.en: A Viking would never stoop to eat such an unworthy thing.
shroomcake.trans: 维京人绝对不会弯腰吃这种东西。

potato_seeds.en: 'Tis a handful of seeds, for not-meat.
potato_seeds.trans: 这一把种子，可以做成非肉类食物。

hermitcrab_relocation_kit.en: The crab shall dwell where I see fit.
hermitcrab_relocation_kit.trans: 此蟹将居于吾认为合适之处。

battlesong_instant_taunt.en: A well aimed insult can turn the tide in battle.
battlesong_instant_taunt.trans: 目标明确的羞辱有时可以扭转战局。

carnivaldecor_lamp.en: It hath a feeling of magic about it.
carnivaldecor_lamp.trans: 感觉它的周围有魔法场。

halloweencandy_12.en: They look like that which writhe and crawl.

halloweencandy_13.en: You shalt not break me, confection!
halloweencandy_13.trans: 你是攻不破我的心防的，糖果！

target_too_far_away.en: They must be too far for him to catch the scent.
target_too_far_away.trans: 他们可能离得太远，他无法捕捉到气味。

success.trans: 荣耀归于你，强大的野兽！

nothing_to_track.en: Seems there's no beasties to be found.

abandoned.en: Curses! We will commence this hunt without your assistance.
abandoned.trans: 也罢！就算你不帮忙，我们也会开始这次狩猎。

nearby.en: Do you sense the presence of a wee beast around here?
nearby.trans: 你有没有感觉到附近有小野兽的存在？

generic.en: A mighty beast worthy of his crown. He will lead us to victory!
generic.trans: 头戴王冠的强大野兽。他将带领我们走向胜利！

burnt.en: It seems someone offered it a flame. I do not think it liked it.
burnt.trans: 似乎有人进贡了火焰，而它似乎不喜欢。

generic.en: Let the festive crafting commence!
generic.trans: 让我们开始喜庆的手工制作吧！

empty.en: Perhaps it would enjoy a feather?

halloweencandy_10.en: I shall uncover its secret center!
halloweencandy_10.trans: 我会解开它内心的秘密！

halloweencandy_11.en: Tis not meat, but tis close enough!

quagmire_pot_syrup.en: For the making of godly nectars!

mask_dollrepairedhat.en: 'Tis cowardly to hide one's face behind a mask!
mask_dollrepairedhat.trans: 把脸藏在面具之下是懦弱的行为！

redmooneye.trans: 奥丁的眼睛，给予我们智慧！

wereitem_beaver.en: Is this meant to summon your fylgja?
wereitem_beaver.trans: 这是用来召唤你的守护灵的吗？

boat_rotator.en: The most nimble vessel is often the victor in battle.
boat_rotator.trans: 最灵活的船只往往能在战斗中胜出。

wrong_tile.en: Why do you despair? Does this land not suit you?
wrong_tile.trans: 你在畏惧什么？这片土地不适合你吗？

wrong_season.en: It may yet grow with the passing of another season.
wrong_season.trans: 再过一个季节，也许它才会生长。

generic.en: These lands seem to suit it well.
generic.trans: 这片土地似乎很适合它。

spear_wathgrithr_lightning.en: The power of Thor courses through it.

ripe.en: I have no need for your fake meat.

generic.en: Meat impostor!

rope.en: Strong enough to bind the sails of my longship.
rope.trans: 够结实了，可以用来绑我的船帆。

wx78module_movespeed2.en: These boons shall empower our metal warrior.
wx78module_movespeed2.trans: 这些恩赐将使我们的金属战士变得更强。

wx78module_light.en: These boons shall empower our metal warrior.
wx78module_light.trans: 这些恩赐将使我们的金属战士变得更强。

hedgehound.en: Deceiver! Thou art a prickly pox upon my stage!
hedgehound.trans: 欺诈者！你是我在舞台上带刺的诅咒！

general.en: Let us feast by the rabbit's torchlight!
general.trans: 让我们在兔子的火炬之光下大吃一顿吧！

general.en: Let us feast by the rabbit's torchlight!
general.trans: 让我们在兔子的火炬之光下大吃一顿吧！

petals_evil.en: These were not made by Froh.

statueharp.en: It must be Gunnar. The snakes took his head.
statueharp.trans: 那肯定是贡纳。蛇拿走了他的脑袋。

fishmeat_dried.en: Provisions fit for a long journey at sea.
fishmeat_dried.trans: 足以支撑漫长航程的口粮。

picked.en: It hath been stripped of its bounty.

diseased.en: The plague hath overwhelmed it completely!

withered.en: It had not the strength to withstand this heat.
withered.trans: 没能经得住热浪的摧残。

generic.en: Hark, be wary! Tis fruit I see.

barren.en: Tis barren as the rainless desert.
barren.trans: 如无雨之沙漠一般贫瘠。

meatysalad.trans: 我的直觉尖叫着让我不要吃这个。

escaped.en: Fie! The sea-meat has evaded us!

caught.en: Njord has bestowed his bounty upon us!
caught.trans: 尼约德将他的恩惠赐予了我们！

lowered.en: May you have a successful hunt.

fixed.en: It is ready to hunt again.

generic.en: A harvester of sea-meat.

lavaarena_armorheavy.en: Tis a worthy suit of armor.

antlionhat.en: A helm to change the very ground I walk upon!
antlionhat.trans: 这个头盔能改变我所踏足的土地！

generic.en: A dragon egg!

picked.en: I hope it doesn't grow again.
picked.trans: 我希望它不会再长出来。

generic.en: It's mold, really.

monkeyisland_portal.en: What strange magic is this? I cannot get through!
monkeyisland_portal.trans: 这是什么奇怪的魔法？我无法通过！

yots_lantern_post_item.en: Prepare thyself, for revelry doth await.
yots_lantern_post_item.trans: 准备好吧，狂欢即将到来！

wx78module_maxhunger1.en: These boons shall empower our metal warrior.
wx78module_maxhunger1.trans: 这些恩赐将使我们的金属战士变得更强。

drying.en: It's being prepared just the way I like it.
drying.trans: 正是我喜欢的制备方式。

done_salt.en: Salt! A gift from the gods to season my meats!
done_salt.trans: 盐！众神恩赐，为吾之肉食调味！

dryinginrain_notmeat.trans: 下雨对这个没什么帮助。

dryinginrain.trans: 下雨对这个没什么帮助。

done_notmeat.en: 'Tis as dry as an empty well!

generic.en: Quite a formidable drying rack!

umbrella.en: Rain protection made from the trophy of a hunt.
umbrella.trans: 用打猎战利品制作的防雨用具。

treeclump.en: A dead end! I must stand and fight.
treeclump.trans: 一条死路！我必须勇敢战斗。

mastupgrade_lamp_item_yotd.en: We shall keep the flame burning bright!
mastupgrade_lamp_item_yotd.trans: 我们要让火焰继续燃烧！

noeyeball.trans: 你在哪里，被诅咒的眼睛？

generic.en: The cold doth sooth me.

trap_teeth_maxwell.en: An excellent mace wasted, buried in the ground.
trap_teeth_maxwell.trans: 浪费了，一根埋在土里的优质狼牙棒。

slurper.en: The fur foe thinks she's a hat!
slurper.trans: 这个全身是毛的家伙以为自己是顶帽子！

saltrock.en: It hath a strange shape to it.

hungry.en: You must eat to grow strong.
hungry.trans: 你必须吃东西才能变得更强壮。

starving.trans: 那小鸟看起来遭了饥荒。

generic.en: You are not fierce yet, bird.

mask_blacksmithhat.en: 'Tis cowardly to hide one's face behind a mask!
mask_blacksmithhat.trans: 把脸藏在面具之下是懦弱的行为！

wx78module_movespeed.en: These boons shall empower our metal warrior.
wx78module_movespeed.trans: 这些恩赐将使我们的金属战士变得更强。

yotd_anchor.en: May it grip the sea floor with all its strength.
yotd_anchor.trans: 愿它用尽全力抓紧海底。

salty_dog.trans: 到我这儿来，我咸涩的盟友！

spear_gungnir.en: The weapon of a brazen Valkyrie!
spear_gungnir.trans: 女武神瓦尔基里的武器！

sandspike.en: The earth itself dares to fight me!

generic.en: A trove of wisdom.

burnt.en: Villainy! Do not let the elder see!
burnt.trans: 恶行啊！万万不要让长者看到！

boat_bumper_yotd_kit.en: It shall shield my vessel from harm.
boat_bumper_yotd_kit.trans: 它能保护我的船不受伤害。

razor.en: A small blade, but a blade nonetheless.

kitcoon_moon.en: A wee beastie imbued with a third eye for finding more hiding spots.
kitcoon_moon.trans: 小野兽被赋予了第三只眼睛，便于找到更多藏身之处。

slingshot_frame_gems.en: The young scout doth come into his own.
slingshot_frame_gems.trans: 年轻的童子军已经开始独当一面了。

pudgy.en: My mouth's watering just looking at it...
pudgy.trans: 只是看着它我的口水就流个不停...

mypartner.en: A proud an noble beast, bonded to a proud and noble warrior.
mypartner.trans: 一头骄傲高贵的野兽，与骄傲高贵的战士建立了情感联系。

ornery.en: The noble steed of a mighty warrior!

dead_mypartner.en: It seems Valhalla will not take my steed just yet.
dead_mypartner.trans: 看来英灵殿还不会夺走我的战骑。

domesticated.en: The critter has finally learned its role.
domesticated.trans: 这生物最后清楚了自己的角色。

naked.en: Are you cold without your wools?
naked.trans: 你没有了毛是不是觉得冷？

rider.en: With the stalwart beast at my side, we ride tonight!
rider.trans: 有健壮的野兽在身边，我们今晚就骑乘出发！

generic.en: Ancient woolen beasts!

sleeping.trans: 听起来像是希尔达姨妈。

quagmire_oven.en: I shall cook things in thee!

generic.en: It requires a token to prove my worthiness.
generic.trans: 它需要一代币来证明我的价值。

coolant.trans: 这是约顿巨人的诅咒之血！

bird_mutant_spitter.en: You think you can challenge me, winged fiend?
bird_mutant_spitter.trans: 你觉得你可以挑战我吗，长翅膀的恶魔？

dustmoth.en: This creature has no fight in it.
dustmoth.trans: 这个生物没有任何战斗力。

blueprint.en: Is the peak's prize worthy of the danger it demands?
blueprint.trans: 巅峰的宝藏是否值得以身犯险？

generic.en: T'would be a disgrace to be slain by a falling pile of refuse...
generic.trans: 被一堆倒下的垃圾砸死，是何等的奇耻大辱……

voltgoatjelly.en: Well, it is technically made from a beast.
voltgoatjelly.trans: 技术上是从野兽身上获得的。

bandage.en: To heal even the deepest of battle wounds.

generic.en: Cute meat lives there.

empty.en: She fought bravely. Alas, she is gone.
empty.trans: 她勇敢地战斗了。不过，她还是去了。

costume_fool_body.en: I have my own costu- that is, warrior's garb!
costume_fool_body.trans: 我有自己的戏——我是说，战士服！

battlesong_sanitygain.en: A stirring battle song to clear the head.
battlesong_sanitygain.trans: 一首激昂的战歌，为战士们理清思路。

tallbird.en: A fearsome bird! But I am not afraid.
tallbird.trans: 吓人的鸟！但我无所畏惧。

wathgrithr_improvedhat.en: The unicorn hath bestowed its power onto me.

vault_lobby_exit.en: I hath no fear in hurling myself headlong into the abyss.

trunk_winter.en: A powerful trunk of a fallen hairy beast.
trunk_winter.trans: 一根结实有力的象鼻，来自被杀死的毛很多的大象。

quagmire_flour.en: The wheat hath fallen in battle.

yotc_carrat_race_start.en: We shall see which vegetable beast prevails!
yotc_carrat_race_start.trans: 拭目以待哪个小菜兽会胜出吧！

battlesong_healthgain.en: I will serenade my enemies on their journey to Valhalla!
battlesong_healthgain.trans: 我会为前往英灵殿的敌人献唱小夜曲！

oceantree_pillar.en: Yon tree shall guard us from the treacherous sun.
oceantree_pillar.trans: 这棵树将保护我们不受奸诈的太阳的伤害。

firestarter.en: %s, why do you break your cherished code?
firestarter.trans: %s,你怎么打破自己经常说的消防安全规则了？

ghost.en: By my honor, I will bring you back to this world!
ghost.trans: 我以我的荣誉起誓，我会把你带回这个世界的！

murderer.en: Have at thee, you and your wicked beast!
murderer.trans: 放马过来吧，你和你那邪恶的野兽！

attacker.en: Consider your actions wisely, %s.

reviver.en: %s carries with him a true sense of honor.

generic.en: Good health to you, %s, and to your loyal beast!
generic.trans: %s，祝你和你忠诚的野兽身体健康！

burnt.en: 'Tis a sad day for the fish beasts.
burnt.trans: 对鱼类猛兽来说这是悲伤的一天。

generic.en: The little beast toils away.

record_creepyforest.en: Music is nourishment for thy soul!

armor_lunarplant.en: Armor crafted from a fallen foe.
armor_lunarplant.trans: 用倒下的敌人做成的盔甲。

unagi.en: No need for food to be so fancy.
unagi.trans: 没必要把食物弄得这么花哨。

waterplant_baby.en: Grow fast and strong, young one.
waterplant_baby.trans: 快快长大，茁壮成长，小家伙。

yotc_carrat_race_finish_item.en: This shall mark the race's end point.

slingshot_frame_bone.en: The young scout doth come into his own.
slingshot_frame_bone.trans: 年轻的童子军已经开始独当一面了。

quagmire_foliage_cooked.en: This is certain to anger the god.

boat_bumper_shell_kit.en: It shall shield my vessel from harm.
boat_bumper_shell_kit.trans: 它能保护我的船不受伤害。

carnivalgame_memory_kit.en: It will be built with utmost speed.
carnivalgame_memory_kit.trans: 它将以最快的速度建成。

slingshotammo_rock.en: What fun is a battle without hand to hand combat?
slingshotammo_rock.trans: 没有肉搏的战斗，何来乐趣？

watermelonhat.en: It's almost like wearing a pelt.
watermelonhat.trans: 几乎就像戴了块皮一样。

slingshot_handle_sticky.en: The young scout doth come into his own.
slingshot_handle_sticky.trans: 年轻的童子军已经开始独当一面了。

generic.en: It's probably a tuft of grass.

monkeytail.en: Art thou plants or monkey parts? Make up thine mind!
monkeytail.trans: 汝是植物还是猴子的器官？想清楚点！

strawhat.en: A hat for cooling after a raucous battle.
strawhat.trans: 喧嚣战斗之后用于冷静的帽子。

generic.en: The beasties must learn to hunt!
generic.trans: 野兽们一定要学会狩猎！

burnt.en: It seems the hunt is over.

generic.en: A sparring partner for the wee beasties.
generic.trans: 可以陪小野兽们日常操练。

burnt.en: Alas, it shall wobble no more.

undrawn.en: Tis blank as the cloudless sky.
undrawn.trans: 它和无云的天空一样空白。

generic.en: The runes hath been drawn!

lavaarena_armorextraheavy.en: I shall not bend to whims of my foes.

pocketwatch_parts.en: Be this the work of dark magic?

burnt.en: I hope the gods did not see that...

generic.en: My offering seems to have pleased the gods.
generic.trans: 我的祭品似乎让神明很满意。

empty.en: It requires a sacrifice.

record_drstyle.en: The musicians play with such passion!
record_drstyle.trans: 音乐家们演奏得如此热情！

skeletonhat.en: Immortal's sight was not meant for thee.
skeletonhat.trans: 你不应该有神明的洞见。

hermitcrab_shell.en: For a swift journey to the sea witch.

mutator_hider.en: They look like the little beasts, but lack the ferocity.
mutator_hider.trans: 它们虽然看起来像小野兽，但却缺少了它们的凶猛。

undrawn.en: I shall paint it with the blood of mine enemies.
undrawn.trans: 我要用敌人的鲜血来染红它。

generic.en: The work of a child, no doubt.
generic.trans: 毫无疑问，这是小孩做出来的。

firestarter.en: That metal warrior would see this world burn.
firestarter.trans: 金属战士会眼睁睁看着这个世界烧毁掉。

ghost.en: Metal warrior, it is not your time. A heart!
ghost.trans: 金属战士，你命不该绝。一颗心！

murderer.en: We shall see whose steel is stronger, %s!
murderer.trans: %s，我们应该看看谁的武器更强！

attacker.en: %s! You insult my honor!

generic.en: May Thor's bolts energize you, %s!
generic.trans: %s，希望索尔的闪电能带给你能量！

moon_altar_cosmic.en: It is grateful, but my work is not yet done.
moon_altar_cosmic.trans: 优雅动人，但是我还有工作要做。

eyeturret.en: The eye of the laser god stares into my soul.
eyeturret.trans: 激光神的眼睛凝视着我灵魂。

held.en: I'll direct this light where I please.
held.trans: 我会把光线导到我喜欢的地方。

generic.en: At peace, benevolent flame spirit.

formal_blueprint.en: My fearsome steed has no use for such a thing!
formal_blueprint.trans: 这种东西对我那令人敬畏的坐骑毫无用处！

glass.en: Oh no! The giant is trapped!

bombed.en: 'Tis imbued with the power of the moon!

generic.en: Perhaps a fire giant slumbers beneath!
generic.trans: 也许下面有一个火焰巨人在酣睡。

empty.en: Odd, I do not see the fire giant...

sewing_tape.en: Luckily I need be no seamstress with this!
sewing_tape.trans: 幸好，我不需要使用这个变成女裁缝！

dragonboat_pack.en: It posesses all that a mighty vessel might require.
dragonboat_pack.trans: 所有强大舰船所需要的它全部具备。

fence_gate.en: A tiny replica of Valhalla's gates.
fence_gate.trans: 英灵殿大门的小小复制品。

hermit_bundle.trans: 我们的辛劳得到了回馈！

playbill_the_princess_yoth.en: An epic tale of noble creatures.
playbill_the_princess_yoth.trans: 一篇记载了高贵生物的史诗。

mutator_moon.en: They look like the little beasts, but lack the ferocity.
mutator_moon.trans: 它们虽然看起来像小野兽，但却缺少了它们的凶猛。

ice_blueprint.en: My beast will not fear the cold.

spider_healer.en: Be you the healer of your clan?
spider_healer.trans: 你就是你们部落的治愈者吗？

friendlyfruitfly.en: It seems this one is not an enemy.

statue.en: Tis a terrible wolf, turned to stone.
statue.trans: 这是一头变成石头的恶狼。

generic.en: I shall fell you swiftly!

sleeping.en: It is cowardly to attack a sleeping enemy.
sleeping.trans: 攻击睡着的敌人是一种懦弱的行为。

generic.en: The champion of the spiders. To battle!

potato_cooked.en: It is of no use to me.

boat_item.en: Ship building is in my bones!
boat_item.trans: 造船之法铭刻在我的骨头里。

generic.en: To the victor go the spoils!

moon_altar_rock_idol.en: The gods call me to it, I shall not resist.
moon_altar_rock_idol.trans: 诸神召唤我于此，我不会忤逆。

generic.en: An eternal light shines from within!
generic.trans: 从里面照出一道永恒之光！

nolight.en: But a crack in the earth.
nolight.trans: 不过是地上的一道裂缝。

generic.en: Spice for the fanciest of foods.
generic.trans: 用来制作美味食物的香料。

high.en: Its belly is alight with fearsome dragonfire.
high.trans: 它的肚子被可怕的龙火照亮了。

generic.en: It retains the heat of the fallen beast.
generic.trans: 它保存着倒下了的野兽的温度。

marbletree.en: Even the winds cannot knock this tree down.
marbletree.trans: 再大的风也吹不倒这棵树。

quagmire_park_fountain.en: Water of life! But no water!

waterplant_planter.en: Fear not, I shall return you to the sea in time.
waterplant_planter.trans: 不要怕，我会及时把你送回大海。

sketch.en: The muses' knowledge, inscribed upon an ancient scroll!
sketch.trans: 缪斯的知识，铭刻于古老的卷轴上！

watermelon_cooked.en: Warm and red, but it doesn't flow.
watermelon_cooked.trans: 热的，红色的，但不会流动。

carnivaldecor_eggride.en: How cruel to be tormented by the sight of eggs I cannot eat!
carnivaldecor_eggride.trans: 我眼睁睁看着这些蛋却不能吃，多么残酷的折磨啊！

mutator_healer.en: They look like the little beasts, but lack the ferocity.
mutator_healer.trans: 它们虽然看起来像小野兽，但却缺少了它们的凶猛。

carnivalgame_puckdrop_kit.en: It will be built with utmost speed.
carnivalgame_puckdrop_kit.trans: 它将以最快的速度建成。

healingsalve_acid.trans: 这团黏糊的东西着实慰藉了我。

record_danger.en: Let us play a rousing war song!
record_danger.trans: 奏响一曲振奋人心的战歌吧！

quagmire_goatkid.en: Ah, the sweet innocence of youth.

drying.en: It's being prepared just the way I like it.
drying.trans: 正是我喜欢的制备方式。

dryinginrain.trans: 下雨对这个没什么帮助。

dryinginrain_notmeat.trans: 下雨对这个没什么帮助。

done_notmeat.en: 'Tis as dry as an empty well!

generic.en: I'd be cantankerous too if I were left without meat!
generic.trans: 如果不给我吃肉，我也会发火。

handpillow_steelwool.en: Only the strong-willed could sleep on such a thing.
handpillow_steelwool.trans: 只有意志坚强的人才能睡在这种东西上。

lunarfrog.en: This frog hath seen too much.
lunarfrog.trans: 这只青蛙看到得太多了。

yoth_knighthat.en: The helm of a dauntless stallion.

nonslipgrit.en: With this, my grip shan't falter!
nonslipgrit.trans: 有此在手，吾之握持必不松懈！

slingshot_handle_silk.en: The young scout doth come into his own.
slingshot_handle_silk.trans: 年轻的童子军已经开始独当一面了。

chesspiece_crabking.en: 'Twas a hard-fought battle, but we prevailed!
chesspiece_crabking.trans: 战况十分激烈，但是我们胜出了！

kitcoon_yot.en: A wee beastie with an excellent costume.
kitcoon_yot.trans: 服装特别出彩的小野兽。

sculpture_bishophead.trans: 也许是密米尔的跟随者？

boat_rotator_kit.en: It shall be done, with haste!

monkeyqueen.en: Her eyes are cunning, she should not be underestimated.
monkeyqueen.trans: 她的眼神十分狡猾，万万不可轻敌。

quagmire_coin4.en: I have earned the god's favor!

brokenhorn_follower.en: You are still a great warrior!
brokenhorn_follower.trans: 你依然是一名伟大的勇士！

follower.en: Tis a fair and noble beast!

generic.en: Draw your weapon and fight me, beastie!
generic.trans: 抽出你的武器，跟我战斗吧，猛兽！

fem_puppet.en: She looks unhappy upon her throne.
fem_puppet.trans: 她在王座上一副不开心的样子。

unwritten.en: I shall point the way to triumph!
unwritten.trans: 我得指明一条胜利之路！

generic.en: A most well placed sign.

flowersalad.en: Leaves are for animals. Animals are for eating.
flowersalad.trans: 叶子是用来喂动物的。动物是用来吃的。

knight.en: I taste a battle on the breeze!
knight.trans: 我体验了一把微风的战斗！

turf_road.en: The road to battle leads wherever we will it.
turf_road.trans: 战斗之路引领我们到任何地方。

mast_item.en: To harness the winds upon mine vessel!

yotc_carrat_scale_item.en: It's time to put my veggie beast to the test.
yotc_carrat_scale_item.trans: 是时候检验一下我的小菜兽了。

record_main.en: Music is nourishment for thy soul!

barnacle.en: 'Tis a paltry bit of sea meat.
barnacle.trans: 这只是一点微不足道的海肉。

staffcoldlight.en: Frigid as a frost giant's heart.
staffcoldlight.trans: 和冰霜巨人的心一样僵硬。

lureplant.trans: 终于！找到了一棵有用的蔬菜。

polishcookie.en: My nose shall not be deceived, these are surely meat!
polishcookie.trans: 我的鼻子错不了，这些必定是肉！

megaflare.en: I fear no enemy. Let them come!
megaflare.trans: 吾不惧强敌。放马过来吧！

pocketwatch_portal_exit.en: Be it up so high to test our landing prowess?
pocketwatch_portal_exit.trans: 升这么高难道是为了测试我们的着陆能力？

mask_mirrorhat.en: 'Tis cowardly to hide one's face behind a mask!
mask_mirrorhat.trans: 把脸藏在面具之下是懦弱的行为！

merm_tool.en: I suppose 'tis better than using one's hands.

footballhat.en: A pig's bottom made this helmet.

has_item_light.en: Ha! The machine does not even deem it worthy enough to reveal its weight!
has_item_light.trans: 哈！连机器都觉得它们不配让它显示重量！

generic.en: Vile veggies! Bring out the best among you to be judged!
generic.trans: 卑鄙的蔬菜! 让你们中的佼佼者出来接受审判!

quagmire_trader_merm2.trans: 这是个活泼的带帽怪物。

tillweedsalve.en: Hmm, it doth appear that foul weed has a use after all.
tillweedsalve.trans: 嗯，看来那些肮脏的杂草还是有用处的。

archive_orchestrina_main.en: What if I just stab it?

hermitcrabtea_petals.trans: 它能让战士的神经镇定下来。

watertree_pillar.en: By the gods, have I found Yggdrasil itself?
watertree_pillar.trans: 诸神啊，我是不是找到了世界树的本尊了？

generic.en: Ah! The sea hath sent its foul veggies!

shovel.en: I'd prefer a ship burial, though this might have its uses.
shovel.trans: 虽然我更喜欢船葬，但它可能有别的用处。

multiplayer_portal_moonrock.en: It hath a glow about it.

chesspiece_manrabbit.en: Their weapons were strange, but they possessed a warrior's spirit.
chesspiece_manrabbit.trans: 虽然他们的武器很奇怪，但他们具备战士的精神。

trailmix.en: Meat of the nut is not true meat.

pomegranate_oversized.en: Its great size impresses me naught.
pomegranate_oversized.trans: 它的巨大尺寸一点都没有让我感到震撼。

carnivaldecor_eggride_kit.en: It shall be done at once.

brush.trans: 整理头发和化妆的时间！

houndstooth_blowpipe.en: A beautiful ranged weapon. Fit for a coward.
houndstooth_blowpipe.trans: 漂亮的远程武器。懦夫的绝配。

sentryward.en: May the secrets of this land be divulged by the gods.
sentryward.trans: 希望这片土地的秘密会被诸神所泄露。

short.en: It will soon wake to this world.
short.trans: 很快它就要看到这个世界。

cold.en: This egg would not survive a Norse winter.
cold.trans: 这个蛋在挪威的冬天可活不了。

hot.en: Borne of flame! Unless it cooks to death.
hot.trans: 自火焰中诞生吧！就是别烤死了。

long.en: A time remains before this bird is to be born.
long.trans: 离这只鸟诞生还有一段时间。

generic.en: Fight your way out, bird!

spoiled_food.en: Age has only made this food gross, not wise.
spoiled_food.trans: 时间只是让这食物变得恶心，而不是更有智慧。

burning.en: It shall not rise from these ashes.
burning.trans: 汝必于灰烬中泯灭，不得重生。

generic.en: A bad omen.

critter_puppy.en: I shall defend this hound to the death.
critter_puppy.trans: 我至死都会保护这条猎犬。

generic.en: Reinforcements hath arrived! To battle!

skeleton_notplayer.en: Didst thou fall in battle, beast?

quagmire_salt.en: Twill make the meat even more divine.

chesspiece_moon.en: Offered in honor of our beauteous moon!

wendy_resurrectiongrave.en: A warrior doth run toward death, not from it!
wendy_resurrectiongrave.trans: 战士应该冲向死亡，而非逃离死亡！

pepper.trans: 光是这个样子就惹到我了。

farm_plow.en: I claim this soil for the garden!
farm_plow.trans: 这块地就是我的花园了！

quagmire_onion_cooked.en: The gods shall deal with thee!

slingshotammo_moonglass.en: What fun is a battle without hand to hand combat?
slingshotammo_moonglass.trans: 没有肉搏的战斗，何来乐趣？

tillweed.en: Remove yourself from my sight, cowardly weed!
tillweed.trans: 从我的视线中消失，懦弱的杂草！

walking_stick.en: Carved with a fine blade, by a skilled hand.
walking_stick.trans: 由熟练的工匠用优良的刀锋雕刻而成。

polly_rogers.en: She is a small, but stalwart ally.
polly_rogers.trans: 她个头虽小，但却是一名坚韧不拔的盟友。

construction1.en: I know not its purpose. A tribute to Mani, perhaps?
construction1.trans: 我摸不清它的目的。也许为了供奉玛尼？

construction2.en: The more I build, the stranger it appears.
construction2.trans: 我越是建造，它越是显得离奇。

generic.en: Mere mortals were not meant to tamper so with the power of the gods...
generic.trans: 小小凡人怎敢如此亵渎神的力量……

generic.en: It calls down a sign from Mani himself!
generic.trans: 它召唤了玛尼本人的神迹!

batnosehat.en: A warrior would never deign to wear such a thing!
batnosehat.trans: 勇士绝不会戴这样的东西！

saddle_race.en: Oh to fly on the wings of Valkyrie!
saddle_race.trans: 噢，飞到女武神瓦尔基里的翅膀上！

trident.en: I shall lay waste to my enemies with the weapon of Poseidon!
trident.trans: 就让我用这把波塞冬的武器荡平敌军吧！

pumpkincookie.en: Baked all the life out of it.
pumpkincookie.trans: 所有的生命精华都被烤出来了。

walkingplank_ancient.en: I shall never abandon my vessel!

moonrockcrater.en: Mani's gift may have some use yet!
moonrockcrater.trans: 玛尼的礼物可能还有些用处！

malbatross.en: I will slay the four-winged beast!

book_gardening.en: But can it tend the garden of mine soul?
book_gardening.trans: 但是它能好好照看我的心灵花园吗？

burning.en: Blaze brightly, for all to see.

generic.en: Its soul hath departed to the realm of the dead.

gingerbreadhouse.en: Neither a house nor a meal I will enjoy.
gingerbreadhouse.trans: 不管是用来住还是用来吃，我都不喜欢。

barnaclestuffedfishhead.en: For those who are strong of will, and strong of stomach.
barnaclestuffedfishhead.trans: 专为那些意志坚强，胃口大的人准备的。

merm_toolshed.en: 'Tis a place for workers, not warriors.
merm_toolshed.trans: 那是工人待的地方，不适合战士。

spice_garlic.en: Its pungent smell offends mine nostrils.

shadow_forge_kit.en: Dare I toy with such a thing?

generic.en: Tis a direct line to Mani himself!
generic.trans: 直达玛尼本人的月神热线！

moon_altar_wip.en: You shall soon be complete once more.
moon_altar_wip.trans: 你马上就能再次完整了。

generic.en: Tis the mighty lion!

monkeypillar.en: These trees did not grow from the earth.
monkeypillar.trans: 这些树不是从地里长出来的。

yotb_pattern_fragment_1.en: 'Tis but a fragment of a complete pattern.
yotb_pattern_fragment_1.trans: 不过是一个完整款式的碎片。

yotb_pattern_fragment_2.en: 'Tis but a fragment of a complete pattern.
yotb_pattern_fragment_2.trans: 不过是一个完整款式的碎片。

lavaarena_strongdamagerhat.en: Empower me with thy Nox strength!
lavaarena_strongdamagerhat.trans: 赐予我司夜女神的力量吧！

yotb_pattern_fragment_3.en: 'Tis but a fragment of a complete pattern.
yotb_pattern_fragment_3.trans: 不过是一个完整款式的碎片。

wx78_moduleremover.en: I trust my ally knows what they are doing.
wx78_moduleremover.trans: 我相信我的盟友知道自己在做什么。

weed_ivy.en: This weed is armed with thorns.
weed_ivy.trans: 这株野草用荆棘武装了自己。

inactive.en: I suspect nothing of this rock.
inactive.trans: 这块石头没什么可疑的。

handpillow_kelp.trans: 这是一个来自尼约德领地的枕头。

trap.en: A well constructed trap. Tonight we feast!
trap.trans: 好一个精心设计的圈套。今晚我们吃大餐！

ruinshat.trans: 一顶皇冠，对战斗很有帮助！

mosquitobomb.en: There is little honor in using such a weapon, yet I am intrigued.
mosquitobomb.trans: 尽管这样的武器并不光彩，但我仍然很感兴趣。

generic.en: What magic is this?

acidcovered.en: The smell fills me with loathing.
acidcovered.trans: 这种气味让我满是厌恶。

generic.en: A flame to banish the shadows!

nightlight.en: I'm more comfortable around my own fire.
nightlight.trans: 还是在我自己的火旁更自在一些。

yotb.en: Mayhaps the judge would like to look upon it.
yotb.trans: 也许应该让评委过目一下。

generic.en: A stuffed effigy of a valiant steed!

slingshotammo_gelblob.en: What fun is a battle without hand to hand combat?
slingshotammo_gelblob.trans: 没有肉搏的战斗，何来乐趣？

deck_of_cards.en: Dost these cards bear a fell curse?
deck_of_cards.trans: 这沓牌是否带着可怕的诅咒？

moonrock_pieces.trans: 它已经面对了玛尼的暴怒。

featherhat.en: Seems a bit flashy for battle.
featherhat.trans: 对战斗来说似乎有点花哨。

atrium_key.trans: 海姆达尔的彩虹桥钥匙。

balloonvest.en: Tis only good for floating, not fighting.
balloonvest.trans: 它只适合漂浮，不适合战斗。

line_1.en: Tis a portrait of an ancient people. They live in wretchedness.
line_1.trans: 这是古代人的绘像。他们生活悲惨。

line_2.en: There is no painting here. Only stone.
line_2.trans: 这里没有绘画。只有石头。

line_5.en: A glittering city, blessed by the gods.
line_5.trans: 一座受诸神庇护的闪耀城市。

line_3.en: A great evil sweeps across the land.
line_3.trans: 一个大恶魔席卷了这片土地。

line_4.en: Many of the people are cleaved in two!

destabilizing.en: Trickery! The Bifrost was of Loki!

cooldown.en: It shan't work again for some time.
cooldown.trans: 一段时间里没法再用了。

charging.en: Soon it will open the path!
charging.trans: 很快它就会打开这条路！

on.en: A light to guide the way!

generic.en: It doth shine with the radiance of Baldur.
generic.trans: 它闪耀着巴德尔的光辉。

asparagus_cooked.en: Fire does not make it more palatable.
asparagus_cooked.trans: 火焰并没有让你变得好吃！

generic.en: Wood is always of value.
This bird knows about the cold.

spider_repellent.en: The spiderchild uses it to manage his horde.
spider_repellent.trans: 那个蛛孩用它来管理他的部落。

chesspiece_bearger_mutated.en: May the beast now be at peace.

carnival_vest_b.en: 'Tis not unlike the garb of a forest nymph.
carnival_vest_b.trans: 这与林间仙子的服装并无二致。

merm_lunar.en: The fish beast is tinged with the essence of Mani.
merm_lunar.trans: 鱼类猛兽身上有玛尼的精华。

emberlight.en: My ally's flame burns bright as her fighting spirit.
emberlight.trans: 盟友的火焰和她的斗志一样熊熊燃烧。

growing.en: Formed as if by Odin's hand!

generic.en: Tis the form of a sea nymph!

book_bees.en: Our elder has been watching the wee speared creatures closely.
book_bees.trans: 我们的长者一直在密切注视着这些持矛的小生物。

chopped.en: Chopped by the warrior of the woods!
chopped.trans: 被森林中的勇士所砍倒！

generic.en: A good sturdy tree.

revealed.en: The pelt-bearer cometh to ply his wares.

generic.en: Wretched beast. Shall I grant it peace?
generic.trans: 凄惨的野兽。要我赐予它安息吗？

mask_halfwithat.en: Only a craven hides their face.

quagmire_turnip_seeds.en: 'Tis a handful of seeds, for not-meat.
quagmire_turnip_seeds.trans: 这一把种子，可以做成非肉类食物。

gazpacho.en: My mind doth question Warly's allegiances.
gazpacho.trans: 我一直在质疑沃利的忠诚。

archive_lockbox.en: Will you whisper truths to me, as Mímir did to Odin?
archive_lockbox.trans: 你能悄悄告诉我事实真相么, 就像密米尔对奥丁那样？

carnival_vest_a.en: Blood red, to strike fear into the hearts of our enemies!
carnival_vest_a.trans: 血红色，让我们的敌人心生恐惧！

firestarter.en: Monkey trickery!

ghost.en: It seems you have not fared well, beastie.
ghost.trans: 看来你过得并不好，小动物。

murderer.en: Foul beast! The hunt is on!
murderer.trans: 凶猛的野兽！狩猎要开始了！

attacker.en: Thou hast revealed thine true nature, beast!
attacker.trans: 你总算漏出了真面目，野兽！

reviver.en: Thou art a most noble creature.

generic.en: Hail, monkey!

wx78module_maxhealth.en: These boons shall empower our metal warrior.
wx78module_maxhealth.trans: 这些恩赐将使我们的金属战士变得更强。

generic.en: Your liege.

mask_queenhat.en: 'Tis cowardly to hide one's face behind a mask!
mask_queenhat.trans: 把脸藏在面具之下是懦弱的行为！

ancientfruit_nightvision_cooked.en: The loathesome berry hath ceased its wriggling.
ancientfruit_nightvision_cooked.trans: 令人憎恶的浆果停止了蠕动。

inspectself.en: Who is that incredible warrior in the mirror?
inspectself.trans: 镜中潇洒的勇士是谁呢？

book_brimstone.en: This tome is brimming with Hel's fire!

klaus.en: I shall free thy deer this day!

fused_shadeling.en: 'Tis naught but a pest to be crushed beneath my boot!
fused_shadeling.trans: 看我的战靴怎么踩碎这只小小的害虫！

glassed.en: By the gods! The water hath turned to solid glass!
glassed.trans: 诸神啊！水已经变成了固体玻璃！

cave.trans: 在这里玛尼看不见我们。

night_new.en: Mani's retired to his realm for the eve.
night_new.trans: 玛尼退回到了傍晚的王国。

night_wane.en: Mani's power is on the wane.
night_wane.trans: 玛尼的力量正在逐渐衰弱。

generic.en: Mani's visage remains, even in the light of day.
generic.trans: 即使是在日光之下，玛尼的模样也不变。

archive_security_pulse.en: Where are you going, O will-o'-wisp?

done.en: Its task has come to an end.

generic.en: A formidable weapon against bad meals.
generic.trans: 对付难吃的菜的有力武器。

thulecite.trans: 这种材料蕴含着巨大的力量！

driftwood_log.en: 'Tis wood, forged in the sea's depths!
driftwood_log.trans: 这是木头，锻造于大海的深处！

quagmire_rubble_carriage.trans: 它是很久以前掠夺来的。

generic.en: A shrub on guard.

quagmire_grill_small.en: It touches meat with the fires of Hel.

infused.en: It hath been imbued with a strange power.
infused.trans: 它被赋予了一种不同寻常的力量。

generic.en: The power hath faded from it.
generic.trans: 那股力量已经从它身上褪去。

dug_sapling.en: I should like to see that returned to the earth goddess.

generic.en: Sleep this night, and prepare for battle on the morrow.
generic.trans: 今晚好好睡，为明天的战斗做好准备。

boat_grass_item.en: 'Tis a piteous ship, but I shall make do.
boat_grass_item.trans: 这是条可怜的船，但我将物尽其用。

moonglassaxe.en: Spirits of the woods stand no chance against me.
moonglassaxe.trans: 森林之魂无法反抗我了。

bodypillow_petals.en: As good a use as any for flimsy petals.
bodypillow_petals.trans: 不堪一击的花瓣也就这点用了。

giftwrap.en: I must show my allies how much they are valued!
giftwrap.trans: 我要让盟友们感到受重视！

pocket_scale.en: How did I fare with my catch?

carnivaldecor_plant_kit.en: It shall be done at once.

moon_cap_cooked.en: Such a thing will never pass my lips!
moon_cap_cooked.trans: 这种的东西绝不能通过我的嘴唇！

slingshot_frame_wagpunk_0.en: The young scout doth come into his own.
slingshot_frame_wagpunk_0.trans: 年轻的童子军已经开始独当一面了。

barnacle_cooked.en: You will find a new home in my belly.
barnacle_cooked.trans: 你会在我的肚子里找到一个新家。

dreadstone_stack.en: It hails from a place deeper and darker than even here.
dreadstone_stack.trans: 它来自比这里更深更暗的地方。

quagmire_sapling.en: 'Twill never again grow to its former glory.
quagmire_sapling.trans: 它再也不会恢复昔日的荣耀。

klaus_sack.en: A secret, kept under lock and key!
klaus_sack.trans: 一个藏在岩石和钥匙下的秘密！

picked.en: A young bird of war will soon be born.

generic.en: A feathered warrior lurks inside.
generic.trans: 里面潜伏着长羽毛的战士。

eyemaskhat.en: Follower of Heimdall, watch over my path!
eyemaskhat.trans: 海姆达尔的追随者，请守护我的征途！

wx78module_bee.en: These boons shall empower our metal warrior.
wx78module_bee.trans: 这些恩赐将使我们的金属战士变得更强。

foliage_dried.en: T'would make a most worthy offering to the gods!
foliage_dried.trans: 堪为敬奉诸神的顶级供品！

quagmire_syrup.en: Nectar of the gods, for the gods.

meat.en: The true fruit of the earth!

locked.en: Tis sealed away from prying eyes and prying hands.
locked.trans: 它被封存起来，防止人们窥视和盗抢。

generic.en: 'Twas left by cities past.
generic.trans: 这是过去的城市留下来的。

rock_petrified_tree_old.en: My mere presence struck terror into their tree-hearts!
rock_petrified_tree_old.trans: 我一出现就让这些树胆战心惊！

chopped.en: Thank you for your bounty, tree.

generic.en: A rare beauty to be sure, but tis no Yggdrasil.
generic.trans: 尽管罕见秀丽，但它并不是世界树。

mask_dollbrokenhat.en: 'Tis cowardly to hide one's face behind a mask!
mask_dollbrokenhat.trans: 把脸藏在面具之下是懦弱的行为！

yots_worm.en: I shall send thee back to the depths, worm!
yots_worm.trans: 我会把你送回深渊的，蠕虫！

desiccantboosted.en: My allies spoke true... sample not from the wicked salt bag!
desiccantboosted.trans: 盟友所言不虚……万万不可尝这邪恶盐囊之物！

staff_lunarplant.en: To attack from afar is not my preferred way of combat.
staff_lunarplant.trans: 从远处攻击并不是我喜欢的战斗方式。

firestarter.en: %s's flames could temper steel.

ghost.en: %s hath fallen! A heart!
ghost.trans: %s倒下了！一颗心！

murderer.en: I shall unleash Ragnarok upon thee!
murderer.trans: 我要让诸神黄昏降临于你们头顶！

attacker.en: Dost thou test me, %s?

generic.en: Greetings, brave %s!

record.en: T'would be a kindness to keep it from reaching the ears of my ally.
record.trans: 行善举，别让它传到我盟友的耳朵里。

sharkboi.en: Whether land or sea, a shallow grave waits for thee.
sharkboi.trans: 无论是陆地还是大海，等着你都是一座矮坟。

fossil_piece.en: Bones of a dark and ancient foe.

werepig.en: It has been tainted by Fenrir.

generic.en: Will you fight alongside me, pig?
generic.trans: 你会和我并肩作战吗，猪兄？

off.en: I demand strong, passionate colors. Red!
off.trans: 我要求强烈热情的颜色。红色！

generic.en: What cryptic ruins.

shroombait.en: What coward wouldst sedate a beast?
shroombait.trans: 什么样的懦夫才会给野兽喂镇静剂？

scrap_monoclehat.en: An enchanted eye, to view the whole battlefield at once.
scrap_monoclehat.trans: 一只附了魔的眼睛，一眼就能遍览整个战场。

generic.en: Tis a tribute to Freya's beauty.
generic.trans: 这是一份献给芙蕾雅的美丽的礼物。

burnt.en: It was no challenge at all.

empty.en: There is no beast beneath.

beequeenhivegrown.trans: 蜂巢里都是挥着翅膀的勇士。

supertacklecontainer.en: A bounty of space for my bait!

boat_bumper_kelp_kit.en: It shall shield my vessel from harm.
boat_bumper_kelp_kit.trans: 它能保护我的船不受伤害。

beargerfur_sack.en: It will preserve the freshness of my kills.
beargerfur_sack.trans: 它将保持我杀戮物的新鲜度。

shadowthrall_parasite.trans: 别过来，你的拥抱被诅咒了。

papyrus.en: May it carry forth the record of my saga.
papyrus.trans: 但愿它将我的事迹传颂。

chesspiece_dragonfly.en: Tis the trophy of glorious battle!
chesspiece_dragonfly.trans: 这是光荣战争的战利品！

moon_altar_idol.en: Make thy will known to me, idol!
moon_altar_idol.trans: 神像啊，倾诉你的意志吧！

spicepack.en: I'll use this to carry delicious meats!
spicepack.trans: 我拿这个来装美味的肉类！

fused_shadeling_bomb.trans: 虽然个头小，但是很生猛！

mask_kinghat.en: 'Tis cowardly to hide one's face behind a mask!
mask_kinghat.trans: 把脸藏在面具之下是懦弱的行为！

dug_trap_starfish.en: A most wicked trap I could set for my foes.
dug_trap_starfish.trans: 能为对手设下的最恶毒的陷阱。

quagmire_tomato_cooked.en: It boasts reddest guts, yet 'tis not meat!
quagmire_tomato_cooked.trans: 它的内部红通通的，却不是肉！

crabking_mob_knight.en: Finally. A clawed combatant worthy to die by my spear.
crabking_mob_knight.trans: 终于来了。利爪战士，值得死在我的长矛之下。

deflated.trans: 它奇异的力量已经消失了。

generic.en: Grant me the speed of Hermod!
generic.trans: 赐予我赫尔莫德的速度！

lots_of_kelp.en: 'Tis enough to gorge themselves to the gills!
lots_of_kelp.trans: 足够它们把鳃帮子都吃撑了！

generic.en: The fish beasts hunger for that vile weed of the sea.
generic.trans: 鱼类猛兽渴求海中的可恶杂草。

lavae_cocoon.en: The best allies are made in the heat of battle.
lavae_cocoon.trans: 激烈的战斗带来最棒的盟友。

froglegs_cooked.en: I like when I can see the bones sticking out.
froglegs_cooked.trans: 我喜欢看到骨头从肉里穿出来。

dug_berrybush_juicy.en: I should like to see that returned to the earth goddess.

diseasing.en: It is weakening before mine eyes!
diseasing.trans: 我眼睁睁的看着它凋零。

picked.en: I eagerly await the next harvest.
picked.trans: 我热切期待着下一次的丰收。

diseased.trans: 疾病在它的灵魂里繁殖。

withered.en: The heat has defeated this plant.

generic.en: That could be useful.

barren.en: The life has gone from it.

carnival_plaza_kit.en: Perhaps it will grow as tall as Yggdrasil.
carnival_plaza_kit.trans: 也许有天它能长得像世界树一样高耸。

barnaclinguine.trans: 它酣畅淋漓地杀死了我的饥饿感！

wurt_swampitem_lunar.en: The small beastie seems keen to expand her kingdom.
wurt_swampitem_lunar.trans: 这只小野兽似乎很想扩大自己的王国。

generic.en: Hel's influence has corrupted thee, no doubt!
Watering the garden is not a task befitting a warrior.
generic.trans: 浇灌花园并不是适合勇士的任务。

empty.en: The plants expect me to fetch water for them as well?
empty.trans: 植物们还指望我给它们担水？

boatrace_seastack.en: Ha! A Viking can maneuver her ship as easily as breathing!
boatrace_seastack.trans: 哈！维京人操作起船来就像呼吸一样轻松！

generic.en: Bring with you lightning, Donner!

flipped.en: Overthrown, yet the beast's fury remaineth!
flipped.trans: 虽已倾覆，然该兽之怒依旧！

body.en: The beast be clad in formidable armor.

mutator_dropper.en: They look like the little beasts, but lack the ferocity.
mutator_dropper.trans: 它们虽然看起来像小野兽，但却缺少了它们的凶猛。

dustmothden.en: Sorry beasties, but your home is ripe for the pillaging!
dustmothden.trans: 抱歉了，小野兽们，你的家要被我洗劫一空了！

winterhat.en: Warm, but not suited for combat.

security_pulse_cage_full.en: It burns bright like the sword of Surtr.
security_pulse_cage_full.trans: 像苏尔特尔之剑一样明亮地燃烧着。

vegstinger.trans: 这么辣，一点都不吸引我！

penguin.en: Birds of the sea, come from afar.

rainhat.en: We will fight in the rain.

burning.en: Thou art worthy of a Viking funeral.
burning.trans: 你配得上维京人的葬礼。

reviving.en: The beast's spirit will not be put to rest!

generic.en: The creature is slain.

smallmeat_dried.en: A small provision for a long campaign.
smallmeat_dried.trans: 漫长战役中的零星伙食。

kitcoon_forest.en: A wee beastie that's particularly excellent at hiding.
kitcoon_forest.trans: 一种特别善于隐藏的小野兽。

boatrace_seastack_monkey_throwable_deplo.en: I must cast it into the sea!

boarrior.en: You shall be a worthy opponent!
boarrior.trans: 你应该是个有分量的敌人！

flower_withered.en: Not enough time in the limelight.
flower_withered.trans: 来不及好好绽放就蔫了。

burnt.en: The stuffed man hath met a fiery end.
burnt.trans: 那个填充而成的人被烧干了。

generic.en: It shall make for some fine target practice.
generic.trans: 它拿来当靶子应该不错。

lowpower.en: T'will not hold out much longer!

generic.en: The tinkerer hath many tricks.

off.en: It hath lost its incredible power!
off.trans: 它已经失去了惊人的能量！

generic.en: What flaxen scales.
What infernal creature doth mine eyes see!
generic.trans: 我的双眼看到了烈狱的生物！

shieldofterror.en: Why cower behind a shield when you can strike with it!
shieldofterror.trans: 既然能用盾牌攻击，为什么要畏缩在盾牌后面呢？

wx78module_cold.en: These boons shall empower our metal warrior.
wx78module_cold.trans: 这些恩赐将使我们的金属战士变得更强。

sandblock.trans: 这是一座沙子堆起的城堡！

stash_map.en: We journey to find the hidden plunder!
stash_map.trans: 我们要去寻找隐藏的掠夺物！

line_1.en: These runes are foreign to me.
line_1.trans: 这些符文对我来说是陌生的。

line_2.en: Perhaps they speak of ancient battles.
line_2.trans: 也许他们记录了上古的战斗。

line_5.en: These runes are foreign to me.
line_5.trans: 这些符文对我来说是陌生的。

line_3.en: These runes are foreign to me.
line_3.trans: 这些符文对我来说是陌生的。

line_4.en: Perhaps they speak of ancient battles.
line_4.trans: 也许他们记录了上古的战斗。

fishingnet.en: I shall feed all my allies for a day!
fishingnet.trans: 能让所有盟友饱餐一天！

pig_coin.en: The king of pigs hath granted me this favor.
pig_coin.trans: 猪王赠与了我这个人情。

generic.en: It irks me to honor a vegetable.

empty.en: What dost thou need?

eyebrellahat.en: Don't get rain in your eye!
eyebrellahat.trans: 别让雨水进入你的眼睛！

playing_hideandseek.en: The wee beasties are out, let us find them!
playing_hideandseek.trans: 小野兽们都跑了，我们去找它们吧！

playing_hideandseek_time_almost_up.en: We must bring them home quickly!
playing_hideandseek_time_almost_up.trans: 我们必须迅速带它们回家。

burnt.en: Not great as a hideaway now.
burnt.trans: 这下少了一个藏身之所。

generic.en: A penthouse for wee beasties.

oceanfishableflotsam.en: Tis naught but a clump of mud and grass!

knight_nightmare.en: I don't think I'd ride that horse.

bunnystew.en: A hearty meal worthy of praise!

quagmire_garlic_seeds.en: 'Tis a handful of seeds, for not-meat.
quagmire_garlic_seeds.trans: 这一把种子，可以做成非肉类食物。

oceantreenut.en: May the roots of the worldtree spread far and wide!
oceantreenut.trans: 愿世界树的根系触达得更远更广！

kitcoondecor2_kit.en: I will construct it with the speed of Hermod!
kitcoondecor2_kit.trans: 我将以赫尔莫德的速度建造它！

petals.en: Thank you Froh for this gift!

blowdart_fire.en: Like the breath of a dragon.

quagmire_onion.en: I dare thee, provoke tears from mine eyes!

generic.en: A shrine to a fearsome firey beast.
generic.trans: 供奉着令人望而生畏的炎兽的神龛。

empty.en: It demands an offering of charcoal.

dead.en: Surely the battle is not over already?
dead.trans: 战斗不会就这么结束吧？

generic.en: Mani hath sent forth his greatest warrior to challenge me!
generic.trans: 玛尼派来了他最强大的勇士来挑战我！

dead.en: Is that all you've got, Champion?

generic.en: It seems you are a worthy foe indeed...
generic.trans: 看来你还算个可敬的对手……

quagmire_grill_small_item.en: It doth not work like this.

chesspiece_eyeofterror.en: I shall feast my eyes upon this trophy!
chesspiece_eyeofterror.trans: 这个奖杯让我大饱眼福！

home.en: Home is where the hearth is!

firenettles_dried.en: T'would make a most worthy offering to the gods!
firenettles_dried.trans: 堪为敬奉诸神的顶级供品！

lightsout.en: Do you not hunger for battle, pig?

burnt.en: Loge did not smile upon you this day.
burnt.trans: 罗格今天没有对你微笑。

generic.en: I did not think pigs could make houses.
generic.trans: 我原先不知道猪还能建房子。

full.en: Come out and go to war with me!
full.trans: 出来和我一起去战斗吧！

drying.en: It's being prepared just the way I like it.
drying.trans: 正是我喜欢的制备方式。

dryinginrain.trans: 下雨对这个没什么帮助。

dryinginrain_notmeat.trans: 下雨对这个没什么帮助。

done_notmeat.en: Tis as dry as an empty well!

generic.en: Ah! A dangly rack for my meats!
generic.trans: 啊！一个可以晾肉的架子！

tomato_seeds.en: 'Tis a handful of seeds, for not-meat.
tomato_seeds.trans: 这一把种子，可以做成非肉类食物。

wormlight.trans: 发光的财宝，我无法抗拒！

kitcoon_grass.en: A fairly flammable looking wee beastie.
kitcoon_grass.trans: 一个看起来相当易燃的小野兽。

yoth_knightstick.en: A swift charger to ride into battle.

quagmire_tomato_seeds.en: 'Tis a handful of seeds, for not-meat.
quagmire_tomato_seeds.trans: 这一把种子，可以做成非肉类食物。

turf_carpetfloor2.en: A good color to hide the bloodstains of battle.
turf_carpetfloor2.trans: 这是一种很好的颜色，可以掩盖战斗的血迹。

yellowmooneye.trans: 奥丁，把你的视力借给我们！

deflated.en: The light hath faded, yet I shall endure!

generic.en: Illuminate my path to glory, skyward lantern!
generic.trans: 天灯啊，照亮吾通往荣耀之路吧！

armorwagpunk.en: It grants the wearer a fleetness of foot to rival Hermod himself.
armorwagpunk.trans: 它赐予穿着者赫尔莫德般的迅捷步伐。

rope_bridge_kit.trans: 这不是彩虹桥，但也可以用。

lavaarena_boarlord.en: Tis a coward who watches the fight.

bomb_lunarplant_wormwood.en: Ha! Look how my plant ally's power grows!
bomb_lunarplant_wormwood.trans: 哈！看看我的植物盟友长得多强！

polly_rogershat.en: I think it shall suit me well.

yotc_carrat_race_checkpoint.en: A waypoint to guide our vegetable beasts.
yotc_carrat_race_checkpoint.trans: 指引我们小菜兽的一个路径点。

wagpunkhat.en: This helm doth be possessed by the spirit of a cunning warrior.
wagpunkhat.trans: 这头盔附体着一名狡猾的战士的灵魂。

stinger.en: The sword on the back of a bee.

hermithouse_laundry.en: Linger not thy gaze upon the accursed rags of the sea witch!
hermithouse_laundry.trans: 莫要久视海巫婆那受诅的破布！

poweroff.en: This place has been long forgotten.
poweroff.trans: 这个地方早已被人遗忘。

generic.en: Reveal thine secrets to me, O strange machine!
generic.trans: 古老的机器，向我吐露你的秘密吧！

generic.en: A warrior hath no need for such things.

steelwool.en: It could easily best regular wool in combat.
steelwool.trans: 它可以轻而易举在战斗中打败普通牛毛。

generic.en: An ensconced water sprite!

red_cap_cooked.en: I don't want it, but I'm glad it survived trial by fire.
red_cap_cooked.trans: 我不想要，但很开心它经受了烈火的试炼。

hermitcrabtea_tillweed.en: An elixir to replenish a warrior's vigor!
hermitcrabtea_tillweed.trans: 一瓶恢复战士精力的灵药！

ancienttree_seed.en: It must be returned to the earth.

mutator_warrior.en: They look like the little beasts, but lack the ferocity.
mutator_warrior.trans: 它们虽然看起来像小野兽，但却缺少了它们的凶猛。

maxwellhead.en: I can see into his pores.

dreadstonehat.en: Ready to bear the brunt of battle!
dreadstonehat.trans: 准备好承受战斗的重击！

record_hallowednights.en: A serenade for the ghosts and ghouls.
record_hallowednights.trans: 幽灵和食尸鬼的小夜曲。

bell.en: I prefer the ringing resonance of clashing blades.
bell.trans: 我偏爱刀锋撞击的回响。

californiaroll.en: That's just a morsel of fish food.
californiaroll.trans: 那是只有一小块鱼肉的食物。

quagmire_rotten_crop.en: T'would never grace a hall in Valhalla.
quagmire_rotten_crop.trans: 它绝对不配进入英灵殿的大厅。

armorslurper.en: She ebbs the ache of hunger. Good fur.
armorslurper.trans: 它能减轻饥饿造成的痛苦。不错的毛皮。

houndmound.trans: 这些猎犬是真正的战士。

yotb.en: Mayhaps the judge would like to look upon it.
yotb.trans: 也许应该让评委过目一下。

generic.en: A stuffed effigy of a valiant steed!

seeds_cooked.en: Tiny nature bits, cooked to death.
seeds_cooked.trans: 微小的自然产物，给烤死了。

boneshard.trans: 我们敌人的一丁点残骸。

candybag.en: That we might carry our sweetest plunders!
candybag.trans: 我们可以搬走我们最甜美的战利品！

hermitcrabtea_succulent_picked.en: It shall quench the heat of Surtr's wrathful breath.
hermitcrabtea_succulent_picked.trans: 此物可平息苏尔特尔的怒火之息。

book_fish.en: Secret tactics for capturing the sea meats!

dragonchilisalad.en: Yeuch! I was promised a feast!

sewing_kit.en: I am no seamstress, but repairs are sometimes necessary.
sewing_kit.trans: 虽然我不是女裁缝，但偶尔也得缝缝补补。

turnip_seeds.en: 'Tis a handful of seeds, for not-meat.
turnip_seeds.trans: 这一把种子，可以做成非肉类食物。

generic.en: The lava crust is firm.

wagstaff_tool_1.en: Mayhaps this is what I seek.
wagstaff_tool_1.trans: 也许这就是我在找寻的东西。

wagstaff_tool_2.en: The odd stranger requested a tool, mayhaps this is it.
wagstaff_tool_2.trans: 古怪的陌生人说是要一个工具，也许就是这个。

wagstaff_tool_3.en: Is this what the odd stranger seeks?
wagstaff_tool_3.trans: 这就是那个古怪的陌生人要找的东西吗？

armor_sanity.en: Strong, but such a headache it gives...
armor_sanity.trans: 虽然强大，但是它会带来麻烦...

wagstaff_tool_4.en: Mayhaps this is what the odd stranger lost.
wagstaff_tool_4.trans: 或许这就是古怪陌生人丢掉的东西。

wagstaff_tool_5.en: How strange. Perhaps it belongs to that odd stranger.
wagstaff_tool_5.trans: 十分怪异。也许它是那个古怪陌生人的。

panettone.en: My eyes doth deceive me, tis surely meat.
panettone.trans: 我的双眼必定蒙骗了我，这无疑是肉。

lavaarena_armorlight.en: That is not fit for a warrior!

dead.en: It was once a wonder of the woods.

generic.en: A wonder of the woods.

slingshotammo_stinger.en: What fun is a battle without hand to hand combat?
slingshotammo_stinger.trans: 没有肉搏的战斗，何来乐趣？

wx78module_maxhealth2.en: These boons shall empower our metal warrior.
wx78module_maxhealth2.trans: 这些恩赐将使我们的金属战士变得更强。

book_fire.en: A tome to combat the most fiery tempest!
book_fire.trans: 可与烈焰风暴一战的巨著！

quagmire_onion_seeds.en: 'Tis a handful of seeds, for not-meat.
quagmire_onion_seeds.trans: 这一把种子，可以做成非肉类食物。

steeringwheel_item.en: A vital piece of a glorious vessel.
steeringwheel_item.trans: 光荣的舰艇上的重要组件。

cactus_flower.trans: 多肉植物开出的漂亮花朵。

wall_stone.en: My enemies will dash themselves on these rocks.
wall_stone.trans: 我的敌人们将在这些石头上撞得头破血流。

fishmeat_small_cooked.en: This meat will swim in my belly!
fishmeat_small_cooked.trans: 这块肉会在我的肚子里游泳！

goose_feather.en: A shieldmaiden deserves a soft bed of dunn.
goose_feather.trans: 女战士应当享有一张软床。

generic.en: A warrior doth not sit.

chesspiece_sharkboi.en: Until we meet again, bait-breathed warrior.
chesspiece_sharkboi.trans: 后会有期，满口鱼饵味的战士。

generic.en: A tragic tale of woe and misery!
generic.trans: 充满悲哀和痛苦的悲剧故事！

armor_lunarplant_husk.en: This will make my plant ally more deadly in battle.
armor_lunarplant_husk.trans: 这会使我的植物盟友在战斗中更具杀伤力。

worm_boss.en: A snake beast worthy of mine spear!

cutlichen.en: Even if I ate plants, I wouldn't eat THAT plant.
cutlichen.trans: 即使我吃植物，也不会吃那种植物。

generic.en: A fine tribute to the Jotnar.
generic.trans: 这是对约顿巨人的精美致敬。

generic.en: It foretells the coming of rains.

lavaarena_armormedium.en: Tis not as sturdy as a warrior would hope.
lavaarena_armormedium.trans: 这个对战士来说不够结实。

beefalofeed.en: I must keep my beast fed and battle-ready.
beefalofeed.trans: 我必须喂饱我的野兽，做好战斗准备。

spiderhat.en: A perfect way to infiltrate the enemy camp.

chum.en: A banquet for the sea beasties!

lunarthrall_plant_vine_end.en: Ha! You shall have to do better than that!

diseasing.en: It is weakening before mine eyes!

picked.en: The small tree has been slain!

diseased.trans: 疾病在它的灵魂里恶化。

withered.en: It has been shriveled by the heat.

generic.en: It longs to be a spear.

punchingbag.en: Alas, 'tis not a very lively sparring partner.
punchingbag.trans: 可惜啊，它不是一个十分活泼的训练伙伴。

hermitcrabtea_firenettles.en: To warm mine blood 'gainst Niflheim's bitter frost!
hermitcrabtea_firenettles.trans: 饮血暖躯，以御尼福尔海姆之霜！

lavaarena_eyecirclethat.en: I'd not dabble in thy horrid magic.
lavaarena_eyecirclethat.trans: 我不会涉猎你的可怕魔法。

seafoodgumbo.en: A meal fit for a Viking queen.

costume_mirror_body.en: I have my own costu- that is, warrior's garb!
costume_mirror_body.trans: 我有自己的戏——我是说，战士服！

sweatervest.en: It is a handsome vest, but it offers no protection.
sweatervest.trans: 这件背心虽然帅气，但不提供任何防护。

almost_done_cooking.en: The wait is almost at an end.
almost_done_cooking.trans: 就要结束无尽的等待了。

cooking.en: Locked in a glorious cooking battle.
cooking.trans: 正在进行一场光荣的烹调之战。

generic.en: A hearth for cooking a glorious feast!
This is savagery.

burnt.en: Normally I like a good roast, but this is not right.
burnt.trans: 一般来说，我喜欢烤肉，但这是不对的。

firecrackers.en: To strike fear into the hearts of mine enemies!

burnt.en: It must have displeased the gods.

generic.en: The rabbit seems pleased with my offering.
generic.trans: 兔子对我的供品很满意。

empty.en: What should be sacrificed to the beast's maw?
empty.trans: 要向野兽的血盆大口献祭什么呢？

halloweenpotion_drinks_potent.en: Fortune hath smiled upon me today!
halloweenpotion_drinks_potent.trans: 幸运之神今天对我微笑了！

purplegem.en: It is clouded by a mysterious energy.

oceanfishingbobber_none.en: The line hath need of a float.

generic.en: A reading cannot be gleaned.

tophat_magician.en: It hath been touched by dark magic.

lavaarena_armormediumrecharger.en: Makes the wearer keen of mind.
lavaarena_armormediumrecharger.trans: 穿戴这个就会思维敏捷。

livingtree_sapling.en: It bears the promise of horridness!

farm_plow_item.en: A ferocious weapon against untamed soil.
farm_plow_item.trans: 对付桀骜不驯的土壤的利刃。

battlesong_lunaraligned.en: Do not fear, my song shall show us the light.
battlesong_lunaraligned.trans: 别害怕，我的歌会带来光明。

oceanvine.en: Ropes from the branches of Yggdrasil.
oceanvine.trans: 世界树枝条抽出的绳索。

hermitcrabtea_forgetmelots.en: It doth quell the raging storm within.

charging.en: The tinkerer commands her armaments with the touch of a button.
charging.trans: 那修补匠只需按一下按钮，就能指挥她的武器装备。

charged.en: The tinkerer commands her armaments with the touch of a button.
charged.trans: 那修补匠只需按一下按钮，就能指挥她的武器装备。

generic.en: The tinkerer commands her armaments with the touch of a button.
generic.trans: 那修补匠只需按一下按钮，就能指挥她的武器装备。

pumpkin_lantern.en: Do you wish to fight, vegetable?

lavaarena_healingflowerhat.en: A blessing from Freya is contained within.
lavaarena_healingflowerhat.trans: 里面包含芙蕾雅的祝福。

dumbbell_golden.en: He hath strength, next we must work on his bravery!
dumbbell_golden.trans: 他有了力量，接下来我们要历练他的勇气！

inactive.en: Clever rock, you cannot surprise a warrior!
inactive.trans: 聪明的石头，你无法惊吓一位勇士！

active.en: I do not think I can best this rock in combat.
active.trans: 我不认为我能在战斗中打败这块石头。

shellweaver.en: The sea witch hath shared her ways with us. A high honor, indeed.
shellweaver.trans: 海巫婆将秘技传授于我等——实乃殊荣。

batwing.en: Like the wings of my helm, only meatier.
batwing.trans: 像我头盔上的翼，只是更多肉。

slingshotammo_horrorfuel.en: What fun is a battle without hand to hand combat?
slingshotammo_horrorfuel.trans: 没有肉搏的战斗，何来乐趣？

oceanfishingrod.en: Tremble before me, creatures of the deep!

generic.en: The insect immortalized, yet unmoving.
generic.trans: 虫子得到了永生，却动弹不得。

activated.en: Vile insect, thou darest to mimic my step?
activated.trans: 卑劣的虫子胆敢模仿吾的步伐？

portablefirepit_item.en: Prometheus himself would burn with envy!
portablefirepit_item.trans: 连普罗米修斯都要嫉妒得冒火！

carnivaldecor_banner.trans: 哼，不过是愚人的黄金罢了。

wagpunk_lever.en: A warrior trusts not cursed toggles.
wagpunk_lever.trans: 战士不信受诅咒的机关。

statue.en: T'would be a glorious battle, were it alive.
statue.trans: 如果它是活的，那场战役应该很辉煌。

generic.en: Lo! What terrible beast!

fence.en: Tis not my kind of fencing.
fence.trans: 栅栏不是我喜欢的风格。

pumpkin.en: It might make a good bludgeon, at least.
pumpkin.trans: 至少可以用它给敌人来一记重击。

wx78module_maxsanity1.en: These boons shall empower our metal warrior.
wx78module_maxsanity1.trans: 这些恩赐将使我们的金属战士变得更强。

chesspiece_formal.en: Not a man fit for battle.
chesspiece_formal.trans: 不是一个适合战斗的人。

hambat.en: A weapon fit for the great dining halls!

slingshot_band_mimic.en: The young scout doth come into his own.
slingshot_band_mimic.trans: 年轻的童子军已经开始独当一面了。

festive_blueprint.en: The bright colors could be useful for distracting enemies.
festive_blueprint.trans: 鲜艳的颜色可以用来分散敌人的注意力。

reskin_tool.en: In the blink of an eye, what once was is no more!
reskin_tool.trans: 眨眼间，曾经存在的就消失了！

diseased.trans: 疾病在它的灵魂里恶化。

chopped.en: Chopped by the warrior in the woods!

generic.en: Triumph will accompany its many resources.

book_silviculture.en: A tome of the ways of the forest!

mashedpotatoes.en: I'll not be fooled by your new mash-ed form, vegetable!
mashedpotatoes.trans: 变成菜泥的形状也糊弄不了我，蔬菜！

cool.en: It's not very scary now, is it?
cool.trans: 现在没那么可怕了，不是吗？

hot.en: Your fiery pools are no match for me!
hot.trans: 你的火池不是我的对手！

webberskull.en: He fought boldly, but his burial will not be that of a Viking.
webberskull.trans: 他曾勇敢地战斗，但他的葬礼不是维京式的。

exposed.en: Only something of great might could crack that foul stone.
exposed.trans: 只有强大的力量才能破除那块肮脏的石头。

generic.en: The pillar is weakened... mayhaps it could be broken.
generic.trans: 柱子被削弱了……也许现在能破坏它了。

lavaarena_feathercrownhat.trans: 斯雷普尼尔赐予它速度。

hareball.en: Ha! I am no coward, pass it this way!
hareball.trans: 哈！我可不是懦夫，传给我！

nature_blueprint.en: Flowers won't protect you in battle!
nature_blueprint.trans: 鲜花在战场上是保护不了你的!

chesspiece_antlion.en: The artist hath captured her noble mane perfectly.
chesspiece_antlion.trans: 艺术家完美地捕捉了她高贵的鬃毛。

wagboss_robot_constructionsite.trans: 它还没有完成作战准备。

lunar_seed.en: Sprung from the shining coronal of a mighty deity.
lunar_seed.trans: 从一位强神的闪耀光环中掉落。

shadowdancer.en: This serf is not being treated with dignity.
shadowdancer.trans: 这个农奴没有得到尊重。

burnt.en: It seems my training hath come to an abrupt end.
burnt.trans: 看来我的训练戛然而止了。

generic.en: A carpenter's saw is merely another blade for me to master!
generic.trans: 木匠的锯子只是我要掌握的另一把利刃！

wormwood_mutantproxy_lightflier.trans: 为我照亮前路吧，高贵的昆虫。

blowdart_lava2.trans: 海洋之神尼约德，赐我力量吧！

plantregistryhat.en: This is no helm for a warrior!
plantregistryhat.trans: 这不是一个战士的头盔!

generic.en: Tis light as a feather on the breeze!

generic_smallstack.en: The ravens recognize my unrivaled skill.
generic_smallstack.trans: 渡鸦认可我无可匹敌的能力。

generic.en: I am rewarded for completing the test of skill.
generic.trans: 这是对我通过考验的犒赏。

costume_doll_body.en: I have my own costu- that is, warrior's garb!
costume_doll_body.trans: 我有自己的戏——我是说，战士服！

generic.en: Is this dwelling made of fish?

oceanfishinglure_hermit_snow.en: The old crone has enchanted it to work best in the snow.
oceanfishinglure_hermit_snow.trans: 丑老太婆给它附过魔，在雪天最有用。

uncovered.en: I fear we've unleashed a great evil.
uncovered.trans: 我恐怕我们已经放出了一个强大的魔鬼。

ready.en: The beast has been roused beneath!

covered.en: Warriors are not concerned with decorative sculptures.
covered.trans: 战士们不关心装饰性的雕像。

finished.en: Gods help us on Mani's night.
finished.trans: 请诸神在玛尼的夜晚帮助我们。

nightstick.trans: 一把配得上索尔的武器。

boatrace_spectator_dragonling.en: A witness to my impending triumph!
boatrace_spectator_dragonling.trans: 见证我即将到来的胜利吧！

generic.en: 'Tis but a jumbled mess of words.
generic.trans: 不过是杂乱无章的文字。

turf_carpetfloor.en: It soaks up the blood of battle.

horrorfuel.en: The sight of it chills even my courageous Viking heart.
horrorfuel.trans: 只看它一眼就让我勇敢的维京之心发毛了。

generic.en: It is sort of nice.

burnt.en: Its beauty lives on in our hearts.
burnt.trans: 它的美丽活在我们心里。

generic.en: It awaits a grand tree!

oceanfishinglure_spoon_red.trans: 应该会引起它们的注意！

quagmire_sap_spoiled.en: Alas, the nectar 'tis no longer sweet!

chesspiece_deerclops_mutated.en: 'Twas an unnatural thing. Slaying it was a kindness.
chesspiece_deerclops_mutated.trans: 它本就是违反自然的存在。对它的杀戮是一种恩典。

slingshotammo_container.en: Though I prefer a blade, the lad slings with honor.
slingshotammo_container.trans: 虽然我更喜欢刀剑，但这小子用弹弓打出了荣耀。

maxwell.en: Arrg! Is that the antagonist to my saga?!
maxwell.trans: 啊！那就是我传奇故事里的大反派吗？！

wagboss_robot_secret.en: What doth he veil from us?

vault_chandelier_broken.en: Who hath cast thee down from the heavens, little star?
vault_chandelier_broken.trans: 是谁将汝自天穹掷下，小星辰？

chest_mimic_revealed.en: It contained not a mystery, but a curse!
chest_mimic_revealed.trans: 其中蕴含的不是谜，而是诅咒！

ancienttree_sapling_item.en: Fear not, I shall find you a place to lay down your roots.
ancienttree_sapling_item.trans: 莫怕，我会为你找到扎根之地。

chesspiece_depthworm.en: I do relish thy slaying, worm.
chesspiece_depthworm.trans: 我确实享受对你的屠杀，蠕虫。

moon_altar_ward.en: It has chosen me to safeguard its passage home.
moon_altar_ward.trans: 它选中了我来包围它回家的路。

slingshotammo_dreadstone.en: What fun is a battle without hand to hand combat?
slingshotammo_dreadstone.trans: 没有肉搏的战斗，何来乐趣？

uncovered.en: We've freed the figure slumbering in the stone.
uncovered.trans: 我们释放了在石头中沉睡的那个人物。

ready.en: The beast has been roused beneath!

covered.en: More apt for the halls of Valhalla.

finished.en: Will this please the gods? Or anger them?
finished.trans: 这会让诸神开心吗？或者会让他们生气？

rock_avocado_fruit.en: Tis either a rock or vegetable. Neither are food.
rock_avocado_fruit.trans: 此乃石头或蔬菜，二者皆不可食。

generic.en: Perhaps it was a gift from Venus?
generic.trans: 也许它是来自维纳斯的赠礼？

quagmire_slaughtertool.trans: 这是一种屠杀野兽的武器！

rottenegg.en: Ruined for eating, but primed for battle.
rottenegg.trans: 没法吃了，但在战斗中很好用。

critter_lamb.en: I wouldst turn farmer for thee.

alterguardian_phase3deadorb.en: Beware, stranger! The beast may yet rise again!
alterguardian_phase3deadorb.trans: 小心，陌生人！野兽可能会再次崛起！

oceanfishinglure_hermit_drowsy.en: It doth feel a bit like cheating...

burning.en: The flames doth devour the noble sapling! Aye, its final saga draws to a close.
burning.trans: 烈焰吞噬了尊贵的幼苗！诚然，其终章将至。

chopped.en: Now, the spoils like ripe for the taking.
chopped.trans: 现如今，这战利品唾手可得了。

generic.en: This stout sapling be a mighty champion indeed, bearin' aloft a boulder fit to crush lesser foes!
generic.trans: 此茁壮幼苗实乃威武勇士，高举巨石，碾碎弱小之敌！

oceanwhirlportal.en: Oh, beautiful maelström. Into thy hungry mouth we doth sail.
oceanwhirlportal.trans: 啊，美丽的大漩涡。让我们驶入您饥饿的巨口吧。

bishop.en: This one needs a good smack.

generic.en: Saveth them for my funeral.

empty.en: Empty. Shall we use it for target practice?
empty.trans: 空的。我们拿它当靶子怎么样？

generic.en: It guards these halls.

figkabab.en: Food with a wooden spear lanced through it!

shadow_battleaxe.en: I shall bring down many a beast with that cursed axe.
shadow_battleaxe.trans: 我将用这把被诅咒的斧头砍倒许多野兽。

generic.en: {note}? I expected it to sound more like a war bugle.
generic.trans: {note}? 我本来期待它发出军号的声音。

onion_cooked.en: It has been vanquished with fire.

generic.en: It sings a siren's song. In {note}.
