generic.trans: 它唱着塞壬的歌曲。{note} 的音。

generic.en: {note}... an impressively high register for a wee sea beast.
generic.trans: {note}……小小的海洋野兽竟有如此高的音域。

yotd_steeringwheel.en: Great dragon, steer me to victory!
yotd_steeringwheel.trans: 伟大的龙啊，指引我航向胜利吧！

flotationcushion.trans: 想带走我得改天了，尼约德！

turf_woodfloor.en: Wooden flooring, a fine surface for mortal combat.
turf_woodfloor.trans: 木制地板，适合生死决斗的极好地面。

chopped.en: Chopped by the warrior of the woods!
chopped.trans: 被森林中的勇士所砍倒！

burnt.en: This tree, 'twas burnt to the ground.

generic.en: Tis lovely as Yggdrasil's picture in my mind.
generic.trans: 如同我脑海中的世界树一样可爱动人。

carnivaldecor_banner_kit.en: It shall be done at once.

pig_token.en: The belt of a mighty pig warrior.

unpowered.en: This infernal contraption hath no spark!
unpowered.trans: 这地狱装置竟然不冒火花！

generic.en: Aye! At times, some witchcraft is the only course.
generic.trans: 啊呀！有时，施展巫术是唯一的选择。

generic.en: Growing non-meat fungus.
generic.trans: 生长中的非肉类食用菌。

imprisoned.en: The beast hath been consumed by foul magic.
imprisoned.trans: 那头野兽被肮脏的魔法吞噬了。

generic.en: You leave me no choice, beast! To arms!
generic.trans: 你让我别无选择，野兽！拿起武器！

archive_centipede.en: I fear no beast, mortal or metal!
archive_centipede.trans: 我无惧任何野兽、凡人和金属！

generic.en: A curious homage to the gods.
generic.trans: 向诸神致敬的古怪方式。

empty.en: That wasn't very respectful.

quagmire_mushrooms.en: Non-meat, I shall not consume thee!

valid.en: This one has been given an offering.

mastupgrade_lamp_item.en: We shall keep the flame burning bright!
mastupgrade_lamp_item.trans: 我们要让火焰继续燃烧！

armorgrass.en: Grass protection. That's not going to last long.
armorgrass.trans: 草制护具。肯定不能持久。

off.en: An ancient basin to house flames.

koalefant_summer.trans: 亲爱的生物...我要吃了你。

goldenpitchfork.en: A weapon of very wealthy farmers.

critter_perdling.en: Not a raven, but wise nonetheless.
critter_perdling.trans: 不是乌鸦，但还是很聪明。

kitcoonden_kit.en: Everything one needs to build a hideaway for tiny beasts.
kitcoonden_kit.trans: 这里有为小野兽建造一个藏身处所需的一切。

generic.en: Might the gods witness this visage and offer protection.
generic.trans: 愿诸神见到此景并提供庇佑。

powcake.en: What in the name of the unicorn is this?

generic.en: A Viking warrior can tell the time by the position of the sun.
generic.trans: 维京勇士可以通过太阳的位置来判断时间。

alterguardianhatshard.en: Even a single shard holds a measure of Mani's power.
alterguardianhatshard.trans: 即使是一个小碎片也折射出了玛尼的威力。

oceanfishinglure_hermit_rain.en: The old crone has enchanted it to work best in the rain.
oceanfishinglure_hermit_rain.trans: 丑老太婆给它附过魔，在雨天最有用。

battlesong_fireresistance.en: A fiery performance shalt shield me from the foul burn of my enemy's gaze.
battlesong_fireresistance.trans: 炽热的表演将使我免受敌人目光的灼伤。

builtup.en: The sea witch seems to be pleased with it.

generic.en: The old crone resides here?
This warrior does battle in the mind.
generic.trans: 这位战士战斗在心灵的战场上。

mask_toadyhat.en: Only a craven hides their face.

quagmire_sapbucket.trans: 用来掠夺树上的好东西。

generic.en: A beacon to guide my ship.

activated.en: It shines like the north star, guiding my vessel.
activated.trans: 它像北极星一样闪耀，为我的船只指引方向。

shadowheart.trans: 最黑暗的心。最黑暗的预兆。

sweettea.en: A warrior does not partake in "tea time".

generic.en: Does it swallow those fallen in battle?
generic.trans: 它是不是会吞掉在战斗中倒下的人？

leafloaf.en: It has a suspiciously non-meat smell to it.
leafloaf.trans: 它有一股可疑的非肉味。

battlesong_instant_panic.en: My very words art enough to make my foes tremble!
battlesong_instant_panic.trans: 我的言语足以让敌人颤抖！

wathgrithrhat.en: The power of the unicorn is great.
wathgrithrhat.trans: 独角兽的力量是巨大的。

moon_altar_icon.en: It calls out to me, I must take heed.
moon_altar_icon.trans: 它在召唤我，我必须响应它的召唤。

carrat_ghostracer.en: This shadowy creature seeks to challenge me.
carrat_ghostracer.trans: 这个暗影生物想挑战我。

generic.en: A fire burns within, yet the tree lives?
generic.trans: 里面有火在烧，树却依然活着？

mermwatchtower_noking.en: They are lost without their chieftain.
mermwatchtower_noking.trans: 少了酋长，他们显得无所适从。

quagmire_key_park.en: Tis the key to Valhalla's gates.
quagmire_key_park.trans: 这是开启英灵殿大门的钥匙。

wall_ruins_item.en: Only the finest barriers for my fort.
wall_ruins_item.trans: 我的堡垒只用最好的墙。

tourtiere.trans: 这张饼终于找到了正确的定位！

trap_bramble.en: A most clever trap for one's foes.
trap_bramble.trans: 用来对付敌人的狡猾陷阱。

generic.en: Tiny fairy lights aglow!

wall_hay_item.en: Perhaps my foes will get lost in this hay.
wall_hay_item.trans: 也许我的敌人会在这些干草中迷路。

boatrace_seastack_monkey.en: Ha! A Viking can maneuver her ship as easily as breathing!
boatrace_seastack_monkey.trans: 哈！维京人操作起船来就像呼吸一样轻松！

alterguardian_contained.en: It's ferrying this warrior's soul to the next realm.
alterguardian_contained.trans: 它正在把这个战士的灵魂渡到另一个世界。

vault_orb.en: What purpose hath this blasted bauble?
vault_orb.trans: 我要这该死的玩意有何用？

minotaurhorn.en: Can I add it to my helmet?
minotaurhorn.trans: 我能把它加到我的头盔上吗？

held.en: I'll direct this light where I please.
held.trans: 我会把光线导到我喜欢的地方。

generic.en: At peace, benevolent river spirit.

spoiled_fish.trans: 你闻起来充满了腐败的气味。

chopped.en: Chopped by the warrior of the woods!
chopped.trans: 被森林中的勇士所砍倒！

generic.en: I feel at home in the woods.

battlesong_container.en: It holds my music like arrows in a quiver.
battlesong_container.trans: 它装着我的音乐，一如箭袋装着箭矢。

tallbirdegg_cooked.en: It was you or me, bird.

animal_track.en: Oh! I love a good hunt.

costume_blacksmith_body.en: I have my own costu- that is, warrior's garb!
costume_blacksmith_body.trans: 我有自己的戏——我是说，战士服！

wagboss_robot_leg.en: We have severed the iron golem's limbs and yet it still stands.
wagboss_robot_leg.trans: 吾等已斩断铁魔像之四肢，然其仍屹立不倒。

flint.trans: 对于长矛制作必不可少。

ancient_altar_broken.en: This one is not in working order.

wx78module_maxhunger.en: These boons shall empower our metal warrior.
wx78module_maxhunger.trans: 这些恩赐将使我们的金属战士变得更强。

lavaarena_crowndamagerhat.en: Be still my heart! Tis the king of battle helms!
lavaarena_crowndamagerhat.trans: 我的小心脏需要冷静！这是战斗头盔中的王者！

walterhat.en: The helm of the "Pinetree Pioneer" clan.

oceanfish_small_9.en: You dare spit at a Viking warrior?
oceanfish_small_9.trans: 你敢对一个维京战士吐口水？

alterguardian_phase1_lunarrift.en: Be thy strength fit for the vengeance thou seek'st?
alterguardian_phase1_lunarrift.trans: 汝之力量可配得上汝寻求之复仇？

generic.en: It requires a token to prove my worthiness.
generic.trans: 它需要一代币来证明我的价值。

battlesong_durability.en: The notes doth imbue my weapons with their sharpness!
battlesong_durability.trans: 这些音符让我的武器闪耀出锋芒!

dragonpie.en: Why isn't this a meat pie? Meat, meeeat!
dragonpie.trans: 这为什么不是肉馅饼？肉，我要吃肉！

oceanfish_small_5.en: Tis naught but a small snack.

oceanfish_small_8.en: By Sól! It wields the power of the sun!
oceanfish_small_8.trans: 太阳神啊！它使用着太阳的能量！

oceanfish_small_2.en: There's barely any meat on these fishbones!

beehive.trans: 总是嗡嗡叫，总是在密谋。

wall_moonrock.trans: 完全无法攻下，很有价值的防御措施！

oceanfish_small_4.en: This amount of meat will hardly satisfy a Viking!
oceanfish_small_4.trans: 这点肉根本满足不了维京人！

burnt.en: The scarecrow dost yearn for nothing, now.
burnt.trans: 稻草人现在什么也不想要了。

generic.en: Dost thou yearn for a brain?

ghost.en: The feast hall of Valhalla will one day welcome you. But not today.
ghost.trans: 英灵殿的盛宴有天会为你而设，不过不是今天。

firestarter.en: %s's summoned Hel's flames this day!

murderer.en: We will hold a valorous feast at your defeat!
murderer.trans: 等我英勇击败你后，要大宴天下。

attacker.en: What nefarious plots doth %s stew upon?

reviver.en: %s's heart is as full as his belly.
reviver.trans: %s的内心和他的肚腩一样饱满。

generic.en: Hail, %s, blessed feast-forge!
generic.trans: 注意了，%s，来参见天佑的野兽战神！

chesspiece_klaus.en: A tribute to the festive warrior spirit.
chesspiece_klaus.trans: 颂扬了喜庆的勇士精神。

held.en: Thou art safe with me, sea meat.

generic.en: Cutest flying meat.

record_efs.en: Doth the tempo not make one's heart race with excitement?
record_efs.trans: 这节奏不让人心跳加速吗？

generic.en: If it is a gate, it hath been firmly shut.
generic.trans: 如果这是一扇门，它已经被牢牢地关上了。

ghost.en: Fear not! I will find you a heart, with utmost haste!
ghost.trans: 不要害怕！我将以最快的速度为你找到一颗心！

firestarter.en: I don't wish to question your intentions, %s...

murderer.en: Thou shall answer for this betrayal, %s! Meet my spear!
murderer.trans: 你会为这次背叛付出代价，%s！领教我的长矛吧！

attacker.en: You think it wise to test me, %s?

generic.en: Good health to you through the ages, %s!
generic.trans: 愿你在漫长的岁月中身体健康，%s！

carpentry_blade_moonglass.en: A shame it is not a weapon.

dead_sea_bones.trans: 海神尼约德的深处藏着许多秘密。

wagpunk_bits.en: What use would a warrior have for such leavings?
wagpunk_bits.trans: 这些东西对一名战士有什么用处？

deerclops.en: Rays will shine through my spear and poke out your eyeball!
deerclops.trans: 我的长矛将闪耀光芒并挑出你的眼珠！

hermithotspring_constr.en: Will this build ne'er be finished?

manrabbit_tail.en: The fuzzy trophy of a successful battle.
manrabbit_tail.trans: 战斗胜利后得到的毛茸茸的战利品。

merm_armory_upgraded.en: The armory of the fish beast warriors.

batnose_cooked.en: If it's meat, I shall eat it!

houndwhistle.en: It casts a spell upon the dogged beasts.
houndwhistle.trans: 它对狗形野兽施放法术。

beefalotreat.en: My noble steed deserves a reward.
beefalotreat.trans: 我尊贵的坐骑应该得到犒赏。

generic.en: Rest well, fallen foe.

uncommon.en: A good luck charm from the ravens!

generic.en: A wooden idol to remind me of this day!

collapsedchest.en: Who hath rendered a shambles of our booty?
collapsedchest.trans: 是谁把我们的战利品弄得一塌糊涂？

carnival_prizebooth_kit.en: I must construct it before my efforts can be rewarded.
carnival_prizebooth_kit.trans: 想要让努力得到回报，我就必须建好它。

alterguardianhat.en: A boon from Mani's defeated Champion.
alterguardianhat.trans: 来自玛尼被击败的英雄的恩赐。

generic.en: 'Tis a tribute worthy of the Pig Gods.

empty.en: Like me, it hungers only for meat.

cannonball_rock_item.en: Woe to any fool who doth attack my ship!
cannonball_rock_item.trans: 攻击我的船的蠢货要有麻烦了！

balloonparty.en: It hath swallowed the wee ones whole!
balloonparty.trans: 它把小家伙们整个吞掉了！

winter_ornament.en: A fragile beauty that must be protected.

pepper_oversized.en: You are the champion of the peppers, then?
pepper_oversized.trans: 那你就是辣椒界的冠军了？

cookiecutter.en: It seeks to make a meal of my vessel!
cookiecutter.trans: 它图谋把我的载具当成盘中餐！

balatro_machine.en: So be it! Yet one more round, thou knavish deceiver!
balatro_machine.trans: 要战便战！再来一局，你这狡猾的骗子！

saddle_war.en: I ride to victory or death!

spidergland.en: Ripped from the abdomen of a slain spider.
spidergland.trans: 从杀死的蜘蛛腹部摘下。

dumbbell_gem.en: My friend, if you want to be fighting fit you must join me in combat!
dumbbell_gem.trans: 朋友，如果你想强健地战斗，就跟我共赴战场吧！

yotb.en: Mayhaps the judge would like to look upon it.
yotb.trans: 也许应该让评委过目一下。

generic.en: A stuffed effigy of a valiant steed!

yotd_anchor_item.en: I will craft the finest ship in the land!
yotd_anchor_item.trans: 我要造出陆地上最精美的船只。

tree_rock_sapling.en: A greenling that may be of some worth, or so the tale goes.
tree_rock_sapling.trans: 此青嫩之物或有些许价值，传说如此。

generic.en: The sight of it doth send a terrible chill down my spine.
generic.trans: 一看到它，我的脊背就感到一阵阵发凉。

ghost.en: %s's restless spirit could be revived with a heart.
ghost.trans: %s的不安精神可以用心恢复。

firestarter.en: Ah. Have you singed your dress, fair maiden?
firestarter.trans: 啊。淑女，你赞颂过你的裙子吗？

murderer.en: %s, your body is weak but your heart is strong! Fight!
murderer.trans: %s，你的身体很虚弱，但内心强大！战斗吧！

attacker.en: Do not test me, fair maiden!

reviver.en: %s is channeling the spirit of Eir.

generic.en: Spirits be with you, %s!

slingshotammo_marble.en: What fun is a battle without hand to hand combat?
slingshotammo_marble.trans: 没有肉搏的战斗，何来乐趣？

shell_cluster.en: Tis naught but a clump of shells.

asparagus_oversized.en: This spear will never match up to mine.
asparagus_oversized.trans: 这支长矛永远比不上我的长矛。

spear.en: That is not my favored spear, but it will do the trick.
spear.trans: 那不是我最喜欢的长矛，但也能用。

rat.en: Run! Run as if thine life depends on it!

generic.en: We shall test thine speed.
generic.trans: 我们应该测试一下你的速度。

cookbook.en: 'Tis filled with too many non-meat dishes if you ask me.
cookbook.trans: 在我看来，里面的素菜太多了。

potato.trans: 从土地里钻出的卑劣之物。

redgem.en: It is hot to the touch.

lots.en: It is growing strong and hearty.

some.en: The forest sprite has taken root.
some.trans: 森林精灵已经生根发芽了。

snowcovered.en: Not all can withstand the frost giant's touch.
snowcovered.trans: 不是所有人都能抵挡得住森林巨人的触摸。

stuffed.en: The forest sprite has returned a glorious bounty!
stuffed.trans: 森林精灵送回了可观的礼物！

rotten.en: A blight has beset this log. Another!
rotten.trans: 枯萎病袭击了这块木头。又一块木头！

burnt.trans: 它在熊熊烈火中化为乌有！

empty.en: An empty home for forest sprites.
empty.trans: 森林精灵们空空如也的家。

mermguard_shadow.en: Warriors, denied their ascension to Valhalla...
mermguard_shadow.trans: 这些战士被剥夺了飞升英灵殿的机会……

slingshotammo_freeze.en: What fun is a battle without hand to hand combat?
slingshotammo_freeze.trans: 没有肉搏的战斗，何来乐趣？

slingshotammo_poop.en: I could do without the stench...

burning.en: May we meet again in Valhalla.

reviving.en: There's still fight left in the creature!
reviving.trans: 这个生物还有未完成的战斗！

generic.en: Thou were a worthy foe.

shark.en: Do you come to challenge me, sea beast?
shark.trans: 你是来挑战我的吗，海兽？

wagstaff_npc.en: Hail stranger! Are ye friend or foe?
wagstaff_npc.trans: 陌生人你好！你是敌是友？

armor_bramble.en: My ally is surely a strong warrior.
armor_bramble.trans: 我的盟友确实是一位强壮的勇士。

dumbbell_marble.en: Train well my friend, and join me in glorious battle!
dumbbell_marble.trans: 好好训练，朋友，与我共赴光辉战斗吧！

boat_ancient_item.en: I shall build a vessel like the tales of old.
boat_ancient_item.trans: 我将建造上古传说中的舰船。

minerhat.en: A lighted helm! For the darkness.
minerhat.trans: 会发光的头盔！适合在黑暗中使用。

anchor.en: Tis light as a feather thanks to my Viking's strength!
anchor.trans: 在我维京人的强壮面前，它轻如鸿毛。

leafymeatburger.en: This will suffice until I find real meat.
leafymeatburger.trans: 在我找到真正的肉之前，就用这个凑数了。

book_elemental.trans: 这不是给凡人的眼睛看的。

latkes.en: My eyes see foul potatoes, but the taste of meat is unmistakable!
latkes.trans: 我眼中看到的是臭土豆，但是肉的味道绝对错不了！

active.en: By the power of the sand!

generic.en: To save my allies the journey.
generic.trans: 这次旅行拯救了我的盟友。

chesspiece_guardianphase3.en: You fought well, Champion of Mani.
chesspiece_guardianphase3.trans: 你曾经勇猛战斗过，玛尼的英雄。

eyeplant.en: Don't point your eyeball at me, foliage!
eyeplant.trans: 别把你的眼珠子对着我，植物！

boatfragment03.en: The ship hath met a valiant end.

goggleshat.en: T'would be no help in battle.

coontail.en: It is the tail of cute meat.

boatfragment05.en: The ship hath met a valiant end.

boatfragment04.en: The ship hath met a valiant end.

growing.en: The bees are expanding their domain.
growing.trans: 蜜蜂们正在扩大它们的领域。

generic.en: A land not of milk, but of honey.

carnivalgame_shooting_kit.en: It will be built with utmost speed.
carnivalgame_shooting_kit.trans: 它将以最快的速度建成。

moonstorm_goggleshat.en: No mere storm can stop me!
moonstorm_goggleshat.trans: 什么样的风暴都不能阻止我！

stalker_minion.en: A fiend woven from the night!

moonstorm_static_item.trans: 里面有一种奇异的力量在休眠。

generic.en: One of Hel's beasts, surely!

held.en: I have you now, wicked vegetable.
held.trans: 你栽到我手里了，邪恶的蔬菜。

generic.en: Vegetables are not to be trusted!

sleeping.en: A deceptive vegetable with no honor.
sleeping.trans: 毫无荣誉可言的骗子蔬菜。

lore2.en: What vile force could claim so many souls?
lore2.trans: 何等邪恶之力能夺走如此多的灵魂？

lore3.en: I doth dare these stone warriors to rouse from slumber and cross blades with me!
lore3.trans: 尔等石武士，从沉睡中醒来，与我一决高下吧！

lore1.en: It doth seem Lord Insect hath struck a fell bargain.
lore1.trans: 看来虫王做了一笔邪恶交易。

anchor_item.en: I will craft the finest ship in the land!
anchor_item.trans: 我要造出陆地上最精美的船只。

charlie_lecturn.en: This play is in need of actors.

male_puppet.en: He looks unhappy upon his throne.
male_puppet.trans: 他在王座上一副不开心的样子。

atrium_overgrowth.en: The writings of the gods t'were not meant for us.
atrium_overgrowth.trans: 诸神的篇章不属于我们。

quagmire_salt_rack_item.en: I shall put thee to good use.

basalt.en: A thousand mortals couldn't break through this stone.
basalt.trans: 哪怕上千个凡人也挖不穿这块石头。

spiderqueen.en: Finally, a true test of my abilities.
spiderqueen.trans: 终于来了，对我能力的真正考验。

tacklestation.en: I shall create a fishing weapon like no other!
tacklestation.trans: 我要造出举世无双的捕鱼利器！

growing.en: I am a shieldmaiden, not a farmer!
growing.trans: 我是个女战士，不是农夫！

ready.en: Ugh, vegetables. I'm not sure what I expected...
ready.trans: 呃，蔬菜。我不确定我期望什么...

generic.en: A plant.

quagmire_pot_hanger_item.en: 'Tis no use to me in this form.
quagmire_pot_hanger_item.trans: 它这个样子对我没什么用。

quagmire_turnip_cooked.en: Ach! I shall not eat thee!

generic.en: Have at thee, cursed crustacean!
generic.trans: 小心了，受诅咒的甲壳动物！

hungry.en: I hope you like vegetables... the meat is for me.
hungry.trans: 我希望你喜欢素食...肉是给我吃的。

starving.en: To enter battle with me is your choice, bird.
starving.trans: 是你选择和我战斗的，鸟。

generic.en: You are not yet ready for battle, bird.
generic.trans: 你还没有准备好战斗，鸟。

greenmooneye.en: Odin gave his eye that we might see.
greenmooneye.trans: 奥丁献出了他的眼睛，我们才能看见。

krampus_sack.en: The sack itself is the present.

green_cap_cooked.en: Charred by flame or not, that will not touch my lips!
green_cap_cooked.trans: 无论有没有被火烧焦，我都不会让它碰到我的嘴唇！

held.en: I'll direct this light where I please.
held.trans: 我会把光线导到我喜欢的地方。

generic.en: At peace, benevolent forest spirit.

halloweencandy_9.en: The battle was mighty, yet in the end the worm was consumed!
halloweencandy_9.trans: 那场战斗很庞大，但最后虫子们都被消耗殆尽了！

awake.en: Keep thy hand from out mine fires!
awake.trans: 把你的手从我的火焰上拿开！

robot_blueprint.en: Armor of iron for my steed!

halloweencandy_8.en: I shall uncover its secret center!
halloweencandy_8.trans: 我会解开它内心的秘密！

koalefant_winter.trans: 可怜的、没有戒心的肉兽。

mask_dollhat.en: 'Tis cowardly to hide one's face behind a mask!
mask_dollhat.trans: 把脸藏在面具之下是懦弱的行为！

gingerbreadwarg.en: I will fight thee for defying thy meaty origins.
gingerbreadwarg.trans: 我要跟你战斗，因为你背叛了你的肉身。

halloweencandy_1.en: How sinister! I nearly mistook it for a true apple!
halloweencandy_1.trans: 多阴险啊！我差点以为它是一颗真正的苹果了！

halloweencandy_2.en: A clever ruse. It is not corn at all.
halloweencandy_2.trans: 聪明的诡计。但是完全不是玉米。

generic.en: Once a mighty deathtrap, now a pantry.
generic.trans: 以前是强力死亡陷阱，现在就是个食品柜。

full.trans: 小肉肉们，它确实能防腐。

generic.en: A Viking warrior can tell the time by the position of the sun.
generic.trans: 维京勇士可以通过太阳的位置来判断时间。

halloweencandy_6.en: What have I done to anger the gods so?
halloweencandy_6.trans: 我做了什么让诸神这么生气？

halloweencandy_3.en: A confection to strike terror into any warrior's heart!
halloweencandy_3.trans: 一种会让任何战士的心中都充满恐惧的甜点！

halloweencandy_4.en: Monsters, prepare to do battle with a Viking's teeth!
halloweencandy_4.trans: 怪物们，准备好和北欧海盗的牙齿战斗吧！

wx78module_music.en: These boons shall empower our metal warrior.
wx78module_music.trans: 这些恩赐将使我们的金属战士变得更强。

hungry.en: You must eat to keep your fires burning.
hungry.trans: 你得进食，才能保持大火燃烧。

generic.en: A faithful, fiery friend.

ceviche.en: Fancy for my taste, but it'll do.
ceviche.trans: 对我来说味道有点怪，但能吃。

salty_doghat.en: The helm of one who holds command over the seas.
salty_doghat.trans: 这乃四海大统帅的头盔。

petals_evil_dried.en: T'would make a most worthy offering to the gods!
petals_evil_dried.trans: 堪为敬奉诸神的顶级供品！

cookiecutterhat.en: Tis a helm fit for a warrior of the deep.

bananapop.en: I've somehow found a way to make it even LESS appealing!
bananapop.trans: 不知道怎么的我把它做得更难看了！

bootleg.en: Retreat is the way of cowards!

deer_gemmed.trans: 这是一只魔幻的森林生物！

moon_fissure_plugged.en: The old crone has been waging war against the moon's apparitions.
moon_fissure_plugged.trans: 丑老太婆一直在跟月光的幻影开战。

wurt_swampitem_shadow.en: The small beastie seems keen to expand her kingdom.
wurt_swampitem_shadow.trans: 这只小野兽似乎很想扩大自己的王国。

upgraded_stacksize.en: Enough room to store an entire armory!

generic.en: A place to store my helm and spear whilst I rest.
generic.trans: 休息时存放头盔和长矛的地方。

burnt.en: Its walls were torn down by fire.

boat_ancient_container.en: My stores are well defended 'neath the deck of my ship.
boat_ancient_container.trans: 我船舱甲板下的仓库守备森严。

grass_umbrella.en: Flowers are not befitting a warrior, but wet armor is even worse.
grass_umbrella.trans: 花朵不适合战士，但湿盔甲更不适合。

sleep.en: It can't get enough of me!

generic.en: It can't get enough of me!

gestalt.en: God of the moon, shine thy smile upon me!
gestalt.trans: 月神，请用你的微笑照亮我！

lunarplant_husk.en: It hath a formidible hide, for a non-meat.
lunarplant_husk.trans: 屈屈非肉竟然长着令人生畏的外皮。

quagmire_pot_small.en: We shall fill thee with meat!

yotb_stage_item.en: Where to set the battleground of competition...
yotb_stage_item.trans: 要把竞争的战场放在哪里呢……

halloween_ornament_1.en: Meant to hang from Yggdrasil's kin!
halloween_ornament_1.trans: 应当高挂在世界树的树梢上！

halloween_ornament_2.en: Decoration! Prepare to be hung from something!
halloween_ornament_2.trans: 装饰物！准备挂到什么东西上吧！

halloween_ornament_3.en: It shall strike fear unto the hearts of mine foes!
halloween_ornament_3.trans: 它会把我的敌人吓得心惊胆战！

generic.en: I must ensure my veggie beast is quick-witted!
generic.trans: 我必须保证我的小菜兽够机敏！

lunarthrall_plant.en: Vicious plant, I shall honor thee with a swift death!
lunarthrall_plant.trans: 恶毒的植物，我要赐你光荣的死亡！

halloween_ornament_5.en: It shalt be hung from the highest branch!
halloween_ornament_5.trans: 应该把它挂在最高的树枝上！

costume_princess_body.en: Robust it is not, but lovely? Most assuredly.
costume_princess_body.trans: 虽不坚实，然却可爱？确凿无疑。

generic.en: What treasures shall I bestow upon thee?
generic.trans: 我应该授予你什么财宝呢？

empty.en: We must give it the gift of life.
empty.trans: 我们得给它生命的馈赠。

nightmaregrowth.en: The very ground hath split and released nightmares upon us!
nightmaregrowth.trans: 大地裂开了，向我们释放了梦魇！

cutreeds.en: I cleaned all the bugs out! Then I ate them.
cutreeds.trans: 我清掉了所有的虫子！然后我吃了它们。

pinecone_sapling.en: It has shed its armor. Grow, baby tree!
pinecone_sapling.trans: 它已经脱掉了盔甲。好好生长吧，小树苗！

generic.en: Reflexes are key in battle, and racing!
generic.trans: 反应速度对战斗和赛跑都很关键！

turtillus.en: Your armor shalln't stop my spear.
turtillus.trans: 你的盔甲挡不住我的矛。

book_moon.en: We call upon the power of Mani!

shadowdigger.en: I hope this serf is being treated with dignity.
shadowdigger.trans: 我希望这个农奴能受到尊重。

generic.en: Are there treasures beneath the gravestones?

goatmilk.trans: 这是蕴含强大力量的奶。

lunarplanthat.en: A formidable helm, burning with an unearthly flame!
lunarplanthat.trans: 令人生畏的头盔，燃烧着地外火焰！

stuffedeggplant.en: Filling the vegetable does not make it meat.
stuffedeggplant.trans: 在蔬菜里塞东西并不能把它变成肉。

turfcraftingstation.en: The very ground shall heed my will!

generic.en: A bridge to another world.
generic.trans: 通向另一个世界的桥梁。

spice_sugar.en: The sweet juice of an enemy.

tallbirdegg.en: It will grow into a formidable foe.
tallbirdegg.trans: 它将成长为一个令人敬畏的对手。

generic.en: A majestic goober.

greenamulet.trans: 改进的绿宝石合成工艺！

thurible.trans: 这看起来是冰霜巨人的诱惑。

otter.en: A crafty pillager. I cannot help but respect it.
otter.trans: 一个狡猾的掠夺者。我不禁对它肃然起敬。

shadow_forge.en: It doth conjure powerful, accursed things...
shadow_forge.trans: 它能编织出强大的被诅咒之物……

chesspiece_kitcoon.en: A mighty pillar for a mighty family!

watermelon.en: It makes a good sound when you hit it.
watermelon.trans: 它拍起来的声音挺好听。

chesspiece_bearger.trans: 这是一场值得歌颂的战役。

ancient_husk.trans: 究竟发生了什么样的背叛？

stalker.en: It lives to battle once more!

portabletent_item.en: My talent lies in battle, not in building.
portabletent_item.trans: 我的天赋在于战斗，而不是建筑。

dug_berrybush.en: I should like to see that returned to the earth goddess.

scraphat.trans: 它是在一场令人振奋的战斗中赢得的！

unwritten.en: I shall point the way to triumph!
unwritten.trans: 我得指明一条胜利之路！

generic.en: A most well placed sign.

ghost.en: The fate of the Draugr is not yours, %s. A heart!
ghost.trans: %s，尸鬼的命运跟你不一样。一颗心！

firestarter.en: Hm. I worry about you sometimes, %s.

murderer.en: %s! Let us settle this in battle!
murderer.trans: %s！让我们用战斗解决这事吧！

attacker.en: Your honor wavers, %s.

generic.en: Wisdom guide you, %s!

quagmire_goatmilk.en: It came from an animal, yet is still not meat!

quagmire_wheat_seeds.en: 'Tis a handful of seeds, for not-meat.
quagmire_wheat_seeds.trans: 这一把种子，可以做成非肉类食物。

remains_eye_bone.en: The eyebone could not pass to this world.
remains_eye_bone.trans: 眼骨无法传送到这个世界。

remains_glommerflower.en: The flower must remain in its home world.
remains_glommerflower.trans: 那朵花必须留在它原来的世界。

remains_thingie.trans: 它被烧掉了。不复存在了。

generic.en: The flames' remains.
A seafaring Viking is keen of mind and sharp of wit.
generic.trans: 航海的维京人热心机智。

leafymeatsouffle.en: A nightmarish vision... but food nonetheless.
leafymeatsouffle.trans: 噩梦般的景象……但终归是食物。

firepen.en: I sense a burning power within.
firepen.trans: 我感觉到它有熊熊燃烧的能量。

moon_altar_seed.en: The gods commune to me through thee.

stuffing.en: It bears the scent of meat. I will sample a morsel.
stuffing.trans: 有肉的香味。我来试吃一小口。

generic.en: Bring home the spoils of war!

quagmire_rubble_pubdoor.en: It once led to adventure. Alas, no more.
quagmire_rubble_pubdoor.trans: 它曾经带着人们历险。唉，俱往矣。

seastack.en: I shall not dash mine ship upon thee!
seastack.trans: 吾之船万万不能撞上汝！

mandrake.en: The corpse of the rutabaga still retains its magic.
mandrake.trans: 芜菁甘蓝的尸体仍保留了它的魔力。

type1.trans: 什么让你烦恼，美丽的姑娘？

generic.en: Delicate appearance, but hard as stone. Admirable.
generic.trans: 外表很精美，但和石头一样硬。令人钦佩。

carnival_host.en: He must be the leader of the ravens.

eyeofterror_mini.en: I hath no fear of having all eyes upon me!
eyeofterror_mini.trans: 就算所有目光都注视着我，我也不会惧怕。

held.trans: 可以装在口袋里的朋友。

aboveground.trans: 它随心所欲地到处挖洞。

alterguardian_phase2spike.en: You think I'm trapped here with you? Ha! It is you who are trapped with me!
alterguardian_phase2spike.trans: 你以为是我被你困住了？大错特错，是你被我困住了！

saltbox.en: A fine place to store meats!

has_item.en: Not the most impressive piece of loot.
has_item.trans: 不是最令人印象深刻的战利品。

generic.en: No sorrier sight than a bare table. Let us plunder!
generic.trans: 没有比光秃秃的桌子更悲伤的景象了。让我们掠夺吧！

burnt.en: The gods need not more tables.
burnt.trans: 众神不需要更多的桌子。

tentacle.en: It looks fierce. Into the fray!

walkingplank.en: I shall never abandon my vessel!

merm_tool_upgraded.en: I suppose 'tis better than using one's hands.

generic.en: Raven friend!

burning.trans: 被热情的火焰消耗殆尽！

diseasing.en: It is weakening before mine eyes!

picked.en: The rabbit food is all gone.

diseased.trans: 疾病在它的灵魂里繁殖。

generic.en: It's covered in rabbit food.
generic.trans: 兔子的食物里面有这个东西。

sleepbomb.en: Those who enter thy circle shalt know rest.
sleepbomb.trans: 进入你的循环的人应该知道休息。

wormlight_lesser.en: Glow! Glow with all your might!
wormlight_lesser.trans: 发光吧！用你所有的力量绽放光芒吧！

carnival_ball.en: This may be useful for testing my companions' reflexes.
carnival_ball.trans: 这也许能测试出我的同伴的反应能力。

generic.en: Perhaps a sword-wielding maiden lies beneath.
generic.trans: 或许下面躺着一个挥刀的少女。

empty.en: Naught but a barren basin.

sword_lunarplant.en: Am I worthy of wielding a weapon of such brilliance?
sword_lunarplant.trans: 我是否配得上挥舞如此光彩夺目的武器？

pepper_seeds.en: Smaller versions of vegetables still offend me.
pepper_seeds.trans: 小个头的蔬菜还是会惹到我。

yotb.en: Mayhaps the judge would like to look upon it.
yotb.trans: 也许应该让评委过目一下。

generic.en: A stuffed effigy of a valiant steed!

wall_dreadstone.en: These fortifications will strike fear into my enemies' hearts!
wall_dreadstone.trans: 这些防御工事将使我的敌人心生畏惧！

voidclothhat.en: I despise the thought of hiding one's face in combat.
voidclothhat.trans: 我鄙视在战斗中遮脸的做法。

bird_mutant.en: The beasts are changed by some strange force!
bird_mutant.trans: 这些野兽被某种奇异的力量改变了！

opalstaff.en: It weaves the cold from thin air!
opalstaff.trans: 它从稀薄的空气编织出寒冷！

lobsterdinner.en: I triumphed over my wobster foe.
lobsterdinner.trans: 我战胜了我的龙虾对手。

pumpkin_oversized.trans: 对于一个蔬菜来说，可以说相当厉害了。

generic.en: The figure of a fellow warrior!

snowball_item.en: I do love a snow skirmish.
snowball_item.trans: 就来一场我至爱的雪战吧。

lunarrift_portal.en: An opening, yet I cannot pass through.
lunarrift_portal.trans: 敞开着，但我却无法通过。

slingshotmodkit.en: The young scout doth come into his own.
slingshotmodkit.trans: 年轻的童子军已经开始独当一面了。

normal.trans: 温暖的火焰，温暖的薇格弗德。

generic.en: Warm fire, warm Wigfrid.
generic.trans: 温暖的火焰，温暖的薇格弗德。

koalefig_trunk.en: The trunk hath been fattened up.

generic.en: A cold comfort.

out.trans: 火光摇摇曳曳地熄灭了。

generic.en: It may impale a foe.

dry.en: It's so dry it's nearly dust.

generic.en: A barrel of stink.

cattoy_mouse.en: T'would make for excellent target practice!
cattoy_mouse.trans: 它很适合拿来当目标练习！

winter_ornamentpearl.en: Normally I careth not for baubels. But these doth stir my heart most sweetly.
winter_ornamentpearl.trans: 寻常饰物难入吾眼。然此物却令吾之心弦美美地颤动。

boat_bumper_crabking_kit.en: It shall shield my vessel from harm.
boat_bumper_crabking_kit.trans: 它能保护我的船不受伤害。

blue_cap_cooked.en: I have no desire to eat it.

generic.en: The flame must be lit!

lit.en: An altar to a wee fluffy beastie.
lit.trans: 一个毛茸茸的小动物祭坛。

generic.en: The flame must be lit!

quagmire_goatmum.en: A woman of good taste, like mineself!
quagmire_goatmum.trans: 和我一样，是有品味女士！

generic.en: The flame must be lit!

lavaarena_armormediumdamager.en: Makes the wearer sharp of tooth.
lavaarena_armormediumdamager.trans: 穿戴这个就会有锋利的牙。

battlesong_shadowaligned.en: I shall sing of sweet darkness.

chester.en: Don't worry, I won't eat him.

dumbbell.en: 'Tis not just strength, but cunning that makes a warrior!
dumbbell.trans: 除了斗勇，好的战士还要斗智！

generic.en: My ally is most resourceful.
Doth this not sate thee?
generic.trans: 此物尚不足以令汝满足？

empty.en: What tribute dost thou demand?

wall_stone_2.en: My enemies will dash themselves on these rocks.
wall_stone_2.trans: 我的敌人们将在这些石头上撞得头破血流。

warm.en: The stone has taken on warmth!

cold.en: The stone has taken on cold!

generic.en: A stone of great use!

royal_jelly.en: To absorb the felled queen's power!
royal_jelly.trans: 吸收被击倒的女王的力量！

bonesoup.en: A feast fit for the gods!

otterden_dead.en: Then sink, wretched raft! A Viking hath no fear of the sea!
otterden_dead.trans: 尽管沉吧，该死的木筏！维京人不惧大海！

mutator_spitter.en: They look like the little beasts, but lack the ferocity.
mutator_spitter.trans: 它们虽然看起来像小野兽，但却缺少了它们的凶猛。

iceberg_melted.en: 'Twas no match for this great heat.
iceberg_melted.trans: 无法与仲夏之热所匹敌。

redlantern.en: A lucky ward to guard against the night.

lureplantbulb.en: Perhaps I will be a meat farmer after all!
lureplantbulb.trans: 也许最终我将成为一个种肉的农夫！

lowfuel.en: The catapult grows weak and tired.
lowfuel.trans: 发射器渐渐变得虚弱和疲劳。

wx78module_maxsanity.en: These boons shall empower our metal warrior.
wx78module_maxsanity.trans: 这些恩赐将使我们的金属战士变得更强。

boatpatch.en: If a Viking cares for her vessel, t'will do the same in return.
boatpatch.trans: 维京人爱己之船，船亦以礼相报。

barnaclepita.en: Why hide the meat within this bready pocket?
barnaclepita.trans: 为什么要把肉藏在这个面包口袋里？

wrong_type.en: It is not worthy of a place here.

has_food.en: A feast fit for The Great Hall!

generic.en: A feast table worthy of Valhalla!
generic.trans: 这张餐桌配得上英灵殿！

bathbomb.en: I shall toss thee in the earth's cauldron!

mushroombomb.trans: 保护好自己，我的盟友们！

spring.en: It must be intermission for the rabbits.
spring.trans: 好像是兔子的中场休息时间。

generic.en: Showtime, rabbits!

closed.en: I shalln't be vanquished that easily.
closed.trans: 我可不会轻易的被打败。

generic.en: My warrior's instinct sounds - but why!
generic.trans: 我的勇士直觉在发出警告——为什么呢？

firestarter.en: Don't ruin your fair makeup with ashes, %s.

ghost.en: Meditate on Hoenir's blessings, %s. I'll find a heart.
ghost.trans: %s，默念贺尼尔的赐福。我会找到心。

murderer.en: May we meet again in Valhalla!
murderer.trans: 愿我们在英灵殿再见！

attacker.en: Do you bite your thumb at me, mime?
attacker.trans: 小丑，你是在向我挑衅吗？

generic.en: Good health to you, %s!

somehoney.en: Pithy honey. More patience is needed.
somehoney.trans: 只有一点蜂蜜。需要耐心。

generic.en: The old crone would take my head if I dared steal a drop of honey.
generic.trans: 要是发现我偷蜂蜜，丑老太婆一定会灭了我。

cabbagerolls.en: Begone foul cabbage, I shall feast on the meat within.
cabbagerolls.trans: 退散吧，臭白菜，我要吃里面的肉。

burning.en: By the gods, that fishbowl's ablaze!
burning.trans: 诸神啊，那个鱼缸烧着了！

generic.en: I will stand victorious!

quagmire_altar_bollard.en: 'Tis a post. Unworthy of mine attention.
quagmire_altar_bollard.trans: 这是一根柱子，不值得我的关注。

leif_sparse.en: That is an ancient woodland being.
leif_sparse.trans: 那是一个古老的林地生物。

fence_electric_item.en: Let us establish a bastion fit for the thunder god!
fence_electric_item.trans: 让我们为雷神筑起一座堡垒！

bugnet.en: To snatch insects from the air.

yotr_food2.en: I do not trust whatever lies within.

yotr_food1.en: Bah! 'Tis naught but a meat-shaped veggie cake!

palmcone_sapling.en: May you grow tall and strong.

lavaarena_armorlightspeed.en: The wearer shalt be fleet of foot.

slingshotammo_slow.en: What fun is a battle without hand to hand combat?
slingshotammo_slow.trans: 没有肉搏的战斗，何来乐趣？

broken_forgeditem.trans: 虽然受到重创，但并没有失败！

wagboss_robot_creation_parts.en: Bestow upon it its rightful arms!

book_rain.en: It speaks of ways to appease Freyr.
book_rain.trans: 里面提及了安抚芙蕾雅的办法。

generic.en: Who are you?

fruitflyfruit.en: Now I am chieftain of the wee winged garden beasts!
fruitflyfruit.trans: 现在我就是花园里的小翼兽的首领！

deer_antler.en: The unicorn's horn, in the flesh!

bodypillow_beefalowool.en: It is filled with the hair of the woolen beasties.
bodypillow_beefalowool.trans: 里面装满了毛绒野兽的头发。

merm_prince.en: Thou art certain he is fit to be leader?
merm_prince.trans: 尔等肯定他适合当领袖吗？

lucy.en: It's nice, but it's no spear.

frogfishbowl.en: My ally is a god among men.

mosquitomusk.en: 'Tis rather useful for a foul little doll.
mosquitomusk.trans: 这小臭布偶还怪有用的。

walkingplank_grass.en: I shall never abandon my vessel!

desiccant.en: I hath been warned by my allies not to taste it.
desiccant.trans: 盟友警告我切莫品尝此物。

valid.en: It will harness my awesome speed.
valid.trans: 它将利用我极快的速度。

ghost.en: A heart! A heart! My base for a heart!
ghost.trans: 一颗心！一颗心！我的心灵基地！

firestarter.en: I'll not question your wisdom, %s.

murderer.en: Murderer! Face me in battle!
murderer.trans: 你这个杀人凶手！来和我作战吧！

attacker.en: If %s is looking for trouble, I shall oblige!
attacker.trans: 要是%s找麻烦，我应该效劳！

reviver.en: The wisdom of Wotan dwells within you, %s.

generic.en: Good health and wisdom to you, elder %s!
generic.trans: 我尊敬的%s，愿您健康明智！

quagmire_fern.en: Tis not food fit for a god.
quagmire_fern.trans: 这不适合作为神的供品。

maxwellthrone.en: I prefer to roam free, my unicorn and I.
maxwellthrone.trans: 我和我的独角兽偏爱自在地漫游。

generic.en: A miniature frozen mountain.

waterballoon.en: Prepare to engage in water-y battle!

veggieomlet.en: Bah! The eggs have been spoiled by non-meats!

wortox_reviver.en: Impish magic has power over death?
wortox_reviver.trans: 小恶魔的魔法拥有掌控死亡的力量？

bodypillow_kelp.trans: 这是一个来自尼约德领地的枕头。

featherfan.en: The luxuries of camp, on the go.

generic.en: A Viking warrior can tell the time by the position of the sun.
generic.trans: 维京勇士可以通过太阳的位置来判断时间。

mast_malbatross_item.en: A winged sail for my vessel.

handpillow_petals.en: As good a use as any for flimsy petals.
handpillow_petals.trans: 不堪一击的花瓣也就这点用了。

scanning.en: Thou hast the prey in thine sights.

hunting.en: Aha! Thou art on the hunt!

generic.en: Hail, wee metal scout!
generic.trans: 为金属侦察小兵欢呼吧！

generic.en: I've no desire to visit Hel today.

full.en: It's more packed than the Thingvellir!
full.trans: 这里比辛格维利尔还拥挤！

nightmarepie.en: I am wary of this pie.

mutator_water.en: They look like the little beasts, but lack the ferocity.
mutator_water.trans: 它们虽然看起来像小野兽，但却缺少了它们的凶猛。

rocky.en: He may be a worthy combat comrade.
rocky.trans: 他也许是一位值得尊敬的战友。

archive_moon_statue.trans: 这些人曾经称赞过玛尼。

kitcoon_deciduous.en: A wee beastie with a talent for mischief.
kitcoon_deciduous.trans: 一个具有恶作剧天赋的小野兽。

peghook.en: You will be felled this day.

butter.en: Butter. Might it be good on steak?

molehill.trans: 有狡猾的东西住在那下面。

panflute.en: I prefer to face my enemies awake.

lavaarena_battlestandard.en: Let us down the enemy's standard!
lavaarena_battlestandard.trans: 让我们拿下敌人的旗帜！

chesspiece_deerclops.en: Our fight shall be made ballad.
chesspiece_deerclops.trans: 后人会用歌谣称颂我们的战斗。

saltlick_improved.en: So the meat can season itself.
saltlick_improved.trans: 这样，肉就能自己调味了。

dug_marsh_bush.en: I should like to see that returned to the earth goddess.

lots_of_flowers_blossom.en: Call'th to memory the lays of the Havfrue.
lots_of_flowers_blossom.trans: 唤起我对美人鱼歌谣的回忆。

some_flowers.trans: 鲜花确实会取悦这个精灵。

generic.en: A small langhús for the ghostly warrior to regain her strength.
generic.trans: 能让亡灵勇士重获力量的小长屋。

quagmire_swampig.en: You would make a most honorable warrior.
quagmire_swampig.trans: 你可以成为一名光荣的战士。

dock_kit.en: I shall make a harbor worthy of my vessel.
dock_kit.trans: 我将建造一个与我的船相称的港口。

durian_cooked.en: What was the purpose of cooking this?

mast_malbatross.en: Let us be off, with the speed of the Valkyrie!
mast_malbatross.trans: 让我们飞驰吧，以女武神瓦尔基里的速度！

wobster_den.en: The lair of the pinchy beasts.

quagmire_saltrock.en: Tis the salt of the earth.

bomb_lunarplant.en: I have made the plant's power my own.
bomb_lunarplant.trans: 我已经把植物的力量化为己有。

surfnturf.en: Nothing goes better with meat than more meat!
surfnturf.trans: 肉搭配肉就是最好的美味！

amulet.en: It's red, and a fighter. Just like me!
amulet.trans: 它是红色的，一个战士。就像我一样！

ripe.en: I have no need for your fake meat.

generic.en: Meat impostor!

diseasing.en: It is weakening before mine eyes!

burning.trans: 被激情的火焰燃烧殆尽！

diseased.trans: 疾病在它的灵魂里恶化。

generic.en: A fruit bush.

barren.en: Should we put some turds on it?
barren.trans: 我们应该在它上面放些粪便吗？

sculpture_rooknose.en: It has strayed from the warrior's path.
sculpture_rooknose.trans: 它已经偏离战士的路了。

refined_dust.en: The dust hath been forged into a solid block.
refined_dust.trans: 尘埃已被锻造成坚固的块状。

turnip_cooked.en: Ach! I shall not eat thee!

buzzard.en: You and I, we meat feast together.
buzzard.trans: 你和我，我们一起大块吃肉。

shadowthrall_mouth.en: I shall wipe that grin off thine face.
shadowthrall_mouth.trans: 我要把你脸上的笑容抹掉。

fence_gate_item.en: Not for fortification. Merely the farm.
fence_gate_item.trans: 没有防御作用。仅仅是个农场。

walkingplank_yotd.en: Nay, a Viking doesn't quit so easily!
walkingplank_yotd.trans: 不，维京人绝不轻易放弃！

orangeamulet.en: Gathering has never been so easy.
orangeamulet.trans: 拾取物品从未如此简单。

mushroomhat.en: This helm runs flush with the forest's magic!
mushroomhat.trans: 这个舵柄在森林魔法的帮助下运行得很顺利！

nutrientsgoggleshat.en: I care not for learning about that which sprouts from the dirt.
nutrientsgoggleshat.trans: 我才不想知道泥土里会钻出什么来。

minifan.en: The chilling breeze reminds me of my frigid home.
minifan.trans: 寒风使我记起我那寒冷的老家。

tapped_empty.en: I've no patience for thee, sap!
tapped_empty.trans: 我对你可没什么耐心，汁液！

generic.en: The nectar of the gods dwells within.
generic.trans: 献给诸神的蜜汁就在里面。

tapped_bugs.en: It hath been fouled by tiny beasts!

generic.en: 'Tis not a door for a warrior of my size.
generic.trans: 这扇门不适合我这样体型的战士。

thulecitebugnet.en: Not even the smallest of prey shall escape.
thulecitebugnet.trans: 哪怕是最小的猎物也休想逃脱。

winter_ornamentlight.en: Tis a light enchantment, trapped inside a glass ball.
winter_ornamentlight.trans: 这是光的魔法，被困在玻璃球里面。

boatrace_seastack_throwable_deploykit.en: I must cast it into the sea!

lava_pond_rock.en: Stone belched forth by the earth's fiery heart!
lava_pond_rock.trans: 石头被地球的火热之心喷出去了！

hermit_pearl.en: I shall protect it with my life!

tomato.en: It will not pass my lips!

pickaxe_lunarplant.en: Neither stone nor structure shall stand in my way!
pickaxe_lunarplant.trans: 管你是石头还是建筑，什么都别想拦住我！

wall_moonrock_item.trans: 我们的堡垒应该坚不可摧！

generic.en: Mini beastie.

oceanfishinglure_hermit_heavy.en: Only the greatest of fish will dare take a bite!

generic.en: The gods are pleased!

empty.en: What doth thou need?

cooldown.en: The Bifrost is sealed, but for how long?
cooldown.trans: 彩虹桥暂时被封印了，不过封印能持续多久呢？

spawn_disabled.en: The monster shall not terrorize this realm again!
spawn_disabled.trans: 这个怪物不会再在这个王国肆虐了！

enabled.en: Behold! The glory of the Bifrost!!

generic.en: I can feel the Bifrost's warmth from inside it!
generic.trans: 我可以从它里面感受到彩虹桥的温暖!

lavaarena_lightdamagerhat.en: Horns, sharp as the spear of the Valkyrie.
lavaarena_lightdamagerhat.trans: 这些角就像女武神瓦尔基里的矛一样锋利。

generic.en: Charge!!

locked.en: Thou shalt not keep me out!

generic.en: Valhalla's gate is opened to me.
generic.trans: 英灵殿的大门向我敞开了。

trunkvest_summer.en: It will not suffice in the frozen wastes.
trunkvest_summer.trans: 在冰冻荒原上不能只用这个。

dead.en: Cut down in battle, like so many before it.
dead.trans: 在战斗中被砍倒，如同它的前辈一样。

generic.en: Eight legs and still no match for me!
generic.trans: 哪怕你有八条腿也不是我的对手！

sleeping.en: I will give it a fair fight by waiting til it awakes.
sleeping.trans: 我会等待它醒来与我公平一战。

quagmire_beefalo.en: Its days of war are past.
quagmire_beefalo.trans: 它作战的日子已成往事。

generic.en: A castle fit for a queen.

woby_treat.en: Woby doth deserve all manner of fine victuals and sweetmeats.
woby_treat.trans: 沃比值得享用各色美食和甜点。

generic.en: Wee warriors! I don't know if I like them.
generic.trans: 小小的勇士们！我会喜欢它们吗?

multiplayer_portal.en: It makes me long for the stage!

record_worktobedone.en: Music is nourishment for thy soul!

potatosack.en: I have no use for a sack of non-meats.

poison.en: This firewood will take a bit of extra work.
poison.trans: 这柴火得多花一点功夫才能点燃。

chopped.en: Chopped by the warrior of the woods!
chopped.trans: 被森林中的勇士所砍倒！

generic.en: Future firewood!

wagstaff_item_1.en: He hath left his gauntlet in our realm.

wagstaff_item_2.en: These runes hath taken physical form.

yotc_seedpacket_rare.en: The rarity of these non-meats doth not impress me.
yotc_seedpacket_rare.trans: 再稀奇，只要不是肉，我就没兴趣。

mermwatchtower_regular.en: 'Tis a fine fortress for a fish beast.

generic.en: This mushroom needs to be retired.

acidcovered.en: The smell fills me with loathing.
acidcovered.trans: 这种气味让我满是厌恶。

lumpy_sapling.en: It brings shame to the might of Yggdrasil.
lumpy_sapling.trans: 它玷污了世界树的力量。

generic.en: I prefer weapons at close range.
generic.trans: 我更喜欢近距离的武器。

oceanfishingbobber_malbatross.trans: 尼约德，指引我的鱼线吧！

figatoni.en: I will not sully my warrior tastebuds with such filth.
figatoni.trans: 绝不能让此等污物脏了本战士的味蕾。

lost_toy_42.en: It hath the stench of death upon it.

lost_toy_43.en: It hath the stench of death upon it.

wobster_sheller_dead.trans: 在英灵殿安息吧，穿着盔甲的家伙。

armor_voidcloth.trans: 这套服装必将招致癫狂……

winter_ornamentboss.en: Tis not a celebration without a good battle!
winter_ornamentboss.trans: 没有一场精彩的战斗就算不上庆典！

fishmeat_small.en: This sea meat will serve me well.
fishmeat_small.trans: 这块海鲜肉可以让我好好享用一番。

waterpump.en: We hath safeguarded our vessel against a fiery end.
waterpump.trans: 我们已经保护了我们的船，使它免于被烧毁。

tacklesketch.en: This scroll bears hidden secrets of fishing!
tacklesketch.trans: 这个卷轴记载着捕鱼秘籍！

support_pillar.en: This noble pillar hath withstood much for our sakes.
support_pillar.trans: 这根崇高的支柱为了我们经受住很多考验。

taffy.en: Long will the saga of this taffy be told.
taffy.trans: 这块太妃糖的传奇将流传千古。

justeggs.en: A simple meal, but a good one.

mast_yotd_item.en: To harness the winds upon mine vessel!

antler.en: Skadi has bestowed a gift on Freya's creature.
antler.trans: 斯卡蒂授予了芙蕾雅的生物一种天赋。

generic.en: The beauty of Freya dwells in all creatures!
generic.trans: 芙蕾雅的美丽在所有生物身上都看得见！

flower_evil.en: A terrible evil plagues this flora.
flower_evil.trans: 可怕的邪恶污染了这朵花。

mask_foolhat.en: 'Tis cowardly to hide one's face behind a mask!
mask_foolhat.trans: 把脸藏在面具之下是懦弱的行为！

cooking_long.en: My belly rumbles... make haste, cookpot!
cooking_long.trans: 我的肚皮在咕咕叫……麻利点，锅子！

done.en: Is there meat to be consumed?

generic.en: Cooking, a noble profession.

empty.en: Not even a morsel left inside...

quagmire_rubble_cathedral.en: 'Twas the site of a vicious raid.
quagmire_rubble_cathedral.trans: 这里曾是一场激烈战斗的现场。

lost_toy_10.en: It hath the stench of death upon it.

portabletent.trans: 这的确是一个很好的庇护所！

lost_toy_11.en: It hath the stench of death upon it.

generic.en: Tis a gate betwixt realms.
generic.trans: 这是不同世界之间的门。

on.en: We dive, back into the ether!

lost_toy_14.en: It hath the stench of death upon it.

generic.en: An empty vessel.

hermitcrabtea_foliage.en: A potion to keep madness at bay.
hermitcrabtea_foliage.trans: 一种将疯狂拒之门外的药剂。

burning.en: Alas! My hunting excursions will go unregaled!
burning.trans: 哎！我的狩猎短途旅行不会被公开的！

generic.en: What legends might I find within these maps?
generic.trans: 照着这些地图我能找到什么样的传说呢？

burnt.en: I've no choice but to act out my directions now.
burnt.trans: 除了跟着自己的方向感，我已别无选择。

twiggy_old.en: It will soon return to the earth.

durian_oversized.en: It gives off a powerful stink.

thulecite_pieces.trans: 看上去像发亮的爆米花。

stale.en: It's beginning to take on a powerful odor.
stale.trans: 开始有了强大的气味了。

generic.en: A weak brew for the non-meats.
generic.trans: 给非肉的孱弱的发酵物。

mutateddeerclops.en: The beast hath been changed by strange magicks!
mutateddeerclops.trans: 这只野兽被异魔法改变了！

support_pillar_dreadstone.en: This noble pillar hath withstood much for our sakes.
support_pillar_dreadstone.trans: 这根崇高的支柱为了我们经受住很多考验。

has_loot.en: There is loot for the taking.

generic.en: Empty, alas.
You will bend to my blade, toadstool!
generic.trans: 你会在我的刀刃下屈服，毒菌！

empty.en: A cleft in the earth.

lavaarena_bernie.en: The call of battle has arisen in thee!

bernie_big.en: The beast hath been imbued with a fighting spirit!

spidereggsack.en: Squashing these would be a waste of future battles.
spidereggsack.trans: 毁掉这些，省得日后战斗。

garlic_seeds.en: 'Tis a handful of seeds, for not-meat.
garlic_seeds.trans: 这一把种子，可以做成非肉类食物。

wx78_scanner_succeeded.en: Metal warrior! The scout's report is complete!
wx78_scanner_succeeded.trans: 金属战士！侦察兵已送回报告！

hermit_bundle_shells.en: A fresh bounty of shells to adorn our battlements.
hermit_bundle_shells.trans: 用贝壳作为我们战斗的犒赏吧。

gargoyle_werepig.en: Do not cower behind your carapace of rock! Fight!
gargoyle_werepig.trans: 不要蜷缩在你的岩石外壳中！打一架吧！

canary_poisoned.en: What plague has besieged this innocent woodland creature?
canary_poisoned.trans: 什么瘟疫围困了森林里的无辜生物？

block.en: May the muses guide our hands!
block.trans: 希望缪斯指导我们的双手！

sculpture.en: The muses have been kind this day.

empty.en: A transformative altar for the stone gods.
empty.trans: 石头诸神用来变形的祭坛。

has_character.en: Bestow succor upon that poor soul, lest they perish in that cursed tar.
has_character.trans: 救助那个可怜的灵魂，免得他们在那被诅咒的焦油中灭亡。

generic.en: Cursed nectar of Helheim!

minotaur.trans: 我可是见过大世面的。来决斗吧！

lavaarena_rechargerhat.trans: 魔法石头，给我的灵魂赐予力量吧！

lost_toy_18.en: It hath the stench of death upon it.

walrus.en: Those tusks could pierce even the finest armor.
walrus.trans: 那些海象牙可以刺穿最好的盔甲。

lost_toy_19.en: It hath the stench of death upon it.

bloom.en: I'll fight alongside you any day!
bloom.trans: 我会一直在你身边共同战斗！

generic.en: I don't care for mushrooms.

acidcovered.en: The smell fills me with loathing.
acidcovered.trans: 这种气味让我满是厌恶。

elixir_container.en: The elixirs dost soothe her spirit.
elixir_container.trans: 这些药剂确实能慰籍她的心灵。

generic.en: Who will face me in the field of battle?

monkeyisland_portal_debris.en: It doth not seem to belong here.

wx78module_taser.en: These boons shall empower our metal warrior.
wx78module_taser.trans: 这些恩赐将使我们的金属战士变得更强。

jellybean.en: The yield of an industrious candy farmer.

watermelonicle.en: You cannot fool me by hiding in frozen fruit, stick.
watermelonicle.trans: 你藏在冰冻的水果里骗不到我，棍子。

madscience_lab.en: Be there method to this madness?
madscience_lab.trans: 有什么办法对付这种疯狂吗？

prime_mate.en: Art thou the captain of this ship? Then you shall go down with it!
prime_mate.trans: 你是这艘船的船长吗？那你就跟着船一起沉入海底吧！

gas.en: 'Tis a fetor that doth offend thy very senses!
gas.trans: 恶臭至此，诸感官无不被侵犯！

hot.en: There is no furnace nor frost that shall halt my spear!
hot.trans: 管你是熔炉还是寒霜，皆不能阻挡吾之长矛！

generic.en: What cometh may bring naught but ruin.

yotb.en: Mayhaps the judge would like to look upon it.
yotb.trans: 也许应该让评委过目一下。

generic.en: A stuffed effigy of a valiant steed!
They reveal visions to my ally. I just hope she remains wary.
generic.trans: 它为我的盟友提供视野。我只希望她保持警惕。

wagpunk_cagewall.en: Let no soul flee the arena!
wagpunk_cagewall.trans: 没有一个灵魂可以逃离此竞技场！

ancient_altar.en: These crafts had better be good.

garlic_oversized.en: Its enlarged form offends my eyes.
garlic_oversized.trans: 它变大的形状脏了我的双眼。

burnt.trans: 巨型胡萝卜，终于摆脱你了。

generic.en: What's to be done with a carrot that big?
generic.trans: 该拿那么大的胡萝卜怎么办？

livingtree.en: A tree of life, but it is not Yggdrasil.
livingtree.trans: 一棵生命之树，但它并不是世界树。

hostile.trans: 终于啊。就让我们一战吧。

buried.en: It pains me to see a worthy adversary in such a state.
buried.trans: 见到可敬的对手落得如此下场，余心甚痛。

generic.en: The calm before the storm.

oceanfishingbobber_goose.trans: 尼约德，指引我的鱼线吧！

gears.en: Those might look nice glued to my helm.
gears.trans: 那些东西粘在我的头盔上也许挺好看。

wagstaff_machinery.en: Be these the remains of a sacked outpost?
wagstaff_machinery.trans: 难道是被洗劫一空的前哨的遗迹吗？

tacklecontainer.en: A wise hunter treats their tools with care.
tacklecontainer.trans: 威武的猎人会小心呵护自己的工具。

boat_cannon_kit.en: We must be prepared for a battle at sea.

dustmeringue.en: This food is not fit for a warrior, it's fit for the floor!
dustmeringue.trans: 这种食物不适合战士吃，适合铺在地上！

yotb.en: Mayhaps the judge would like to look upon it.
yotb.trans: 也许应该让评委过目一下。

generic.en: A stuffed effigy of a valiant steed!

bandage_butterflywings.en: If I had a bandage for every mere flesh wound...
bandage_butterflywings.trans: 要是每次皮肉伤我都要上绷带……

generic.en: A mechanical hunting hound. For the hunt.

warmer.en: The hound is excited. We're getting close.
warmer.trans: 猎犬很兴奋。我们正在靠近。

shallow_grave.trans: 当为逝者提供更好的安息之所。

lots_of_kelp.en: 'Tis enough to gorge themselves to the gills!
lots_of_kelp.trans: 足够它们把鳃帮子都吃撑了！

generic.en: The fish beasts hunger for that vile weed of the sea.
generic.trans: 鱼类猛兽渴求海中的可恶杂草。

tentacle_pillar_hole.en: The lair of my tallest foe!

yotb.en: Mayhaps the judge would like to look upon it.
yotb.trans: 也许应该让评委过目一下。

generic.en: A stuffed effigy of a valiant steed!

burnt.trans: 诸神一定要夺走一切吗？

generic.en: I hope she'll hold.

moon_altar_glass.en: What doth thou want, fair jewel?
moon_altar_glass.trans: 美丽的珠宝，汝意欲何为？

kitcoondecor1_kit.en: Fear not beasties, it will be constructed forthwith!
kitcoondecor1_kit.trans: 不要害怕，小野兽们，它马上就会建成。

perdfan.en: Tis a fan for mine hand.

generic.en: Alone, it falters. Among its kin, it thrives.
generic.trans: 孤军难奋战。聚齐同族，方可兴旺。

linked.en: It conjures a defensive permimeter worthy of Thor!
linked.trans: 它筑起了令索尔骄傲的防阵！

hermithouse_ornament.en: By the wind's touch, it doth dance.

kitcoon_nametag.en: To me, tiny beastie! I shall gift thee with a warrior's name!
kitcoon_nametag.trans: 你是我的小野兽！我将赐你一个战士的名字！

watermelon_oversized.en: Was this grown by a jotunn?

quagmire_portal_key.trans: 这是通往另一个世界的钥匙。

ancientfruit_nightvision.en: It writhes upon the ground! Be it berry or beast?!
ancientfruit_nightvision.trans: 它在地上蠕动！此物似浆果又似野兽？！

miniboatlantern.en: The small vessel shall light my way.
miniboatlantern.trans: 这个小东西将会为我照亮前路。

bundle.en: Ready to take on an epic saga.
bundle.trans: 准备开始一次史诗级的冒险。

slingshot_band_pigskin.en: The young scout doth come into his own.
slingshot_band_pigskin.trans: 年轻的童子军已经开始独当一面了。

pavlova.en: Once the berries hath been removed, tis a fine dessert indeed.
pavlova.trans: 拿掉浆果后，它就是一道精美甜点。

firehound.en: The flamed one has no mercy.

pickledherring.en: A briny taste of the sea!

generic.en: Perhaps science can enhance my combat skills.
generic.trans: 也许科学能提高我的战斗技巧。

slingshotammo_scrapfeather.en: What fun is a battle without hand to hand combat?
slingshotammo_scrapfeather.trans: 没有肉搏的战斗，何来乐趣？

generic.en: A mystical thing.

burnt.en: Its strange power did not protect it from fire.
burnt.trans: 它虽有怪异的能力，但还是被烧成了灰。

burnt.en: No more meat will come from here!

generic.en: It is an absurd machine that makes meat.

lantern.en: A lantern to hold back the night.

moon_altar_crown.en: I wonder how that creature got his claws on this?
moon_altar_crown.trans: 不知道那个生物是怎么拿到这个的？

slingshot_frame_wagpunk.en: The young scout doth come into his own.
slingshot_frame_wagpunk.trans: 年轻的童子军已经开始独当一面了。

moon_altar_astral.en: I hear the whispers of Mani.

eyeofterror_mini_grounded.en: I will prepare myself for the coming challenge!
eyeofterror_mini_grounded.trans: 我会为即将到来的挑战做好准备！

alterguardian_phase3trap.en: Only a coward would strike a foe down while they sleep!
alterguardian_phase3trap.trans: 只有懦夫才会在敌人睡觉的时候趁人不备!

carnivalgame_herding_chick.en: Try to flee all you want, you will not escape me!
carnivalgame_herding_chick.trans: 你想怎么逃就怎么逃，但你逃不出我的手掌心！

rage.en: Give me your best shot, I'll not hold back!
rage.trans: 有什么本事都亮出来把，我不会退缩！

generic.en: Ha! Finally, a worthy foe!
generic.trans: 哈！终于来了个有价值的敌人！

wolfgang_whistle.en: My ally will get our forces fighting fit!
wolfgang_whistle.trans: 我的盟友会让我们的部队恢复战斗力！

rabbitkinghorn.en: The rabbit had best heed my call.
rabbitkinghorn.trans: 兔子最好听从我的召唤。

birdtrap.trans: 我就是聪明的渡鸦捕手！

broken.en: We must never forget our fallen comrades.
broken.trans: 永远都不能忘却已经倒下的同志们。

generic.en: Go forth to gather the spoils of war.

dug_monkeytail.en: Art thou plants or monkey parts? Make up thine mind!
dug_monkeytail.trans: 汝是植物还是猴子的器官？想清楚点！

turf_cotl_gold.en: The land is covered in riches!

saddlehorn.en: Mighty steeds can be unsaddled with this.

firestarter.en: %s toys with Hel's flames!

ghost.en: You've a warrior's spirit, but you're not ready for Valhalla yet!
ghost.trans: 虽然你有点战士精神，但是你还没有去英灵殿的资格！

murderer.en: I will not be defeated so easily, beastie!
murderer.trans: 我不会这么容易就被打败，小畜生！

attacker.en: Ah, you wish to test your mettle in combat? As you wish!
attacker.trans: 啊，你想在通过战斗练练手？如你所愿吧！

reviver.en: It seems you have a kind heart 'neath that scaly hide.
reviver.trans: 看起来你粗糙的鳞片下面还是藏了一颗善良的心。

generic.en: Hail, %s, small beastie of the marshlands!
generic.trans: 注意了，%s，你这个沼泽小畜生！

lunar_grazer.en: I will not fall prey to your tricks, spirit!
lunar_grazer.trans: 我不会被你的诡计所迷惑，精灵！

chesspiece_minotaur.en: The beast guarded its treasure well, but not well enough.
chesspiece_minotaur.trans: 这条野兽虽然尽忠职守，但还是出了疏忽。

wx78module_nightvision.en: These boons shall empower our metal warrior.
wx78module_nightvision.trans: 这些恩赐将使我们的金属战士变得更强。

tumbleweed.trans: 逃吧，弹来弹去的胆小鬼！

pirate_flag_pole.en: The banner of the monkey raiders!

purplemooneye.trans: 奥丁的眼睛引导着我们的路。

burning.en: It shall not rise from these ashes.
burning.trans: 汝必于灰烬中泯灭，不得重生。

generic.en: A bad omen.

burnt.en: Serves you right for not growing meats!

generic.en: I can't grow meat, what's the point?
generic.trans: 我不能种肉，这有什么意义？

uncarved.en: This gourd doth lack a visage!

generic.en: The trickster children shall tremble as I don this ghoulish helm!
generic.trans: 当我戴上这恐怖头盔时，小捣蛋鬼们必将颤抖！

slingshot_handle_jelly.en: The young scout doth come into his own.
slingshot_handle_jelly.trans: 年轻的童子军已经开始独当一面了。

rock_petrified_tree.en: My mere presence struck terror into their tree-hearts!
rock_petrified_tree.trans: 我一出现就让这些树胆战心惊！

bodypillow_steelwool.en: Only the strong-willed could sleep on such a thing.
bodypillow_steelwool.trans: 只有意志坚强的人才能睡在这种东西上。

scorched_skeleton.en: Rest easy, spirit. Your fight is over.
scorched_skeleton.trans: 小精灵，放宽心。你的战争结束了。

festivefish.en: Let us celebrate the season by feasting on fish flesh!
festivefish.trans: 我们来吃鱼肉庆祝这个季节！

kitcoon_marsh.en: A wee beastie with a weapon equipped to its tail. Ferocious!
kitcoon_marsh.trans: 一个尾巴装备了武器的小野兽。凶猛！

costume_king_body.en: I have my own costu- that is, warrior's garb!
costume_king_body.trans: 我有自己的戏——我是说，战士服！

generic.en: A Viking warrior can tell the time by the position of the sun.
generic.trans: 维京勇士可以通过太阳的位置来判断时间。

tamales.en: Oh ho! This bready wrap hides a morsel of spiced meat!
tamales.trans: 噢！这个面包片裹着香辣味的肉！

following.en: With me, warrior! Onward to glory!
following.trans: 随我来，勇士！向荣耀进军！

generic.en: Come, rogue knight, be tested!
generic.trans: 来吧，流浪骑士，接受试炼！

pigskin.en: The hide of a pig creature.

dragonfruit_oversized.en: Alas, you are fruit, not meat.

hammer.en: More fit for labor than battle.
hammer.trans: 更适合劳作而不是战斗。

yotd_oar.en: I will swipe at the waves with the ferocity of a dragon!
yotd_oar.trans: 我将以龙的凶猛之势劈波斩浪！

wagpunkbits_kit.en: How may one kill with this?

voidcloth_boomerang.en: There will be no escape for my foes.

wagdrone_beacon.en: It doth form a wall unseen? Witchcraft!
wagdrone_beacon.trans: 此物竟能筑无形之墙？巫术也！

dumbbell_bluegem.en: My ally wields a strange weapon, indeed.
dumbbell_bluegem.trans: 我的盟友使用的武器着实是有点奇怪。

berrysauce.en: It looks like vile berries but... that smell... could it be meat?
berrysauce.trans: 闻起来像是该死的浆果，但那气味……是肉吗？

eyeofterror.en: Be it the plucked eye of Odin, returned for revenge?
eyeofterror.trans: 难道是奥丁被拔掉的眼睛回来报仇了？

nightsword.en: It takes a brave warrior to wield this sword.
nightsword.trans: 只有勇敢的战士才能运用这件武器。

playing.en: A test of one's mental prowess!

generic.en: It requires a token to prove my worthiness.
generic.trans: 它需要一代币来证明我的价值。

generic.en: It's a stuffed beast.

oar_monkey.en: In a true warrior's hands, anything might be a weapon.
oar_monkey.trans: 在一个真正的战士手中，任何东西都能成为武器。

voidcloth.trans: 倒下的敌人留下的遗物。

moon_altar_rock_glass.en: The gods call me to it, I shall not resist.
moon_altar_rock_glass.trans: 诸神召唤我于此，我不会忤逆。

monkey_mediumhat.en: The helm of one who knows the sea.

occupied.en: This beastie is ready for its dress rehearsal.
occupied.trans: 这只野兽已经准备好进行彩排了。

generic.en: Preparing for the stage is nearly as exhilarating as preparing for battle!
generic.trans: 备战舞台，几乎和备战战斗一样振奋人心!

walrus_tusk.en: Rended from the mouth of the sea beast.

cave_banana_tree.trans: 一棵弱不经风的猴子树。

chopped.en: Another must be planted to maintain the balance of this realm.
chopped.trans: 为了保持这个世界的平衡，得再种一棵。

generic.en: A warrior tree.

beaverghost.en: You went out in a blaze of glory, %s.
beaverghost.trans: %s，你是在荣耀的火焰中毁灭的。

ghost.en: The worldtree watches over you, %s.
ghost.trans: %s，世界之树保佑你。

firestarter.en: Did he mistake "Loge" for "log"?

murderer.en: By Yggdrasil, I will cut you down!
murderer.trans: 以世界树之名，我会打败你！

mooseghost.en: Never fear, I'll return you to this realm!
mooseghost.trans: 别害怕，我会让你回到这个领域！

attacker.en: I could fell you like so many trees, %s.
attacker.trans: %s，我会像砍很多树一样砍了你。

gooseghost.en: Worry not, I won't let you leave for Valhalla looking like that!
gooseghost.trans: 不要怕，我不会让你就这样去英灵殿的。

moose.en: By the gods, I mistook you for a jötunn!
moose.trans: 诸神在上，我以为你是巨人呢！

beaver.en: I did not know %s possessed such power!
beaver.trans: 我不知道%s拥有这种能力！

reviver.en: %s's heart is as mighty as his beard.

generic.en: May Yggdrasil bind us as the nine worlds, %s!
generic.trans: 愿世界树同九界一般连结你我，%s！

eggplant_oversized.en: I've no use for vegetables, big or small.
eggplant_oversized.trans: 大大小小的蔬菜对我都没用。

mushgnome.en: Foul vegetable, you will taste my spear!
mushgnome.trans: 肮脏的蔬菜，你会尝到我长矛的厉害！

alterguardian_phase4_lunarrift.en: Unhallowed giant! Odin would pierce his lone eye at the sight of thee!
alterguardian_phase4_lunarrift.trans: 亵渎的巨人！奥丁的独眼将刺穿汝！

carnival_seedpacket.trans: 这是给鸟吃的，维京人可不吃。

burning.en: A mediocre offering to the gods.

generic.en: And it shall not be the last dead spider.
generic.trans: 这绝不会是最后一只死蜘蛛。

mutatedwarg.en: It is possessed by angry spirits!
mutatedwarg.trans: 它被愤怒的灵魂附体了！

sculpture_knighthead.en: Dost thou yearn for a body?

generic.en: A minor deterrent to attackers.
generic.trans: 针对袭击者的弱小阻碍物。

oceantree.en: It hath been hardened by the sea.

trinket_41.en: Perhaps some sort of elixir lies within?
trinket_41.trans: 也许里面藏着某种灵丹妙药？

trinket_40.en: I have no use for such things.
trinket_40.trans: 这种东西对我毫无用处。

trinket_43.en: What manner of creature be this?

trinket_42.en: Tis no foe worthy of I.

stafflight.trans: 看啊！来自至高神的礼物！

reflectivevest.en: Ha! The sun is no warrior if it cannot penetrate this.
reflectivevest.trans: 哈！如果太阳连这个都穿不透，就不算个勇士。

trinket_45.en: What stories might you tell, trapped spirit?
trinket_45.trans: 被困的灵魂，你有什么故事要说吗？

slingshotammo_lunarplanthusk.en: What fun is a battle without hand to hand combat?
slingshotammo_lunarplanthusk.trans: 没有肉搏的战斗，何来乐趣？

yotc_carrat_race_start_item.en: The race cannot commence without it!

slurtlehole.en: Not where I'd choose to hang my helm.
slurtlehole.trans: 我不会把头盔挂在这里。

chesspiece_wormboss.en: I shall never forget this hungry cave serpent.
chesspiece_wormboss.trans: 我永远不会忘记这条贪吃的洞穴巨蛇。

handpillow_beefalowool.en: It is filled with the hair of the woolen beasties.
handpillow_beefalowool.trans: 里面装满了毛绒野兽的头发。

voidcloth_kit.en: Even the sturdiest armor will sometimes need repairs.
voidcloth_kit.trans: 即使是最坚固的盔甲有时也需要修理。

chesspiece_claywarg.en: A testament to a worthy foe.

turf_dragonfly.en: A warm piece of the battlefield.

generic.en: Methinks these grounds are in need of adornment.
generic.trans: 吾认为这些场地需要装饰。

level_2.en: Make haste! The great Tree demands offerings of decorations!
level_2.trans: 赶快行动吧! 伟大的树需要装饰品！

trinket_32.en: Reveal mine destiny, oh great fates!
trinket_32.trans: 揭示我的命运，哦伟大的命运！

charged.en: The lightning has made you a unicorn warrior!
charged.trans: 闪电把你变成了独角兽勇士！

generic.en: May I call you Unicorn?

merm_armory.en: The armory of the fish beast warriors.

cooking_long.en: Might as well do something whilst I wait.
cooking_long.trans: 等待的时候也许可以做点什么。

empty.en: There is no meat inside, so I care not.

quagmire_tomato.en: Will this not anger the gods?

trinket_38.en: There is a tiny world trapped within!
trinket_38.trans: 里面困着一个小小的世界！

palmcone_seed.en: It must be returned to the earth.

trinket_37.trans: 为了避开洛基的随从们。

oceanvine_cocoon.en: The nest of the water walking beasts!
oceanvine_cocoon.trans: 这是水面行走的野兽的巢穴！

pepper_cooked.en: It is not worthy of my consumption.

trinket_39.en: To arms! The gauntlet has been thrown down!

trinket_33.en: The creature has been forever imprisoned upon the ring.
trinket_33.trans: 这生物已经被永远囚禁在指环上了。

trinket_36.en: Evidence of the undead. Stay wary, my allies!
trinket_36.trans: 不死生物的证据。保持警惕，我的盟友！

trinket_35.trans: 几乎可以确定那就是个毒药。

mosquitomermsalve.en: 'Tis the mark of a noble leader to care for her warriors so.
mosquitomermsalve.trans: 如此关爱战士，是高贵领袖的标志。

generic.en: Be you tasty?

houndstooth.en: A token of a successful conquest.

carnivalgame_feedchicks_nest.en: The home of the wood-hewn birds.

beequeen.en: Your monarchy shall topple this day!
beequeen.trans: 你的王朝今天会被推翻！

generic.en: A cold comfort.

out.trans: 火光摇摇曳曳地熄灭了。

playing.en: The little ball must be possessed by some mischievous spirit.
playing.trans: 小球一定是被某个恶作剧的精灵附身了。

generic.en: It requires a token to prove my worthiness.
generic.trans: 它需要一代币来证明我的价值。

moon_tree_blossom.en: Tis most beauteous in the moonlight.
moon_tree_blossom.trans: 在皎洁月光下最为动人。

trinket_21.en: Cooking utensils do not interest me.

trinket_20.en: Finally, a safe weapon with which to spar with my new allies.
trinket_20.trans: 最后，用安全的武器和我的新盟友们进行训练战斗。

carnival_gametoken.trans: 一个闪闪发光的友谊代币。

locked.en: I shall submit to the gods' judgment.

generic.en: What foul manner of chest is this?

pigelitefighter1.en: The warrior spirit runs deep within him.
pigelitefighter1.trans: 战士的血液流淌在他的内心深处。

pigelitefighter3.en: He shall not soil mine warrior reputation!
pigelitefighter3.trans: 他玷污不了我作为战士的名声！

trinket_27.en: This weak, flimsy wire reminds me... I must toughen Maxwell up!
trinket_27.trans: 这虚弱的金属丝提醒我…我得让麦斯威尔强大起来！

trinket_26.en: My allies will appreciate the survival training I've bestowed.
trinket_26.trans: 我的盟友会感激我为他们进行生存训练。

damaged.en: 'Tis dead but its parts may bring new life to another.
damaged.trans: 已死，然其零件或可予他物新生。

generic.en: Cursed iron harpies!

trinket_29.en: Even the feeble can wage mighty battle upon the board.
trinket_29.trans: 即使是弱者也可以在棋盘上发动强大的战争。

trinket_28.en: Even the feeble can wage mighty battle upon the board.
trinket_28.trans: 即使是弱者也可以在棋盘上发动强大的战争。

trinket_23.en: Not as useful as a battle horn.

trinket_22.en: It won't stand up to the rigors of battle.
trinket_22.trans: 它忍受不了战斗的严苛。

trinket_25.en: Perhaps the stench will drive the enemy away.
trinket_25.trans: 或许这恶臭能把敌人赶走。

trinket_24.en: Grant me luck on the battlefield!

ivy_snare.en: Ha! At least this plant hath some spirit!
ivy_snare.trans: 哈！这株植物还算有点精神！

icestaff3.en: A staff worthy of Skadi herself.
icestaff3.trans: 此杖堪配斯卡蒂本人亲执。

resurrectionstone.en: It holds me back from Valhalla.
resurrectionstone.trans: 它能把我从英灵殿拉回来。

generic.en: It does have admirable armor.

hutch.en: A loyal companion, if ever there were one.
hutch.trans: 忠诚的同伴，如果有一个的话。

glommerwings.en: Ohh, look what the goober left for me.
glommerwings.trans: 哦，看看毛毛球给我留下了什么。

slingshotammo_thulecite.en: What fun is a battle without hand to hand combat?
slingshotammo_thulecite.trans: 没有肉搏的战斗，何来乐趣？

monkeybarrel.trans: 里面装着什么样的怪物？

silk.en: Useful for binding, and for remembering victories past.
silk.trans: 可用于缝合东西和记住胜利事迹。

waterplant.en: Have we entered the realm of giants?
waterplant.trans: 我们是否已经进入了巨人的领域？

firestaff.en: That we might become Masters of Fire!
firestaff.trans: 那我们就能成为火焰大师了！

saddle_shadow.trans: 一个精美鞍具，用以杀戮。

brewing.en: The sea witch is brewing her concoction.
brewing.trans: 海巫婆正在酿造她的秘酿。

burnt.en: Methinks Odin craved the witch's brew.
burnt.trans: 我想定是奥丁也垂涎这巫婆之酿了。

generic.en: The sea witch hath abandoned her post!

dragontailhat.en: A beast is no beast without a tail.
dragontailhat.trans: 没有尾巴的野兽算不上野兽。

chesspiece_beefalo.en: A stone tribute to my faithful steed.
chesspiece_beefalo.trans: 这块石头在向我的忠诚坐骑致敬。

lighter.en: It lights the fires of mine heart!

trinket_18.en: I must mentor the young one in battle strategy.
trinket_18.trans: 我得教这年轻人战斗策略。

trinket_12.en: Remnants of Ms. Wicker's summons? Truly a fierce woman.
trinket_12.trans: 这是维克女士召唤的东西留下的？真是个猛女人。

trinket_11.en: A warrior encased in armor. I'm told its name is "Hal."
trinket_11.trans: 身着装甲的战士。有人告诉我他的名字叫“哈尔。”

sweetpotato.en: Marshmallows on meat... tis an odd choice, but somehow delicious!
sweetpotato.trans: 肉上面的棉花糖……古怪的搭配，但却异常美味！

trinket_14.en: Tea is a luxury that warriors cannot afford.
trinket_14.trans: 茶是战士们买不起的奢侈品。

rose.en: Were that I smelled half as sweet.

generic.en: A flower from Freya.

fishmeat.en: This sea meat will serve me well.
fishmeat.trans: 这块海鲜肉可以让我好好享用一番。

young.en: Grow strong, young one! It is your destiny!
young.trans: 强壮起来，年轻人！这是你们的命运！

candecorate.en: A majestic pine, worthy of celebration!
candecorate.trans: 一棵壮观的松树，值得庆祝！

burnt.en: Its beauty lives on in our hearts.
burnt.trans: 它的美丽活在我们心里。

lavaarena_heavyblade.en: A mighty blade for a mighty battle!
lavaarena_heavyblade.trans: 重量级的刀刃，用于重量级的战斗！

support_pillar_complete.en: A glorious monument to our resilience!
support_pillar_complete.trans: 为我们的韧性而建的光荣纪念碑！

firestarter.en: %s is sure to be scalded by Hel's flames!
firestarter.trans: %s必然会受到赫尔之火的制裁!

ghost.en: My dear friend hath fallen in battle!
ghost.trans: 我亲爱的好友已战死沙场。

murderer.en: I will root you out, monstrous plant!
murderer.trans: 我会把你斩草除根，可恶的植物！

attacker.en: Rumors of %s's terrible act have spread like weeds.
attacker.trans: %s恶劣行径的传闻像杂草一样到处传播。

reviver.en: %s is a kind and formidable healer.

generic.en: Greetings, %s, touched by Yggdrasil!
generic.trans: 你好，%s，被世界树触碰过的人!

slingshot_band_tentacle.en: The young scout doth come into his own.
slingshot_band_tentacle.trans: 年轻的童子军已经开始独当一面了。

petals_dried.en: T'would make a most worthy offering to the gods!
petals_dried.trans: 堪为敬奉诸神的顶级供品！

yotc_seedpacket.en: I care not for growing vegetables.

waffles.en: Waffles are no way to prepare for battle!
waffles.trans: 华夫饼不适合即将出战的勇士！

deerclops_eyeball.en: Delicious! I should like to share it with my new allies.
deerclops_eyeball.trans: 美味！我很想和我的新盟友分享。

burnt.en: The gods hath no need for chairs.

generic.en: A warrior doth not sit.

scrapbook_page.en: From whence hath you come, mysterious page?
scrapbook_page.trans: 你从哪里来，未解的篇章？

moonstorm_static.en: Tis a strange kind of power.

burnt.en: The measuring device has been slain by Loge.
burnt.trans: 测量装置被罗格干掉了。

generic.en: If only it measured the heat of battle.
generic.trans: 要是能测量战斗的热度就好了。

burnt.en: No use crying over burnt pelts.
burnt.trans: 为烧焦的毛皮哭泣并没有用。

generic.en: That's where I keep my furs and cloaks.
generic.trans: 那是我存放皮草和斗篷的地方。

antchovies.en: I wrested them from the sea.

wagboss_robot_possessed.trans: 这铁打的野兽被诅咒了！

moon_tree_blossom_dried.en: T'would make a most worthy offering to the gods!
moon_tree_blossom_dried.trans: 堪为敬奉诸神的顶级供品！

mask_princesshat.en: Lacking a warrior's visage, she yet commands.
mask_princesshat.trans: 虽无战士之面容，却仍发号施令。

burnt.en: The shrine itself offered to the implacable gods!
burnt.trans: 连神龛都献给了无情的诸神！

generic.en: The worm hath been appeased.

empty.en: The worm doth demand a worthy sacrifice.
empty.trans: 必须为蠕虫献上一份像样的供品。

1.en: Wouldst thou like a skritch behind thine ears?
1.trans: 你要不要在我摸摸你耳朵后面？

2.en: Wouldst thou like a skritch behind thine ears?
2.trans: 你要不要在我摸摸你耳朵后面？

pumpkinpie.en: Tis surely a delicious meat pie in disguise!
pumpkinpie.trans: 绝对是伪装的美味肉饼！

horseshoe.en: A warrior shapes her luck, yet spurning Odin's favor is folly.
horseshoe.trans: 战士自造运势，然拒奥丁之恩实为愚行。

archive_centipede_husk.en: This sentry seems to be asleep at its post.
archive_centipede_husk.trans: 一名在哨岗酣睡的哨兵。

crumbs.en: Telltale spoor left by a festive foe.
crumbs.trans: 一个喜庆的敌人留下的线索。

tentacle_garden.en: I will thrust my spear into that mass of tentacles!
tentacle_garden.trans: 我要把我的长矛掷向那一大堆触手！

carnivalgame_wheelspin_kit.en: It will be built with utmost speed.
carnivalgame_wheelspin_kit.trans: 它将以最快的速度建成。

watertree_root.en: What is it you seek, yon root?

oceanfishingbobber_ball.en: My keen hunter's eyes can detect the smallest nibble!
oceanfishingbobber_ball.trans: 我锐利的猎手之眼能察觉最轻微的咬钩！

shovel_lunarplant.en: The ground stands no chance against me.
shovel_lunarplant.trans: 我不会给大地任何机会。

cooldown.en: 'Tis sadly not a weapon, but I enjoy it nonetheless.
cooldown.trans: 虽然不是武器，我依然喜欢它。

generic.en: Be this a weapon of sorts?

burning.en: It shall not rise from these ashes.
burning.trans: 汝必于灰烬中泯灭，不得重生。

generic.en: A bad omen.

yotb.en: Mayhaps the judge would like to look upon it.
yotb.trans: 也许应该让评委过目一下。

generic.en: A stuffed effigy of a valiant steed!

picked.trans: 在它最茁壮的时候割下。

generic.en: Those are some hardy reeds.

crabking_icewall.en: Oh good. I worried it would be too easy.
crabking_icewall.trans: 好极了。我还担心会太容易呢。

livingtree_root.en: I hath birthed the root of terror!

generic.en: I prefer battle to science.
generic.trans: 比起科学我更喜欢战斗。

burning.trans: 总算摆脱了讨厌的家伙。

reviving.en: You've returned for a second helping of my steel, have you?
reviving.trans: 你回来是想再尝尝我的利刃吗？

generic.en: 'Tis but another fallen fish beast.
generic.trans: 不过是又一个倒下的鱼怪。

generic.en: A home fit for a fish beast.

mosquitosack.en: The blood will make me strong.

golden_farm_hoe.en: A tool far too magnificent for those worthless seeds.
golden_farm_hoe.trans: 那些毫无价值的种子配不上如此华丽的工具。

lunar_forge.en: I shall forge weapons to rival the gods themselves!
lunar_forge.trans: 我要锻造武器，与诸神一决高下！

rabbitkingspear.en: It shall be a delightful insult to mine enemies to perish by rabbit antler.
rabbitkingspear.trans: 如果我的敌人死于兔角，那将是一种令人愉快的侮辱。

gargoyle_hound.en: Shed your stone form and fight, beast!
gargoyle_hound.trans: 脱离你的石像形态来战斗吧，野兽！

generic.en: T'would be a fine place to keep my weapons.
generic.trans: 可以很好的存放我的武器。

shimmer.en: Doth my eyes deceive me? The chest casts jagged light!
shimmer.trans: 我的眼睛在欺骗我吗？那箱子居然投射出了锯齿状的光！

generic.en: A feat of strength in the making.

molebathill.en: Your mucousy defenses will not deter me, morsel!
molebathill.trans: 你们的粘液防御工事不会阻挡我的脚步，小肉肉！

forgetmelots_dried.en: T'would make a most worthy offering to the gods!
forgetmelots_dried.trans: 堪为敬奉诸神的顶级供品！

pinecone.en: This baby tree is well protected by spiky armor.
pinecone.trans: 这颗树宝宝受到多刺盔甲的良好保护。

quagmire_lamp_short.en: 'Tis a magic light of short stature.
quagmire_lamp_short.trans: 个头虽小，散发的是神奇之光。

firestarter.en: %s seems to have mistakenly fumbled a torch.

ghost.en: A valiant warrior should not be wasted. A heart, a heart!
ghost.trans: 不应该浪费英勇的战士。一颗心，一颗心！

murderer.en: You will pay for your heinous deeds, brute!
murderer.trans: 畜生，你会为你的滔天罪行遭报应！

attacker.en: %s packs a punch to rival a frost giant.

generic.en: Health and strength to you, %s!

boat_bumper_yotd.trans: 确实是令人生畏的防御！

mossling.en: You are not large enough to be a steed.
mossling.trans: 你还不够大，当不了坐骑。

battlesong_instant_revive.en: A melody lively enough to rouse the dead!
battlesong_instant_revive.trans: 生动的旋律足以唤醒亡者！

generic.en: It has risen!

lavaarena_lucy.en: Thy axe is filled with burning passion this day!
lavaarena_lucy.trans: 这把斧头在这一天充满了激情！

playing.en: A test of speed and stamina!

generic.en: It requires a token to prove my worthiness.
generic.trans: 它需要一代币来证明我的价值。

armordragonfly.en: Excellent armor for the heat of battle.
armordragonfly.trans: 绝佳盔甲，专用于火热战场。

generic.en: 'Tis empty.

little_walrus.en: A spawn of the evil toothed seal.
little_walrus.trans: 邪恶的长牙海豹的后代。

playing.en: Aha! It must be this one!

generic.en: The home of the wood-hewn eggs.

teleportato_ring.en: It appears to be similar to the Bifrost.

lavaarena_elemental.en: Thy fire giant shall fight by our side.
lavaarena_elemental.trans: 你这火巨人要跟我们并肩作战。

armor_carrotlure.en: 'Tis better to wear than eat them, I suppose.
armor_carrotlure.trans: 我认为这个最好是用来穿，不是用来吃的。

burning.en: May you be honored in your burning.
burning.trans: 愿你在燃烧中得到荣耀。

reviving.en: Rest was your right, not this accursed waking.
reviving.trans: 安息是你的权利，不是这该死的苏醒。

generic.en: Here lieth a worthy foe.
generic.trans: 此处躺着一个可敬的对手。

moonstorm_spark.en: It sends a curious tickle through my bones.
moonstorm_spark.trans: 它让我的骨头都痒痒的。

kitcoon_savanna.en: A wee beastie with the heart of a mighty beastie.
kitcoon_savanna.trans: 小野兽的身体内有一颗大野兽的心。

trunkvest_winter.en: The warm pelt of a bested creature. A fine garment.
trunkvest_winter.trans: 来自战败生物的温暖毛皮。不错的服装。

chesspiece_daywalker.en: The beast proved himself to be a worthy adversary!
chesspiece_daywalker.trans: 这只野兽证明了自己是一个有价值的对手！

pigguard.en: He is battle ready, I can tell.
pigguard.trans: 看得出来，他已经做好了战斗准备。

lucky_goldnugget.en: The unicorn smiles upon me this day!
lucky_goldnugget.trans: 今天独角兽朝我微笑了！

oceanfishinglure_spoon_blue.trans: 应该会引起它们的注意！

generic.en: I shall take no pleasure in destroying you, friend.
generic.trans: 朋友，毁灭你不会为我带来乐趣。

battlesong_sanityaura.en: A rousing anthem to inspire bravery in battle!
battlesong_sanityaura.trans: 一首振奋人心的赞歌，激励人们英勇战斗!

bibingka.en: Surely this loaf must be made of meat!
bibingka.trans: 这块面包一定是肉做的！

twiggy_nut.en: It will one day rival Yggdrasil!
twiggy_nut.trans: 有一天，它能和世界树一样茁壮！

soil_amender_fermented.en: Perhaps the non-meats are stronger that I thought, to consume such a thing...
soil_amender_fermented.trans: 也许非肉的力量比我想象中的强大，它们居然能消耗这东西……

chesspiece_stalker.en: A hard stone monument to a hard fought battle.
chesspiece_stalker.trans: 一块坚硬的石碑，纪念一场硬仗。

alterguardian_phase1_lunarrift_gestalt.en: It striketh mine eyes with unparalleled radiance.
alterguardian_phase1_lunarrift_gestalt.trans: 它以无与伦比的光辉刺痛吾眼。

tomato_cooked.en: It boasts reddest guts, yet 'tis not meat!
tomato_cooked.trans: 它的内部红通通的，却不是肉！

ghost.en: A spirit trapped between worlds.
ghost.trans: 困于两个世界之间的灵魂。

skullchest.en: Ah, that was a good battle.

mast_yotd.en: May it catch the wind as well as a dragon's wing.
mast_yotd.trans: 愿它像龙翼一样迎风翱翔。

yellowamulet.en: A star, captured within an amulet.

shadowthrall_horns.en: All thou shall taste is the bite of my spear!

lost_toy_1.en: It hath the stench of death upon it.

lost_toy_2.en: It hath the stench of death upon it.

pigelite3.en: He shall not soil mine warrior reputation!
pigelite3.trans: 他玷污不了我作为战士的名声！

pigelite1.en: The warrior spirit runs deep within him.
pigelite1.trans: 战士的血液流淌在他的内心深处。

dug_grass.en: I should like to see that returned to the earth goddess.

lost_toy_7.en: It hath the stench of death upon it.

fruitmedley.en: Ugh! Putting it into a cup doesn't fool me.
fruitmedley.trans: 呃！把它装进杯子里也骗不到我。

piggyback.en: The pig died with honor, then gave to me this pack.
piggyback.trans: 那只猪光荣战死，然后把这个背包给了我。

carrat_good.en: This beast will serve me well in the coming battle.

generic.en: We shall see just how strong my veggie beast truly is.
generic.trans: 见证一下我的小菜兽究竟有多强。

critter_eyeofterror.en: They shall watch and learn from my battles!
critter_eyeofterror.trans: 让他们观察并学习我的战斗吧！

carnivalgame_feedchicks_kit.en: It will be built with utmost speed.
carnivalgame_feedchicks_kit.trans: 它将以最快的速度建成。

lunar_forge_kit.en: The forge must be built, forthwith!

tillweed_dried.en: T'would make a most worthy offering to the gods!
tillweed_dried.trans: 堪为敬奉诸神的顶级供品！

slingshot_handle_voidcloth.en: The young scout doth come into his own.
slingshot_handle_voidcloth.trans: 年轻的童子军已经开始独当一面了。

2.en: Hail, beastie!

book_web.en: Sometimes we may learn from the enemy.
book_web.trans: 有时我们可以从敌人身上学到东西。

generic.en: Destroy the source of its unholy power!
My friend doth possess strength that could rival mighty Thor's!
generic.trans: 我的朋友拥有可以与强大的雷神相媲美的力量！

critter_dragonling.trans: 在独角兽旁边！是一条龙！

onion.en: I dare thee, provoke tears from mine eyes!

hermitcrabtea_moon_tree_blossom.en: By the draught, lunar beasts take no heed of us!
hermitcrabtea_moon_tree_blossom.trans: 饮下此药，月兽将对我们视若无睹！

yotr_fightring_kit.en: A test of might and bravery!

1.trans: 被抢掠了。但是，是什么东西干的？

2.en: If only they'd had a warrior to fight for them.
2.trans: 如果有一名战士为他们而战，结果就不会是现在这个样子了。

3.en: What foul being caused such destruction?
3.trans: 哪种恶魔造成了这样的毁灭？

generic.en: An ally to meat!

palmconetree.en: It hath a most hardy exterior.

robot.en: %s was felled by %s. They will live on in Valhalla.

default.en: %s was felled by %s. Live on in Valhalla.

female.en: %s was felled by %s. She will live on in Valhalla.

male.en: %s was felled by %s. He will live on in Valhalla.

noammo.en: Woe! There is nary a cannonball in sight!
noammo.trans: 悲哀！触目所及，不见炮弹！

generic.en: Load the cannons!

quagmire_crabmeat.en: T'would be an honor to be fed to the sky god, beast.
quagmire_crabmeat.trans: 作为天空之神的供品，是你的荣耀。

normal.trans: 温暖的火焰，温暖的薇格弗德。

generic.en: Warm fire, warm Wigfrid.
generic.trans: 温暖的火焰，温暖的薇格弗德。

out.trans: 火光摇摇曳曳地熄灭了。

halloweenpotion_drinks_weak.en: A meager reward for my troubles.
halloweenpotion_drinks_weak.trans: 我大费周章而得到的微小奖赏。

winter_food5.trans: 我们今晚上来享受盛宴！

moonglass_charged.en: Tis lit by a strange power.
moonglass_charged.trans: 它被一种奇怪的力量所照亮。

winter_food7.en: Something so foul shall never pass my lips!
winter_food7.trans: 这么污秽的东西永远不应沾到我的嘴唇！

winter_food1.en: How dost I free you from the bread, man of ginger??
winter_food1.trans: 我怎么把你从面包上解救下来的，姜人？

winter_food3.en: T'would look as divine on the tree as in mine mouth!
winter_food3.trans: 它在我嘴里和在树上看起来一样神圣！

moon_altar_rock_seed.en: The gods call me to it, I shall not resist.
moon_altar_rock_seed.trans: 诸神召唤我于此，我不会忤逆。

winter_food2.en: Like a snowflake, it is a gift from the heavens!
winter_food2.trans: 和雪花一样，它是上天给的礼物！

chesspiece_warg_mutated.trans: 它根本不是我长矛的对手。

common.en: Oh, a map! No, wait. That's wrong.

lava_pond.en: I shall not surrender to the fiery pits!
lava_pond.trans: 我不该对火坑望而却步！

quagmire_grill.en: It touches meat with the fires of Hel.

chesspiece_yoth.en: This warrior's loyalty was as fleeting as the wind.
chesspiece_yoth.trans: 此勇士之忠诚去得快如疾风。

damaged.en: Shall it be resurrected, or its steel organs claimed to renew another?
damaged.trans: 应使其复活，抑或取其钢铁器官以更新他物？

generic.en: I shall sunder thee, O metal menace!

onemanband.en: Sing with me! We are the guardians of Asgard!
onemanband.trans: 跟我一起唱！我们是神域的守护者！

wagstaff_npc_mutations.trans: 打发走那头野兽吾心甚悦。

nightmarelight.en: It harnesses dark powers from beneath.
nightmarelight.trans: 它利用来自地下的黑暗能量。

book_horticulture.en: But can it tend the garden of mine soul?
book_horticulture.trans: 但是它能好好照看我的心灵花园吗？

slingshotammo_honey.en: What fun is a battle without hand to hand combat?
slingshotammo_honey.trans: 没有肉搏的战斗，何来乐趣？

catcoonhat.en: A furry cap! Blessings to you, cute meat.
catcoonhat.trans: 一顶皮帽子！祝福你，可爱的肉。

kelphat.en: I'd never trade mine helm for this.
kelphat.trans: 绝对不会拿我的头盔换这个。

generic.en: The beast grows restless when tis not fed.
generic.trans: 那头野兽在没有吃饱的时候会变得焦躁不安。

full.en: Accept my offering, oh mighty gods.
full.trans: 伟大的诸神啊，请接收我供奉的祭品吧。

chesspiece_yots.en: I do relish thy slaying, worm.
chesspiece_yots.trans: 我确实享受对你的屠杀，蠕虫。

abysspillar_trial.en: Why doth we linger? The fray awaits!
