abysspillar_trial.trans: 为何在此徘徊？战斗在等着我们！

rabbitkingminion_bunnyman.en: I shall send you to the endless carrot patch.
rabbitkingminion_bunnyman.trans: 我将带你去无尽的胡萝卜地。

mermguard.en: A formidable warrior, to be sure.
mermguard.trans: 无疑是令人敬畏的勇士。

dragonfly.en: Ah, dragon! At last we meet!

held.trans: 我更喜欢你黑色的同胞。

generic.en: Red like blood.

melted.en: 'Twas no match for this great heat.
melted.trans: 无法与仲夏之热所匹敌。

generic.en: A trap left by the dastardly ice giants, no doubt.
generic.trans: 无疑是邪恶的冰霜巨人所设下的陷阱。

lifeinjector.en: This will return me to top form.
lifeinjector.trans: 这样会帮我回到最佳状态。

yotb_sewingmachine.en: The competition will be fierce, thus my beast's outfits must be fiercer!
yotb_sewingmachine.trans: 竞争会很生猛，因此我的野兽的外衣必须更生猛!

firestarter.en: Forged in flame!

ghost.en: %s's restless spirit could be revived with a heart.
ghost.trans: %s的不安精神可以用心恢复。

murderer.en: Murderer! To battle!
murderer.trans: 你这个杀人凶手！战斗吧！

attacker.en: If %s is looking for trouble, I shall give it to them!
attacker.trans: 要是%s找麻烦，我就给他麻烦！

generic.en: Good health to you, %s!

playing.en: All of the spoils without the challenge.
playing.trans: 不用战胜挑战就能获得战利品。

generic.en: It requires a token to prove my worthiness.
generic.trans: 它需要一代币来证明我的价值。

slingshotammo_purebrilliance.en: What fun is a battle without hand to hand combat?
slingshotammo_purebrilliance.trans: 没有肉搏的战斗，何来乐趣？

costume_tree_body.en: I have my own costu- that is, warrior's garb!
costume_tree_body.trans: 我有自己的戏——我是说，战士服！

devtool_nodev.en: I'm not strong enough to wield it.
devtool_nodev.trans: 我还不够强大，无法使用它。

pottedfern.en: What are you meant to do with such a thing?
pottedfern.trans: 这种东西你想用来做什么？

chesspiece_wagboss_robot.en: The iron golem was indeed misguided.
chesspiece_wagboss_robot.trans: 铁魔像的确误入了歧途。

fertilizer.en: Its stench could raise the fallen.

chesspiece_carrat.en: I'm not keen on honoring a vegetable so.
chesspiece_carrat.trans: 我不想给蔬菜这么高的荣誉。

spice_salt.en: It has the briny taste of the sea.

announce_dig_disease_warning.trans: 退散吧，你这可恶的枯萎病！

describe_plantstressed.trans: 有些东西阻碍了它的成长。

prey.en: I let you go this time!

generic.en: Odin will have you yet!

announce_mutated_buzzard_arrival.trans: 扭曲的食亡者在空中盘旋！

2.en: You would make a fine stagehand, I hardly saw ye!
2.trans: 你很适合在舞台上移动道具和布景，我几乎都没看到你！

3.en: You were good, but not good enough!
3.trans: 你是还行，不过还不到家！

4.en: You cannot escape my keen eye!
4.trans: 你躲不过我锐利的视线！

announce_oceanfishing_linesnap.en: By Freya, the little fiend snapped my line!
announce_oceanfishing_linesnap.trans: 芙蕾雅啊，小魔鬼扯断了我的线！

announce_detach_buff_sleepresistance.en: I fear my defense against sleep hath weakened.
announce_detach_buff_sleepresistance.trans: 恐怕我对睡眠的防御已经减弱了。

wintersfeastfuel.en: It doth taste just like chicken!

announce_hunt_wrong_fork.en: My warrior instincts are telling me something is not right...
announce_hunt_wrong_fork.trans: 我的战士本能告诉我有蹊跷......

announce_ticoon_abandoned.en: I will finish this hunt solo!

1.en: I feel as though my body's aflame!
1.trans: 我觉得我的身体好像在燃烧!

2.en: Accursed plant with your fiery barbs! Fight me properly!
2.trans: 可恶的植物，带着你的烈焰倒刺！好好跟我打一场吧！

announce_nodangersiesta.en: Battle is upon us, there'll be no rest!
announce_nodangersiesta.trans: 战斗迫在眉睫，没时间休息了！

1.en: Hff... Nothing can weigh a warrior down!
1.trans: 呼...没有什么是勇士搞不定的！

2.en: Huff... Huff...

6.trans: 像斯雷普尼尔...那样迅速...

announce_lunarhail_bird_sounds.trans: 云端屠戮之声不绝于耳！

announce_elixir_boosted.en: It doth soothe for but a fleeting moment.
announce_elixir_boosted.trans: 它只能带来片刻的慰籍。

announce_pocketwatch_portal.en: 'Twas not one of my more graceful exits...
announce_pocketwatch_portal.trans: 我有过更加优雅的退场方式……

announce_bees.trans: 退后，身上有长矛的小生物！

announce_yoth_oncooldown.en: My warriors must still be feasting in Valhalla! I shall hail them in due time.
announce_yoth_oncooldown.trans: 吾之勇士多半还在英灵殿参加盛宴！待时机成熟，吾再唤他们归来！

announce_float_swim_tired.en: A brief respite to gather mine strength!

1.en: Foolish vegetable, the race is that way!
1.trans: 愚蠢的蔬菜，比赛往另一边跑！

2.en: Thou cannot trust a vegetable to do anything right.
2.trans: 汝不能信任蔬菜做出任何对的事情。

announce_attach_buff_sleepresistance.en: Sleep can no longer claim me!
announce_attach_buff_sleepresistance.trans: 睡眠再也不能占有我了！

announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_found_one_mo.en: Only one remains! Victory is imminent!
announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_found_one_mo.trans: 就剩一只了！ 胜利在即！

announce_lunarhail_bird_corpses.en: The sky doth weep with woe and death!

announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_toofar.en: Perhaps we're too far to find the little beasties.
announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_toofar.trans: 走这么远，大概率找不到小野兽了。

announce_oceanfishing_linetooloose.en: The line has gone slack, tis time to reel!
announce_oceanfishing_linetooloose.trans: 鱼线懒散放松了，快把它拉紧！

announce_toadescaped.en: The beast returned from whence it came.
announce_toadescaped.trans: 野兽回到它来的地方去了。

announce_healingsalve_acidbuff_done.en: My defense against the burning rain hath dwindled away!
announce_healingsalve_acidbuff_done.trans: 我对灼烧之雨的抵御力已然消逝！

announce_battlesong_instant_revive_buff.en: "Death, a necessary end, will come when it will come," but not today, my allies!
announce_battlesong_instant_revive_buff.trans: “死亡乃是必然的结局，要到 来总是要到来的，”但不是今天，我的盟友们！

announce_compass_out.en: I fear I'm going to lose my way!

announce_hermitcrab_shell_badteleportpoi.en: Curses! I hath not moved an inch!

deer.en: I shall send you to the unicorn!
deer.trans: 我会把你送到独角兽那！

prey.trans: 勇敢地战死吧，弱小的敌人！

spider.trans: 蜘蛛，让你看看我长矛的厉害！

generic.en: Valhalla awaits!

announce_weight_heavy.en:
Weight: {weight}
By the gods, I've netted a monster!
announce_weight_heavy.trans:
重量：{weight}
诸神啊，我网罗到了一只猛兽！

announce_unimplemented.en: It is not of this world.

announce_otterboat_outofshallows.en: This meager vessel will not withstand such rugged waters!
announce_otterboat_outofshallows.trans: 这艘小船根本无法抵御如此凶险的水域！

describe_plantstressornutrients.en: You are unhappy with the dirt you have? Do not look to me to help you!
describe_plantstressornutrients.trans: 你对那些泥土不满意？不要指望我帮你!

announce_boat_leak.en: Our vessel hath sprung a leak!

announce_shadow_rift_max.trans: 听！这是最不自然的亮光！

announce_boomerang.en: Urg! I must master the curved weapon.
announce_boomerang.trans: 赶紧！我必须掌握这种弯曲的武器。

announce_kitcoon_hideandseek_start.trans: 让我们开始光荣的狩猎吧！

announce_sacredchest_yes.en: I have gained the gods' favor!

2.en: Tis the footsteps of a giant!

3.trans: 是什么在折磨着你，地球母亲？

announce_attach_buff_workeffectiveness.en: Stand aside, I'll have this done in no time!
announce_attach_buff_workeffectiveness.trans: 站一边，我很快就能做完！

announce_tool_tooweak.en: This meager tool hath not the strength to break it.
announce_tool_tooweak.trans: 这微不足道的工具根本无力破坏它。

announce_noinspiration.en: I must warm up my voice... in the heat of battle!

describe_plantverystressed.en: It is beset by multiple afflictions.

announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_time_almost_.en: Alas! We need to find the last of them soon!
announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_time_almost_.trans: 注意！要尽快找到最后一只！

announce_cant_escape_curse.en: Fie! The cursed thing won't leave me!
announce_cant_escape_curse.trans: 呸！这个被诅咒的东西不愿意离开我！

announce_yotd_noboats.en: I have strayed too far from the starting place!

quagmire_announce_mealburnt.en: Alas! If I'd only grabbed it sooner.
quagmire_announce_mealburnt.trans: 唉！要是我早点关火就好了。

announce_nodaysleep.en: The sun is high, journey on!

announce_detach_buff_moistureimmunity.en: The tides have turned for the wetter.

announce_archive_old_knowledge.trans: 我已经见过这个预言了。

2.en: only_used_by_wolfgang

announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_toofar_retur.en: We have returned to the hunting grounds.

announce_hunt_start_fork.en: A battle lies at the end of this trail. Onward!
announce_hunt_start_fork.trans: 这条踪迹的尽头是一场战斗。向前！

announce_archive_no_power.en: It hath not the energy to perform its task.
announce_archive_no_power.trans: 它缺少执行任务的能量。

announce_oceanfishing_badcast.en: I'm more suited to fighting than fishing.
announce_oceanfishing_badcast.trans: 比起钓鱼我更适合战斗。

describe_toodark.trans: 即使对战斗来说也太黑了。

announce_battlesong_instant_panic_buff.en: "By the pricking of my thumbs, something wicked this way comes!"

announce_nowardrobeonfire.en: I fear I cannot. It is being razed.
announce_nowardrobeonfire.trans: 恐怕我不能这样做。这里快要被夷为平地了。

announce_prefallinvoid.trans: 现在还不是我倒下的时候！

announce_detach_buff_attack.en: Back to merely my usual level of fearsomeness.
announce_detach_buff_attack.trans: 回到了我平时的无畏水平。

announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_losegame.en: Arrgh! The little beasties were too clever.
announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_losegame.trans: 哇呀呀！那些小野兽狡猾得过头了。

announce_scrapbook_full.en: I hath already completed my tome.

2.en: only_used_by_wolfgang

announce_nomountedgift.en: I must dismount my mighty steed!
announce_nomountedgift.trans: 我得从我那强大的战马上下来！

announce_yotd_nocheckpoints.en: Alas, there is nary a waypoint to guide me in this race!
announce_yotd_nocheckpoints.trans: 哎，竟无一个路标来指引我完成比赛！

actionfail_generic.en: If I can't do it, it can't be done!
actionfail_generic.trans: 如果我都做不到，那就没人能做到！

announce_hungry.en: How I long for a feast!

announce_hermitcrab_shell_arrive.en: Quicker than if I didst ride Hermod the Swift himself!
announce_hermitcrab_shell_arrive.trans: 比骑乘迅捷的赫尔莫德本人还快！

announce_petrifed_trees.en: I sense Loki's mischievous hand in the shadows.
announce_petrifed_trees.trans: 我能感受到洛基的手在暗影中捣乱。

announce_attach_buff_moistureimmunity.en: A little water is nothing to a Viking!

announce_weapon_tooweak.trans: 遇此劲敌，须寻更强大之兵刃！

announce_ruins_reset.en: I will fight my way out!

announce_attach_buff_electricattack.en: I've been granted the power of Thor!

announce_archive_new_knowledge.en: The gods have given me a vision... some kind of machine?
announce_archive_new_knowledge.trans: 诸神赐予了我一个预言……是种机器吗？

announce_trap_went_off.en: That wasn't part of the plan.

announce_monkey_curse_changeback.en: Thank Odin, the curse hath been lifted.

no_ingredients.en: I must seek out more ingredients!
no_ingredients.trans: 我必须找到更多的原料！

no_station.en: I fear 'tis beyond me at this time.

no_tech.en: I hath not yet discovered how to make such a thing.
no_tech.trans: 我还没发现如何制作这样的东西。

describe_plantstressorfamily.en: Perhaps it needs the company of its kin.
describe_plantstressorfamily.trans: 也许它需要亲人的陪伴。

1.en: Empty is the head that weareth the "crown".

2.en: Fate hath set the "crown" upon thy head.
2.trans: 命运已将“王冠”置于汝首。

announce_winters_feast_buff.en: I feel Odin's blessing upon me!
announce_winters_feast_buff.trans: 我感受到了奥丁的祝福！

announce_lightning_damage_avoided.en: I rode in on a bolt lightning.

announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_found_last_o.en: {name} has lead us to glorious victory!

announce_ticoon_nothing_to_track.en: No little beasties in this area.

announce_oceanfishing_gotaway.en: It lives to fight another day.

describe_plantstressorseason.en: It doesn't have what it takes to brave the seasonal elements.
describe_plantstressorseason.trans: 它不具备勇敢面对季节性因素的能力。

announce_deerclops.trans: 来了个值得尊敬的对手。

announce_rabbitking_lucky.en: Odd rabbit! A sign from the gods?
announce_rabbitking_lucky.trans: 奇怪的兔子！这是来自神的启示吗？

announce_klaus_callforhelp.en: Call thy hordes, they shan't protect thee!
announce_klaus_callforhelp.trans: 呼叫你的部落，他们不会保护你！

announce_hunt_avoid_fork.en: Perhaps I shall start with an easier prey.
announce_hunt_avoid_fork.trans: 也许我该找更容易的猎物下手。

announce_boat_sink.en: A Viking shalln't abandon her ship!

announce_rabbitking_luckycaught.trans: 我抓到你了，命定的兔子！

announce_ticoon_start_tracking.trans: 勇往直前吧，伟大的野兽！！

describe_generic.en: It is an artifact of this realm.
describe_generic.trans: 它是这个王国的一个手工制品。

announce_toadescaping.en: Don't let the beast entertain thoughts of escape.
announce_toadescaping.trans: 不要让野兽有逃跑的想法。

announce_yotd_notenoughboats.en: Space for a challenger must be made, lest I be forced to race alone.
announce_yotd_notenoughboats.trans: 必须为挑战者留出空间，否则我就要独自比赛。

announce_adventurefail.en: Back to the Otherworld, victory shall be mine!
announce_adventurefail.trans: 返回另一个世界，胜利必将属于我！

announce_klaus_unchained.trans: 现在真正的战斗开始了！

announce_no_trap.en: Thankfully, I am light of foot.

announce_washed_ashore.en: The sea did not claim me this day.
announce_washed_ashore.trans: 大海今天没有把我带走。

announce_rabbitking_passive.trans: 有生物正在从下面接近。

1.trans: 怪兽很快就会再度出现！

2.en: The gods are angered!

3.en: There is danger on the wind!

announce_kitcoon_hideandseek_join.en: A hunt is always better with more warriors!
announce_kitcoon_hideandseek_join.trans: 越多勇士参加，狩猎就越精彩！

announce_ticoon_dead.en: My guide hath fallen, and I am left directionless!
announce_ticoon_dead.trans: 我的向导倒下了，我失去了方向。

invalid.en: This is not food befitting a warrior.
invalid.trans: 这不是适合战士的食物。

yucky.en: This food is not befitting a warrior.

generic.en: Meat makes my heart sing!

announce_pirates_arrive.en: A ship approaches! Prepare for battle!

quagmire_announce_lose.en: The god of the sky has been angered!

announce_eyeofterror_flyback.en: Thou hast returned, now let us finish this battle!

announce_repelled.trans: 邪恶魔法挡开了我的攻击！

announce_notskilledenough.en: I... I fear I lack the skill to perform this piece...
announce_notskilledenough.trans: 我……恐怕我缺乏演唱这首曲目的能力……

announce_eyeofterror_flyaway.en: You would flee this fight? Asgard does not honor cowards!
announce_eyeofterror_flyaway.trans: 你要逃离这场战斗？阿斯加德并不尊重懦夫！

announce_nopumpkincarvingonfire.en: Curses! I was not done with that!

announce_acidbats.trans: 现身吧，长着翅膀的敌人！

announce_nohungersiesta.en: I'd like a meat snack first.

1.en: I care naught for these plants or the veggies they produce.
1.trans: 我从未关心这些植物或他们结出的蔬菜。

2.en: Grow, or do not.

3.en: Perhaps someone more weak and feeble might talk to the plants, while I hunt.
3.trans: 我是猎人，你去找个弱小的人去跟植物对话吧。

4.en: No fearsome warrior should be caught talking to plants.
4.trans: 任何可敬的战士都不应该被发现和植物说话。

5.en: I should be hunting, not gardening!
5.trans: 我应该去打猎，而不是种地！

announce_eating_not_feasting.en: Tis more than enough to share!

announce_ticoon_get_leader_attention.en: It is vying for my attention.
announce_ticoon_get_leader_attention.trans: 它正在争夺我的注意力。

announce_nodangergift.en: Not with the gift of battle before me!

announce_otterboat_denbroken.en: I suppose 'tis retribution for destroying the home of the slippery beast.
announce_otterboat_denbroken.trans: 这大概就是捣毁那滑溜溜的野兽巢穴的复仇吧。

announce_wetter.en: Does this count as a bath?

announce_worms.en: The earth quakes with the approach of a foe!
announce_worms.trans: 随着敌人接近，大地都在颤动！

announce_nodangersleep.en: It's not safe to sleep. Use the spear!
announce_nodangersleep.trans: 现在睡觉不安全。使用长矛！
